============= SCRIPT 127: Precache =============
def precache_audio
  return #for fast testing
  farray = Dir.glob("Audio/SE/**/*").select { |f| File.file?(f) }
  farray.each do |x|
    x.slice!("Audio/SE/")
    RPG::SE.new(x.to_s,0,100).play
  end
end

=begin
#===============================================================================
# Cache Optimization
# By Jet10985 (Jet)


#========================================================================
# ** Cache Back, by: KilloZapit
#------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Hey, anyone ever test or play VX ace games which are stored over a
# network connection? I do! And it does have a pretty noticeable delay
# sometimes when loading stuff or in battle.
#
# Sooo... I looked in to improving the cache. But the only script
# I found for "Cache Optimization" apparently was written by someone
# who didn't seam to realize why preloading all files and duplicating
# them whenever they are looked up is a bad idea (Hint: it has to do
# with ram useage and page swapping).
#
# Sooooo... I decided to make my own widdle script! And here it is!
# So what can it do? Welll, for starters it can set some bitmaps to
# be loaded once and never disposed! Only a few system images are by
# default though. It can also keep cached bitmaps around till the
# current scene ends instead of disposing them right away! Helpful for
# animations in battle! Last it automatically cleans up bitmaps that have
# not been used in a while! That will make it use less memory over time.
#
# I am not sure about the most optimal settings yet, but I am pretty
# happy with some of the speed improvements I get.
#------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Version 2: Tweaked the default settings, added some settings for
# printing stuff, and a garbage collection tweak to try and fix some
# problems with crashing.
#------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Version 3: Added the option to automatically precache all actor's 
# sprites or faces. Also added get_key and set_key methods for caching 
# objects besides loaded bitmaps such as dynamic graphics and stuff.
#------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Version 4: Little fix to recache tileset graphics if BITMAP_MAX_AGE is
# set. Otherwise switching between maps with the same tileset wouldn't
# count the ages right. Thankies to Galv for finding the bug!
#========================================================================
# Version 5: Redid the code to recache tileset graphics so that instead
# it disposes and recreates the whole spritesheet which should fix more
# incompatibilitys. Also added the DISPOSE_ON_NEWMAP option so users can
# turn off disposing things on map transfer entirly if needed. Thanks to
# RydiaMist for pointing out that recashing tilesets did nothing to help
# parallax and other sprites from being disposed incorrectly!
#========================================================================
module Cache
  
  # When this is true, cached bitmaps are not disposed normaly
  KEEP_DISPOSED_BITMAPS = true
  
  # When this is true disposed bitmaps in the cache are disposed when 
  # the current scene terminates. Try turning this on if there is too
  # much memory being used.
  BUFFER_DISPOSED_BITMAPS = false
  
  # When this is not null, every map change or return to the map scene,
  # all cached bitmaps have their age value increased by one. Bitmaps
  # with an age value over the max are disposed. The age value is reset
  # when the bitmap is loaded from the cache. 1 is the recommended 
  # minimum, otherwise lots of bitmap are likely to be disposed  and 
  # reloaded returning from menus.   
  BITMAP_MAX_AGE = 2 
  
  # Dispose bitmaps on transfering between maps if this is true.
  # Set this to false if you get disposed bitmap errors when transfering 
  # between maps.
  DISPOSE_ON_NEWMAP = false
  
  # Print messages when the cache is cleaned up if this is true.
  PRINT_CACHE_STATUS = false
  
  # Print messages when a bitmap is loaded in the cache if this is true.
  PRINT_LOADED_BITMAPS = false
  
  # Temporarily disables ruby garbage collection while disposing old
  # bitmaps. May or may not help stability.
  GARBAGE_COLLECTION_TWEAK = true
  
  # Precaches character sprites for all actors. Better to turn it off
  # if there are a lot of actors/sprites.
  PRECACHE_ACTOR_SPRITES = true
  # Same as above but for faces.
  PRECACHE_ACTOR_FACES = false
  
  
  # * New Method: run when the game starts and when the cache is cleared
  # Load any bitmaps you want to keep around here, and set keep_cached
  # on them to true like below.
  def self.precache
    system("IconSet").keep_cached = true
    system("Window").keep_cached = true
=begin
    #PreCache System
    sroot = "Graphics/System/"
    sarray = Dir[sroot + '**/*'].select { |f| File.file?(f) }
    sarray.each do |x|
      x.slice!("Graphics/System/")
      p x
      system(x.to_s).keep_cached = true unless x.include?(".ini")
    end
 =end
    
=begin
    #PreCache Faces
    froot = "Graphics/Pictures/Faces/"
    #p Dir[froot + '**/*'].select { |f| File.file?(f) }
    farray = Dir[froot + '**/*'].select { |f| File.file?(f) }
    #farray.each { |x| picture(x.except("Graphics/Pictures/")).keep_cached = true unless x.include?(".ini") }
    farray.each do |x|
      x.slice!("Graphics/Pictures/")
      picture(x.to_s).keep_cached = true unless x.include?(".ini")
    end
 =end
  
    #Dir.glob("Graphics/Pictures/Faces/**/*").each do |x|
    #  p x.to_s
    #  #picture("Faces/" + x).keep_cached unless File.directory?(x)
    #end
    
    #Dir.entries('/home/theiv').select { |f| File.file?(f) }
    
    #Dir.entries("Graphics/Pictures/Faces").each do |x|
    #  #p x.to_s
    #  p "dir" + x.to_s if File.directory?(x)
    #  p x if File.file?(x)
    #end
    
    for actor in $data_actors
      next unless actor
      if PRECACHE_ACTOR_SPRITES 
        character(actor.character_name).keep_cached = true
      end
      if PRECACHE_ACTOR_FACES
        face(actor.face_name).keep_cached = true
      end
    end if PRECACHE_ACTOR_SPRITES || PRECACHE_ACTOR_FACES
    
    if PRINT_CACHE_STATUS
      n = @cache.values.count {|bitmap| bitmap.keep_cached}
      #puts("Cashe contains " + n.to_s + " precashed objects.")
    end
    
  end
  
  # * Alias: Load bitmap and set flags
  class << self
    alias load_bitmap_cache load_bitmap
  end
  def self.load_bitmap(folder_name, filename, hue = 0)
    bitmap = load_bitmap_cache(folder_name.downcase, filename.downcase, hue)
    bitmap.cached = true
    bitmap.age = 0
    bitmap
  end
  
  # * Overwriten Method: Clear Cache
  # Is this even ever used? Well it's here just incase.
  def self.clear
    @disposed_bitmaps = nil
    @cache ||= {}
    @cache.each {|bitmap| bitmap.cache_dispose rescue next}
    @cache.clear
    GC.start
    precache
    puts("Cleared Cache") if PRINT_CACHE_STATUS
  end
  
  # * New Method: Adds bitmap to an array to be disposed later
  def self.add_dispose(bitmap)
    @disposed_bitmaps ||= []
    @disposed_bitmaps |= [bitmap]
  end
  
  # * New Method: Dispose bitmaps needing to be disposed
  def self.do_dispose
    GC.disable if GARBAGE_COLLECTION_TWEAK
    # dispose disposed bitmaps for this scene
    # (mostly animations and stuff)
    if @disposed_bitmaps
      for bitmap in @disposed_bitmaps 
        bitmap.cache_dispose unless bitmap.disposed?
      end
      puts("Disposed of " + @disposed_bitmaps.size.to_s + " objects.") if PRINT_CACHE_STATUS
      @disposed_bitmaps = nil
    end
    # dispose bitmaps that haven't been used in a while.
    if BITMAP_MAX_AGE && SceneManager.scene_is?(Scene_Map)
      n = 0
      @cache.values.each do |bitmap|
        next if bitmap.keep_cached || bitmap.disposed?
        bitmap.age ||= 0
        if bitmap.age > BITMAP_MAX_AGE
          bitmap.cache_dispose
          n += 1
        else
          bitmap.age += 1 
        end
      end
      puts("Disposed of " + n.to_s + " old objects.") if PRINT_CACHE_STATUS
    end
    # Clean up cache hash, because I wanted to count the non-disposed
    # bitmaps during debugging anyway, so why not?
    @cache.delete_if do |key, bitmap|
      bitmap.disposed? && !bitmap.keep_cached
    end
    puts("Cache now contains " + @cache.size.to_s + " objects.") if PRINT_CACHE_STATUS
    if GARBAGE_COLLECTION_TWEAK 
      GC.enable 
      GC.start
    end
  end

  def self.set_key(key, value)
    return if value == nil #Koda
    unless include?(key)
      puts("Cache Key Set: " + key.to_s) if PRINT_CACHE_STATUS
      @cache[key] = value
    end
    value.cached = true
    value.age = 0
  end
  
  def self.get_key(key)
    return nil unless include?(key)
    value = @cache[key]
    value.age = 0
    value
  end

  if PRINT_LOADED_BITMAPS
    
  def self.normal_bitmap(path)
    unless include?(path)
      #puts("Loading Bitmap: " + path)
      @cache[path] = Bitmap.new(path)
    end
    @cache[path]
  end
  
  end
  
end

class Bitmap
  
  # * Added Public Instance Variable: Flag set when a bitmap is cached
  attr_accessor :cached
  # * Added Public Instance Variable: Flag set to keep bitmap in memory
  attr_accessor :keep_cached
  # * Added Public Instance Variable: Bitmap age value
  attr_accessor :age
  
  # * Alias: Code run when a bitmap is erased/unloaded
  alias_method :cache_dispose, :dispose
  def dispose
    # Never dispose bitmaps with keep_cached set
    return if self.disposed? || @keep_cached
    # Don't despose chached bitmaps if the settings say to keep them
    if @cached && Cache::KEEP_DISPOSED_BITMAPS
      # Tell the cache to add this bitmap to it's list of bitmaps
      # to be disposed later (if BUFFER_DISPOSED_BITMAPS is true) 
      Cache.add_dispose(self) if Cache::BUFFER_DISPOSED_BITMAPS
    else
      cache_dispose
    end
  end
  
  # * Alias: clear flags when copying bitmaps
  alias_method :cache_dup, :dup
  def dup
    bitmap = cache_dup
    bitmap.cached = false
    bitmap.keep_cached = false
    bitmap
  end
 
  # * Alias: same as above (clone and dup are not QUITE the same)
  alias_method :cache_clone, :clone
  def clone
    bitmap = cache_clone
    bitmap.cached = false
    bitmap.keep_cached = false
    bitmap
  end   
  
end

class Scene_Base
  
  # * Alias: tell the cache to dispose stuff when the scene changes
  alias_method :cache_main_base, :main
  def main
    cache_main_base
    Cache.do_dispose
  end
  
end

class Game_Map
  
  # * Alias: tell the cache to dispose stuff when the map changes too
  alias_method :cache_setup_base, :setup
  def setup(map_id)
    if SceneManager.scene.is_a?(Scene_Map)
      SceneManager.scene.dispose_spriteset
      Cache.do_dispose
    end
    cache_setup_base(map_id)
    SceneManager.scene.create_spriteset if SceneManager.scene.is_a?(Scene_Map)
  end if Cache::DISPOSE_ON_NEWMAP
  
end

module DataManager

  class << self
    alias load_database_cache load_database
  end
  def self.load_database
    load_database_cache
    Cache.precache
  end

end
=end
============= SCRIPT 128: Koda - Object Functions =============
#----------------------------------------------------------------
#
#       Affects Ruby core and should always be at the top
#
#----------------------------------------------------------------


#Hash function for updating flags
# V1 gets priority
class ::Hash
  def deep_merge(second)
    merger = proc { |key, v1, v2|
      if Hash === v1 && Hash === v2
          v1.merge(v2, &merger);
      elsif Array === v1 && Array === v2
        (0...v2.length).each do |i|
          if i >= v1.length #if template has new entries
            v1[i] = v2[i];  #add them, ignoring prior entries
          end
        end
        v1; # return v1 array
      else
        v1; # return v1 raw value
      end
    }
    self.merge(second, &merger)
  end
end

def integrity_merge_check(loaded,template)
  if loaded.is_a? Integer || loaded == nil
    loaded = Marshal.load(Marshal.dump(template))
  else
    loaded.deep_merge(template)
  end
end

=begin
#Hash function for updating flags
# V2 gets priority
class ::Hash
  def deep_merge(second)
    merger = proc { |key, v1, v2|
        if Hash === v1 && Hash === v2
            v1.merge(v2, &merger);
        elsif Array === v1 && Array === v2
          (0...v2.length).each do |i| #was v1.length
                if i >= v1.length #was < v2.legnth
                  v1[i] = v2[i];
                end
              end
          v2; #was v1
        else
            v2; #was v2
        end
    }
    self.merge(second, &merger)
  end
end
=end

#Array function for shuffling
class Array
  def shuffle
    sort_by { rand }
  end
end
============= SCRIPT 129: Koda - Core Overrides =============
# Koda - Core Overrides
def wait_until(block)
  while block.call == false
    wait(1)
  end
end

#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
# * Cap BGM Volume
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
class RPG::BGM < RPG::AudioFile
  @@last = RPG::BGM.new
  def play(pos = 0)
    if @name.empty?
      Audio.bgm_stop
      @@last = RPG::BGM.new
    else
      @volume = 70 if @volume > 70
      Audio.bgm_play('Audio/BGM/' + @name, @volume, @pitch, pos)
      @@last = self.clone
    end
  end
  def replay
    play(@pos)
  end
  def self.stop
    Audio.bgm_stop
    @@last = RPG::BGM.new
  end
  def self.fade(time)
    Audio.bgm_fade(time)
    @@last = RPG::BGM.new
  end
  def self.last
    @@last.pos = Audio.bgm_pos
    @@last
  end
  attr_accessor :pos
end

#===============================================================================
# Window_ActorCommand Edit
#===============================================================================
class Window_ActorCommand < Window_Command
  def add_item_command
    #add_command(Vocab::item, :item, !$game_switches[Euphoria::Itemoff::SWITCH_ID])
    add_command(Vocab::item, :item, !$pc.itemlocked?)
  end
end

#Tsukihime circa 2014
class Game_Timer
  #-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Adds the specified number of seconds to the timer.
  # Provide a negative number to subtract time.
  #-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def add(secs)
    @count = [@count + secs * Graphics.frame_rate, 0].max
  end
end

class Game_Interpreter
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Show Text
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def command_101
    wait_for_message
    $game_message.face_name = @params[0]
    $game_message.face_index = @params[1]
    $game_message.background = @params[2]
    $game_message.position = @params[3]
    while next_event_code == 401       # Text data
      @index += 1
      $game_message.add(@list[@index].parameters[0])
      #Koda
      check_narration
      if $game_message.background == 0
        #if $game_message.texts[0].include?("cn[Crow]")
        #  $windowskin = "CrowWindow"
        #else
        #  $windowskin = "Window"
        #end
      end
    end
    case next_event_code
    when 102  # Show Choices
      @index += 1
      setup_choices(@list[@index].parameters)
    when 103  # Input Number
      @index += 1
      setup_num_input(@list[@index].parameters)
    when 104  # Select Item
      @index += 1
      setup_item_choice(@list[@index].parameters)
    end
    wait_for_message
  end
  
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Enemy Transform
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def command_336
    iterate_enemy_index(@params[0]) do |enemy|
      kbattler($data_enemies[@params[1]].battler_name)
      #$game_troop.make_unique_names
    end
  end
  
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Quick Message
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def message(message, background=1, position=2)
    $game_message.background = background
    $game_message.position = position
    $game_message.add(message)
    check_narration
    wait_for_message
  end
  
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Narration Checker
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #def check_narration
  #  ft = $game_message.texts[0].downcase #first text
  #  nameheader = false
  #  nameheader = true if (ft.include?("cn[") || (ft.include?("c[")))# && ft.include?("n["))
  #  nameheader = true if $game_message.texts[0].include?("JESSICA")
  #  nameheader = true if $game_message.texts[0].include?("KAORI")
  #  nameheader = true if $game_message.texts[0].include?("YOU")
  #  
  #  if $game_message.background == 0
  #    $game_message.background = 1 unless nameheader
  #  end
  #end
  def check_narration
    ft = $game_message.texts[0].downcase #first text
    nameheader = false
    
    names = ["BUTTERFLY", "KAORI", "YUREI", "JESSICA", "QUARTZ", "ROSE", "IRIS", "YOU", "CLAUS", "CN[", "C[", "cn[", "c["]
    nameheader = names.any? {|name| $game_message.texts[0].include?(name) }
    nameheader = true if $game_message.texts[0][0] == "/" && $game_message.texts[0][-1] == "/" 
    
    if nameheader && names.any? {|name| name == $game_message.texts[0] }
      $game_message.texts[0] = "/" + $game_message.texts[0] + "/"
    end
    
    if $game_message.background == 0
      $game_message.background = 1 unless nameheader
    end
  end
end

  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Game_BattlerBase
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
class Game_BattlerBase
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Parameter
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def nobuff_param(param_id)
    value = param_base(param_id) + param_plus(param_id)
    #value *= param_rate(param_id) * param_buff_rate(param_id)
    [[value, param_max(param_id)].min, param_min(param_id)].max.to_i
  end
end

  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Game_Battler
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
class Game_Battler < Game_BattlerBase
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Charge TP by Damage Suffered
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def charge_tp_by_damage(damage_rate)
    if self == $game_actors[1] && $game_actors[1].equips.include?($data_armors[130])
      self.tp = 70 * damage_rate * tcr
    else
      self.tp += 50 * damage_rate * tcr
    end
  end
  
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Add State
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def go_last
    add_state(88)
  end
end

  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Game_Actor
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
class Game_Actor < Game_Battler
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Equipless Param-Plus
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def param_bonus(param_id)
    @param_plus[param_id]
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Equipless Final-Stats
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def param_naked(param_id)
    param_base(param_id) + param_bonus(param_id)
  end
end

class Game_Event
=begin
  attr_accessor :pages
  def clone_page(source_page, target_page)
    #@page = 
  end
  
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Refresh
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def refresh
    return if self.name == "<Flex>"
    new_page = @erased ? nil : find_proper_page
    setup_page(new_page) if !new_page || new_page != @page
  end
  
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Hard Refresh
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def hard_refresh
    new_page = @erased ? nil : find_proper_page
    setup_page(new_page) if !new_page || new_page != @page
  end
=end
end

#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
# * Game_CharacterBase
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
class Game_CharacterBase
  attr_accessor   :direction_fix
  attr_accessor   :through
  attr_accessor   :move_speed
  attr_accessor   :opacity
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Koda - added string support
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Change Direction to Designated Direction
  #     d : Direction (2,4,6,8)
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def set_direction(d)
    if d.is_a? Symbol
      d = d.to_s
    end
    if d.is_a? String
      d = case d.downcase
        when 'down'; 2
        when 'left'; 4
        when 'right'; 6
        when 'up'; 8
        else; 0
      end
    end
    @direction = d if !@direction_fix && d != 0
    @stop_count = 0
  end
  
  def shunpo(target=:player,sx=0,sy=1,turnd=:up)
    if target == :player
      target = You.ev
    end
    
    #self is the map event
    self.moveto(target.x+sx,target.y+sy)
    self.set_direction(turnd)
  end
end

#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
# * Game_Action
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
class Game_Action
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Calculate Action Speed
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def speed
    speed = subject.agi + rand(5 + subject.agi / 4)
    speed += item.speed if item
    speed += subject.atk_speed if $data_skills.include?(item) #attack? # "Attack" is never used
    #speed += subject.atk_speed if attack?
    p "speed: " + speed.to_s
    speed
  end
end

class Game_Picture

    update_move
    return if @opacity <= 0
    update_tone_change
    update_rotate
  end
  
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Erase Picture
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  alias og_erase erase 
  def erase
    og_erase
    @mirror = false
  end
end

class Window_Selectable
  # SylphPheonix WASD Fix
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Cursor Movement Processing
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def process_cursor_move
    return unless cursor_movable?
    last_index = @index
    if Input.repeat?(:DOWN)
      cursor_down (Input.trigger?(:DOWN))
    elsif Input.repeat?(:UP)
      cursor_up   (Input.trigger?(:UP))  
    elsif Input.repeat?(:RIGHT)
      cursor_right(Input.trigger?(:RIGHT)) 
    elsif Input.repeat?(:LEFT)
      cursor_left (Input.trigger?(:LEFT))  
    elsif !handle?(:pagedown) && Input.trigger?(:R)
      cursor_pagedown
    elsif !handle?(:pageup)   && Input.trigger?(:L)
      cursor_pageup     
    end
    Sound.play_cursor if @index != last_index
  end
end

#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
# * Window_BattleStatus
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
class Window_BattleStatus < Window_Selectable
  
  def visible_line_number
    return 2 #4 Koda
  end
  
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Window Height
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def window_height
    fitting_height(visible_line_number)
  end

  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Basic Area Retangle
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def basic_area_rect(index)
    rect = item_rect_for_text(index)
    rect.width -= gauge_area_width + 10
    rect
  end

  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Draw Basic Area
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def draw_basic_area(rect, actor)
    draw_actor_name(actor, rect.x + 0, rect.y, 100)
    draw_actor_icons(actor, rect.x + 0, rect.y + line_height, rect.width)
  end
end

class Game_CharacterBase
  def emote(balloon, _wait=true)
    if balloon.is_a?(String)
      balloon = case balloon.downcase
        when 'exclamation', '!'; 1
        when 'question', '?'; 2
        when 'music', '♪'; 3
        when 'heart', '♥'; 4
        when 'anger'; 5
        when 'sweat'; 6
        when 'cobweb', 'cob'; 7
        when 'silence', '...'; 8
        when 'lightbulb', 'bulb'; 9
        when 'sleepy', 'zzz'; 10
      end
    end
  
    #target = self.get_event
    
    self.balloon_id = balloon
    Fiber.yield while self.balloon_id > 0 if _wait
  end

end

  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Event - Overriden in Bowei Core - Fix Later
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def get_event(event_name)
    regexp = Regexp.new("<" + event_name + ">") 
    $game_map.events.each_value do |events|
      next unless events.event
      return events if regexp =~ events.event.name
    end
    return false
  end
============= SCRIPT 130: Koda - Windowskin Support =============
class Window_Base < Window
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Object Initialization
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def initialize(x, y, width, height)
    super
    $windowskin = "Window" if $windowskin == nil
    @windowskin_name = $windowskin
    self.windowskin = Cache.system($windowskin) 
    update_padding
    update_tone
    create_contents
    @opening = @closing = false
  end
  
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Frame Update
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def update
    super
    update_windowskin #Koda
    update_tone
    update_open if @opening
    update_close if @closing
  end
  
  def update_windowskin
    return if $windowskin == @windowskin_name
    self.windowskin = Cache.system($windowskin)
    @windowskin_name = $windowskin
  end
end

#==============================================================================
# ■ Scene_Battle
# Edit Via Giratena2008
#==============================================================================
class Scene_Battle < Scene_Base
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # ● Start Handling
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  alias fai_baco_start start
  def start
    pces = $data_common_events.select {|event| event && event.parallel? }
    @common_events = pces.collect do |common_event|
      Game_CommonEvent.new(common_event.id)
    end
    fai_baco_start
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # ● Foundation for update game by frame
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  alias fai_baco_update_basic update_basic
  def update_basic
    @common_events.each{|event|event.refresh; event.update}
    fai_baco_update_basic
  end
end

class Game_System
  attr_accessor :choices 
  attr_accessor :choiceID
  alias init initialize
  
  def initialize
    init
    @choices=[
    ]
    @choiceID=0
  end
end

class Game_Timer
  def count
    @count
  end
end

class Window_TimeChoice<Window_Selectable
  def initialize(x, y, width, height)
    @data=[]
    @choice_unselect=[]
    @choice=Sprite.new
    @choice.visible=false
    @choice.bitmap=Cache.choice("choice")
    super
    self.back_opacity =0
    self.opacity =0
    self.index=0
    $game_system.choices=[
   #[  ["选项"，开关]，不选择时指向的开关 ID（方便记忆），时间长度]
  

 
  #Booty Trap Options
       [[["Guard",31],["Dodge",32]],34,0,2],                      #Step1
       [[["Hold breath",31],["Wriggle",32],["Talk",33]],34,1,2],  #Step2
       [[["Wriggle",31],["Bite",32]],34,2,2],                     #Step3
       [[["Push",31],["Bite",32],["Talk",33]],34,3,2],            #Step4
       
       [[["Mercy",31],["Insult",32]],34,4,2],                      #talk
  #Ass Rape Options     
       [[["Intercept",31],["Guard",32],["Dodge",33]],34,5,2],
       [[["Endure",31],["Rollover",32],["Talk",33]],34,6,2],
       [[["Leg Lock",31],["Triangle Lock",32],["Talk",33]],34,7,2],
       [[["Bridge",31],["Took off her shoe",32]],34,8,2],
  #Paw Trample Options     
       [[["Intercept",31],["Dodge",32],["Guard",33]],34,9,2],
       [[["Hold breath",31],["Rollover",32],["Talk",33]],34,10,2],
       [[["Endure",31],["Push",32]],34,11,2],
       [[["Head shake",31],["Slap her thigh",32]],34,12,2]
    ]
    choice_item=$game_system.choices[$game_system.choiceID]
    choice_item[0].each{|item|@data.push(item[0])}
    @total_count=choice_item[3]* Graphics.frame_rate
    $game_timer.start(@total_count)
    cursor_rect.empty
  end
  
  def draw_time_gauge(rate)
    time_gague_y=item_rect(item_max-1).y+standard_padding
    draw_gauge(100,time_gague_y,324,rate,hp_gauge_color1, hp_gauge_color2)
  end
  
  def line_height
    return 54
  end
  
  def draw_choice_background(rect)
    @sprite=Sprite.new
    @sprite.bitmap=Cache.choice("choice_unselect")
    @sprite.x=x+rect.x+standard_padding
    @sprite.y=y+rect.y+standard_padding+3
    @choice_unselect.push(@sprite)
  end
  
  def update_cursor
    rect = item_rect(@index)
   if @choice_unselect[@index]
    @choice_unselect[@index].visible=false 
    @choice_unselect.each_with_index{|item,index|item.visible=true if index!=@index}
    @choice.x=x+rect.x+standard_padding
    @choice.y=y+rect.y+standard_padding+3
    @choice.visible=true
   end
  end
  
  def draw_item(index)
    item = @data[index]
    if item
      rect = item_rect(index)
      rect.width -= 5
      item_width=item.length*20
      x=((rect.width)-(item_width/2))/2
      draw_item_name(item,x, rect.y)
      draw_choice_background(rect)
    end
  end
  
  def draw_item_name(item_name, x, y, enabled = true, width = Graphics.width)
    return unless item_name
    change_color(normal_color, enabled)
    draw_text(x, y, width, line_height, item_name,0)
  end
  
  def item_max
    @data ? @data.size : 1
  end
  
  def draw_all_items
    item_max.times{|i|draw_item(i)}
  end
  def refresh
    create_contents
    draw_all_items
  end
  
  def update
    super
    if $game_timer.count!=0
    rate=$game_timer.count.to_f/@total_count 
    draw_time_gauge(rate)
    $game_timer.update
    end
  end
end

class Scene_TimeChoice< Scene_Base
  
  def start
    super
    create_background
    create_choice_window
  end
  
  def create_choice_window
    @choice_window=Window_TimeChoice.new(0, 60, Graphics.width, Graphics.height)
    @choice_window.set_handler(:ok,     method(:on_item_ok))
    @choice_window.set_handler(:cancel, method(:on_item_cancel))
    activate_choice_window
  end
  
  def on_item_ok
    choice_item=$game_system.choices[$game_system.choiceID]
    choice_index=@choice_window.index
    switch_ID=choice_item[0][choice_index][1]
    $game_switches[switch_ID]=true;
    $game_timer.stop
    SceneManager.return
    $game_message.busy=false
  end
 
  def create_background
    @background_sprite = Sprite.new
    @background_sprite.bitmap = SceneManager.scene_timechoice_bitmap
    @background_sprite.color.set(16, 16, 16, 128)
  end
  
  def on_item_cancel
      choice_item=$game_system.choices[$game_system.choiceID]
      choice_index=@choice_window.index
      switch_ID=choice_item[1]
      $game_switches[switch_ID]=true;
      $game_timer.stop
      SceneManager.return
      p(SceneManager.scene)
      $game_message.busy=false
  end
  
  def activate_choice_window
    @choice_window.refresh
    @choice_window.activate
  end
  
  def update
    super
    if $game_timer.count==1
      choice_item=$game_system.choices[$game_system.choiceID]
      choice_index=@choice_window.index
      switch_ID=choice_item[1]
      $game_switches[switch_ID]=true;
      $game_timer.stop
      SceneManager.return
      $game_message.busy=false
    end
  end
  
end

class Scene_Battle < Scene_Base
  alias terminate_old terminate
  def terminate
    SceneManager.snap_timechoice_bitmap
    terminate_old
  end
end
