class Game_Cobra < Game_Interpreter
  
  include Cobra

attr_accessor :roles
attr_accessor :events
attr_accessor :name
attr_accessor :title
attr_accessor :animation
attr_accessor :jellyid
attr_accessor :smoking

def initialize
  super
  @outfit = 'default'
	@name = $game_actors[ID].name
	@title = $game_actors[ID].nickname
	@roles = init_roles
  @uniform = init_uniform
	@events = init_events
	@animation = init_animation
  @smoking = false
  @centerid = 3
  @centeron = false
  @jellyid = [3, "Stroke", 30]
	
  if $game_actors[ID].level == 1
    $game_actors[ID].change_level($game_actors[ID].level + $game_variables[29], false)
  end
	$game_variables[79] = $game_actors[ID].exp
  $game_actors[6].nickname = "Mistress" if $game_actors[6].nickname == ""
end

def mistress?
  $game_switches[44] == true
end

def outfit
  return @outfit
end

def outfit=(newoutfit)
  @outfit = newoutfit
end

def get_event
  if $pc.on_map?('cobra')
    return $game_map.events[1]
  elsif $pc.on_map?('lily')
    return $game_map.events[31]
  else
    return $game_map.events[48]
  end
end

def init_animation
	animation = {
		'picdata' => {
			'anchor' => 1,
			'x' => 272,
			'y' => 208,
			'xzoom' => 100,
			'yzoom' => 100,
			'opacity' => 255,
			'blend' => 0,
		},
		'audio_clip_name' => "",
		'volume' => 40,
		'pitch' => 70,
		'opacity' => 255,

		'frame_queue' => [],
		'common_wait' => 5,

		'layer_ids' => [],
		'active' => false,
	}
	return animation
end

def pic_smell(id)
  anim_pic(id, 200, mirror = false)
end

def start_jelly
  $game_self_switches[[12, 7, 'B']] = true
  wait(20)
end

def stop_jelly
  $game_self_switches[[12, 7, 'B']] = false
end

def pic_jelly(id=jellyid[0], sfx=jellyid[1], commonwait=jellyid[2])
      RPG::SE.new(sfx,80,100).play if sfx != "" 
      screen.start_flash(Color.new(255,0,255,30), 30)
      screen.pictures[id].move(1, 272, 208, 104, 100, 255, 0, 7);wait(7)
      screen.pictures[id].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 106, 255, 0, 4);wait(4)
      screen.pictures[id].move(1, 272, 208, 102, 100, 255, 0, 3);wait(3)
      screen.pictures[id].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 102, 255, 0, 3);wait(3)
      screen.pictures[id].move(1, 272, 208, 101, 100, 255, 0, 2);wait(2)
      screen.pictures[id].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 101, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)
      screen.pictures[id].move(1, 272, 208, 101, 100, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)
      screen.pictures[id].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)
      wait(commonwait)
end

def anim_layer(index, file)
	#Replace if index is accounted for
	for i in 0..@animation['layer_ids'].count-1
		if @animation['layer_ids'][i][0] == index
			@animation['layer_ids'][i] = [index, file]
			return
		end
	end
	
	#Else
	@animation['layer_ids'] << [index, file]
end

def anim_fadepulse(index, file, xzoom, yzoom, opacity, time)
	data = @animation['picdata']
	screen.pictures[index].show(@animation['root'] + file, data['anchor'], data['x'], data['y'], data['xzoom'], data['yzoom'], opacity, 0)
	screen.pictures[index].move(1, 272, 208, xzoom, yzoom, 0, 0, time)
end

def anim_manipulate(x, y, xzoom=100, yzoom=100, opacity=255, time=60, addtype=0)
	@animation['layer_ids'].each do |i|
		screen.pictures[i[0]].move(1, x, y, xzoom, yzoom, opacity, addtype, time)
	end
end

def anim_cycle(cycles)
	root = @animation['root']
	layer_ids = @animation['layer_ids']
	frame_queue = @animation['frame_queue']
	opacity = @animation['opacity']
	common_wait = @animation['common_wait']
	
	cycles.times do
		if @animation['active']
			#Enter Queue
			RPG::SE.new(@animation['audio_clip_name'], @animation['volume'], @animation['pitch']).play
			for i in 0..frame_queue.count-1
				if(opacity < 255)
					opacity += common_wait * 7.5
					opacity = 255 if (opacity > 255)
				end
				
				@animation['layer_ids'].each do |k|
					pic_sprite(k[0], root + k[1] + frame_queue[i])
				end
				
				wait(common_wait)
			end
		else
			wait(common_wait)
		end
	end
end

def anim_refresh
	root = @animation['root']
	layer_ids = @animation['layer_ids']
	frame_queue = @animation['frame_queue']
	opacity = @animation['opacity']
	common_wait = @animation['common_wait']
	data = @animation['picdata']

	#Place stills
	layer_ids.each do |i|
		screen.pictures[i[0]].show(root + i[1] + frame_queue[0], data['anchor'], data['x'], data['y'], data['xzoom'], data['yzoom'], opacity, 0)
	end
	
	@animation['active'] = true
	$game_switches[114] = true
	$game_switches[115] = false
end

def anim_resume
	@animation['active'] = true
	$game_switches[114] = true
	$game_switches[115] = false
end

def pause_anim
	@animation['active'] = false
	$game_switches[114] = false
	#Turn on breath
	data = @animation['picdata']
	pic_breathe_setup(data['x'], data['y'], data['xzoom'], data['yzoom'], data['anchor'])
	$game_switches[115] = true
end

			'Cobra' => 'slave',

		}
	end

end

    $game_variables[162] = {
      'Scarlett' => 'slave',

end

def nick(exact=0)
	exact == 0 ? petname(role) : $game_actors[1].nickname.downcase
end

def petname(namerole=role)
	case namerole
	when 'slave'
		return ['slave', 'slave-boy', 'foot-boy', 'boy'].sample
	when 'puppy'
		return ['pup', 'puppy-boy', 'foot-puppy', 'doggy', 'baby dog', 'puppy'].sample
	when 'piggy'
		return ['piggy', 'pig', 'foot-piggy', 'foot-pig', 'piggy-boy'].sample
	end
end

#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Checkers

def walletsize
  return @events['walletsize']
end

def hook?
  return @events['hook']
end

def smoking=(newsmoke)
  @smoking = newsmoke
end

def smoking?
  return @smoking
end

def role
	return @roles[SYSNAME]
end

def change_role(newrole)
	@roles[SYSNAME] = newrole
end

def uniform
  return @uniform[SYSNAME]
end

def change_uniform(newuni)
	@uniform[SYSNAME] = newuni
end

def piggylevel
	return @events['piggylevel']
end

def nextpiglvl
  return @events['nextpiglvl']
end

def setnextpiglvl
  amounts = [0,2000,2000,3000,3000,3000,3000,4000,5000,15000,0]
  @events['nextpiglvl'] = amounts[piggylevel]
end

def pigexp(amount)
  @events['nextpiglvl'] -= amount
  @events['nextpiglvl'] = 0 if @events['nextpiglvl'] < 0
end

def allowance
	allowance = ($game_actors[1].level + piggylevel) * 300
	@events['allowance'] = allowance
	return allowance
end

def rolesplit(*args)
  args.each do |rc|
    return rc[1] if rc[0] == role
  end
end

def progress(check)
	progress = {
		'hoseaddict' => $game_variables[58],
		'tribute' => $game_variables[59],
		'panties' => $game_variables[142],
		'enslavement' => $game_variables[143],
		'latex' => $game_variables[144],
		'affection' => $game_variables[147],
	}
	
	return progress[check]
end

def stolen(check)
	stolen = {
		'lvl' => $game_variables[29],
		'exp' => $game_variables[79],
		'atk' => $game_variables[60],
		'def' => $game_variables[61],
		'mhp' => $game_variables[62],
		'ember' => $game_variables[63],
		'fpunch' => $game_variables[68],
		'bpalm' => $game_variables[69],
	}
	
	return stolen[check]
end

#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Name Changer
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------  
def nametitle(name, title)
	change_name(name)
	change_title(title)
end

def change_title(title)
	@title = title
	$game_actors[ID].nickname = @title
end

def change_name(newname)
	@name = newname
	$game_actors[ID].name = @name
end

#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Event Checker
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------  
def event_trig(event_name, step=0, instep=0)
  if step.is_a? Hash
    @events[event_name][step][instep] = true
  else
    @events[event_name][step] = true
  end
end

def event_trig?(event_name, step=0, instep=0)
	if step.is_a? Hash
		return (@events[event_name][step][instep] == true)
	else
		return (@events[event_name][step] == true)
	end
end

#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Stat Drain / Returns
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
def temp_unequip
	# Store Equips
	@eqstore = [0, 0, 0, 0, 0]
	5.times do |sid|
		unless $game_actors[1].equips[sid].nil?
			@eqstore[sid] = $game_actors[1].equips[sid].id
		end
	end
	
	# Unequip
	$game_actors[1].clear_equipments
end

def temp_reequip
	# Re-equip
	5.times do |sid|
		$game_actors[1].change_equip_by_id(sid, @eqstore[sid])
	end
end

def attempt_stat_drain(param)
	param.downcase!
	req = (param == 'mhp' ? 10 : 1)
	current = case param
    when 'mhp'
      $game_actors[1].mhp
    when 'atk'
      $game_actors[1].atk
    when 'def'
      $game_actors[1].def
  end
  
	if current > req
		drain_stat(param)
		return true
	end
		return false
end

def drain_stat(param)
	case param
	when 'atk'
		$game_variables[60] += 1
		$game_actors[1].add_param(2, -1)
	when 'def'
		$game_variables[61] += 1
		$game_actors[1].add_param(3, -1)
	when 'mhp'
		#$game_variables[62] += 10
		#$game_actors[1].add_param(0, -10)
    $game_variables[62] += 1
		$game_actors[1].add_param(0, -1)
	end
end

def overcharge
  return (piggylevel * 2)
end

def attempt_stat_return(param)
	param = param.downcase
	req = 1 #(param == 'mhp' ? 10 : 1)
  
  return false if stolen(param) < req
  
	#if param == 'mhp'
  # return false if $game_variables[62] < req
  #elsif param == 'atk'
  #  return false if $game_variables[60] < req
  #elsif param == 'def'
  #  return false if $game_variables[61] < req
  #else
  #  #error
  #end
  return_stat(param)
end

def return_stat(param)
	case param
	when 'atk'
		$game_variables[60] -= 1
		#$game_actors[1].add_param(2, 1)
    stat_grow_item(2, 1, 1, 3, overcharge)
	when 'def'
		$game_variables[61] -= 1
		#$game_actors[1].add_param(3, 1)
    stat_grow_item(3, 1, 1, 3, overcharge)
	when 'mhp'
    if stolen('mhp') >= 10
      $game_variables[62] -= 10
      stat_grow_item(0, 10, 10, 30, (overcharge * 10))
    else
      $game_variables[62] -= 1
      stat_grow_item(0, 1, 1, 3, overcharge)
      #$game_actors[1].add_param(0, 10)
    end
	end
end

def attempt_level_drain(giveid=1, getid=6)
	if enough_xp?(giveid,getid)
		drain_level(giveid,getid)
	end
end

def enough_xp?(giveid=1, getid=6)
	return false if $game_actors[giveid].level == 1
	if giveid == 1
		$game_actors[giveid].exp >= calc_leveldown(giveid)
	else
		$game_actors[giveid].exp >= calc_levelup(getid)
	end
end

def calc_levelup(id)
	levelup = ($game_actors[id].exp_for_level($game_actors[id].level + 1) - $game_actors[id].exp_for_level($game_actors[id].level))
  return levelup
end

def calc_leveldown(id)
  leveldown = ($game_actors[id].exp_for_level($game_actors[id].level) - $game_actors[id].exp_for_level($game_actors[id].level - 1))
  return leveldown
end

def drain_level(giveid=1, getid=6)
	if enough_xp?(giveid, getid)
	
		if giveid == 1
			expchange = calc_leveldown(giveid)
		else
			expchange = calc_levelup(getid)
		end
		
		$game_actors[getid].change_exp(($game_actors[getid].exp + expchange), false)
		$game_actors[giveid].change_exp(($game_actors[giveid].exp - expchange), false)
		
		if getid == 6
			$game_variables[29] += 1
		end
		if giveid == 6
			$game_variables[29] -= 1
		end
		
	else
	#errormsg
	end
end

#Effects
def heartbeat(amount=1)
    amount.times do
      heartbeats('cobra')
    end
end

def centerport(pic="00", index=@centerid, smoke=@smoking)
    root = "Faces/Cobra/cobra_center_"
    file = ""
    file = root + pic + (smoke ? "_smoke" : "")
    if index != @centerid
      $game_map.screen.pictures[@centerid].erase
      $game_map.screen.pictures[@centerid+1].erase
    end
    if !@centeron
      screen.pictures[index].show(file, 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 0, 0)
      pic_fade(index, 255, 20)
       pic_fade(index+1, 0, 10)
      @centerid = index
      @centeron = true
    else
      screen.pictures[index+1].show(file, 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 0, 0)
      pic_fade(index+1, 255, 20)
      pic_fade(index, 0, 10)
      @centeron = false
    end
    #picbreathe_target([index, index+1])
    #picbreathe_center
    #picbreathe_on
    @centerid = index
end

def centerfade(index=@centerid, wait=true)
      pic_fade(index, 0, 30)
      pic_fade(index+1, 0, 30)
      wait(30)
      $game_map.screen.pictures[index].erase
      $game_map.screen.pictures[index+1].erase
      #picbreathe_target([0])
      #picbreathe_track(false)
      #picbreathe_off
      @centeron = false
end

#ENDCLASS
end

  def exit_sanctum
    RPG::BGS.fade(1000)
    Fiber.yield while $game_player.transfer? || $game_message.visible
    $game_player.reserve_transfer(11, 24, 17, 8)
    $game_temp.fade_type = 2
    Fiber.yield while $game_player.transfer?
  end
  
  def enter_sanctum
    tintpics_on
    Fiber.yield while $game_player.transfer? || $game_message.visible
    $game_player.reserve_transfer(16, 8, 15, 8)
    $game_temp.fade_type = 2
    Fiber.yield while $game_player.transfer?
  end
  
  def game_object; return $lily; end
    
  def resolved?; return game_object.resolved?; end
  def redeemed?; return game_object.redeemed?; end
  def apprenticed?; return game_object.apprenticed?; end
  def master?; return game_object.master?; end
    
  def get_event; return game_object.get_event; end 
  alias ev get_event
  
  def subify(amount=1); game_object.subify(amount); end
  def domify(amount=1); game_object.domify(amount); end
  def megabar; game_object.megabar; end
  def seen(scene); game_object.seen(scene); end
  def seen?(scene); game_object.seen?(scene); end
  def said(dia); game_object.said(dia); end
  def said?(dia); game_object.said?(dia); end
  def sublvl; game_object.sublvl; end
    
  def bootscooldown=(which); game_object.bootscooldown=(which); end
  def bootscooldown?; game_object.bootscooldown? ; end
    
  def appear
    if outfit == 'latex'
      get_event.set_graphic('MainChar3',0)
    else
      get_event.set_graphic('MainChar2',3)
    end
  end
    
  $lilybootsoff = false
  
end

class Game_Lily < Game_Interpreter
  
  include Lily
  
  def initialize
    super
    initialize_variables
  end
  
  def megabar
    game_object.call_common_event(337)
  end
  
  def get_event
    if $pc.on_map?('lily')
      return $game_map.events[1]
    else
      return $game_map.events[45]
    end
  end
    
  def initialize_variables
    # Koda - Added Merge Support for Future-proofing
    variables = 
      {
        "Outfit" => "default",
        "Boot Cooldowns" => false,
        "Time" => "",
        "Submission" => 0,
        "Scenes" => {
          #-------------------------------------------------------------#
          # Master Lily Stuff
          #-------------------------------------------------------------#
            "Gerald Spar Return" => false,
            "Master Pitch" => false,
            "Provisional Master" => false,
            "Bootsniff Escape" => false,
            "Bootsniff Lesson" => false,
            "Learn Pulse" => false,
            "Learn Tidewall" => false,
            "Learn Mist Clone" => false,
            #Sidequest
            "Helpless Visit 1" => false,
            "Helpless Visit 2" => false,
            "Puppy Visit 1" => false,
            "Puppy Visit 2" => false,
            "Puppy Visit 3" => false,
            #Boots
            "Nonapprentice Boots 1" => false,
            "Nonapprentice Boots 2" => false,
            "Nonapprentice Boots 3" => false,
            "Boots Trance 1" => false,
            "Boots Trance 2" => false,
            "Boots Trance 3" => false,
            "Boots Trance 4" => false,
            "Boots Trance Toilet" => false,
            #Combat
            "Mist Clone Heal" => false,
        },
        "Dialogue" =>
        {
          #-------------------------------------------------------------#
          # Chats
          #-------------------------------------------------------------#
            "Apprentice Review" => false,
            "Dojo Boredom" => false,
            "Other Mistresses 1" => false,
            "Leaving the Dojo" => false,
            "Puppy Gear 1" => false,
            "Architect" => false,
            "Helplessness" => false,
        },
      }
      
      $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID] = integrity_merge_check($game_variables[VARIABLE_ID], variables)
    end
  
  def submission
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Submission"]
  end
    
  def sublvl
    case submission
      when 10; return 3
      when 9,8,7; return 2
      when 3,4,5,6; return 1
      when 2,1,0; return 0
      else return 0
    end
  end
    
  def bootscooldown=(which=true)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Boots Cooldown"] = which
  end
  
  def bootscooldown?
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Boots Cooldown"]
  end
    
  def outfit
    return "boot" if $centerface && $lilybootsoff
    return "center" if $centerface
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Outfit"]
  end
  
  def subify(amount=1)
    curr = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Submission"]
    curr += amount
    curr = 10 if curr > 10
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Submission"] = curr
  end

  def domify(amount=1)
    curr = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Submission"]
    curr -= amount
    curr = 0 if curr < 0
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Submission"] = curr
  end
  
  def outfit=(newoutfit)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Outfit"] = newoutfit
  end
  
  def seen(scene)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Scenes"][scene] = true
  end
  
  def seen?(scene)
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Scenes"][scene]
  end
  
  def said?(args)
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Dialogue"][args]
  end
  
  def said(args)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Dialogue"][args] = true
  end
  
  def resolved?
    return apprenticed? || redeemed?
  end
  
  def master?
    seen?("Provisional Master")
  end
  
  def apprenticed?
    #return false
    return $game_switches[109]
  end
  
  def redeemed?
    #return false
    return $game_switches[57]
  end
  
end
============= SCRIPT 254: ◢ Lily Test Scene =============
=begin
def lily_test_scene

face(Lily.blink)
Lily.say("Alright, apprentice.")

face(Lily.smile)
Lily.say("For your first lesson, we'll
start with something basic.")

face(Lily.smug)
Lily.say("Since keeping you as my
apprentice long term requires
you to make it out of this tower...")

face(Lily.laugh)
Lily.say("I'll help you learn to resist
the evil women here!")

case choice([nil, "Sounds good!", "Yes, Master."])
when 0
  #
when 1
face(Lily.smirk)
  Lily.say("Hehe, good boy.\\!\nLet's begin then.")
end

message(
"\\n[7] suddenly leans down...\\!
And slips off one of her boots!"
)

face(Lily.smirk)
Lily.say("Come here and sniff, \n[1]~")

face(You.concern)
You.say("W-what..?")

face(Lily.laugh)
Lily.say("Hmph. Don't you trust your
Master, \n[1]?")

face(Lily.smile)
Lily.say("Think of it this way.")

face(Lily.smirk)
Lily.say("No matter how superior my
secret water techniques...")

face(Lily.smug)
Lily.say("They won't be useful to you until
we address your most glaring weakness~!")

face(Lily.laugh)
Lily.say("What weakness..?")

face(Lily.smile)
Lily.say("To soft, smelly, seductive
female feet, of course~♥")

case choice([nil, "I... I don't...", "It's not that glaring..."])
when 0
  #
when 1
  #
end


face(Lily.smirk)
Lily.say("Prove it, then.\\! Sniff.")

Lily.say("If it doesn't affect you,
we can move on immediately!")

case choice([nil, "F-fine...", "O-okay..."])
when 0
	message("You suppose you did accept
	her as your Master...")

	message("There's not much point if you can't
	trust her at least this much.")
when 1
  #
else
p "hi"
end

message("You approach \n[7] as instructed,
conscious of how she used this
as an attack when you fought...")

message("Thankfully, the boot seems
a lot less imposing now that
she's not forcing it on you.")

message("Maybe this type of reflection
and analysis is precisely what
she thinks will help!")
end
=end

============= SCRIPT 256:  =============

============= SCRIPT 257: ▼ Bowei Choices =============

============= SCRIPT 258: ◢ Choice =============
=begin
class Game_Interpreter
  def choice(list, cancelbranch=-1)
    index = 0
    list.each_with_index do |option, option_index|
      if option_index == 0
        $game_message.add(option) if option.is_a?(String)
        next
      end
      $game_message.choices.push(option) if option
    end
    $game_message.choice_cancel_type = (cancelbranch + 1)
    $game_message.choice_proc = ->(n) { index = n }
    wait_for_message
    return index
  end
end
=end

class Game_Interpreter
  def choice(list, cancelbranch=-1)
    index = 0
    list.each_with_index do |option, option_index|
      if option_index == 0 && !option.is_a?(String)
        option.each {|m| $game_message.add(m)} if option.is_a?(Array)
        next
      end
      $game_message.choices.push(option) if option
    end
    $game_message.choice_cancel_type = (cancelbranch + 1)
    $game_message.choice_proc = ->(n) { index = n }
    wait_for_message
    return index
  end
end

#=======================================================================#

class Game_Swan < Game_Interpreter

    super

    if MAP_ID.include?($game_map.map_id)

      }
      
      $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID] = integrity_merge_check($game_variables[VARIABLE_ID],@tempflags)
      
      #Merge Temp to Current, Overwrite if Needed
      #if $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID].is_a? Integer
      #  $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID] = Marshal.load(Marshal.dump(@tempflags))
      #  #p $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]
      #else
      #  $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID] = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID].deep_merge(@tempflags)
      #  #$game_variables[VARIABLE_ID] = @tempflags.deep_merge($game_variables[VARIABLE_ID])
      #  #p $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]
      #end
      @tempflags = nil
  end

  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Time related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def time=(args)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Time"] = args
  end
  
  def time
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Time"]
  end
  
  def day=(args)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Day"] = args
  end
  
  def day
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Day"]
  end

  def day_passed
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Day"] += 1
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Crow Fought Today"] = false #Koda
    p "Day: " + day.to_s
    p "Crow Day: " + $crow.crow_day.to_s
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Cinema Trigger Check
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def seen?(args)
    #p "Checking if " + args.to_s + " is done."
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Cinema"][args]
    #p "Confront Swan: " + $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Cinema"]["Confront Swan"].to_s
  end
  
  def seen(args)
    #p "Setting" + args.to_s + " as seen."
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Cinema"][args] = true
    #p "Confront Swan: " + $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Cinema"]["Confront Swan"].to_s
  end
  
  def said?(args)
    p "You are checking whether " + args.to_s + " has been triggered or not."
    p $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Dialogue"][args]
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Dialogue"][args]
  end
  
  def said(args)
    p "MARKING" + args.to_s + "AS SAID"
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Dialogue"][args] = true
  end
  
  #Koda
  def footjob_seen?(which)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Footjob Texts Seen"].include?(which)
  end
  
  #Koda
  def footjob_seen(which)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Footjob Texts Seen"] << which
    p $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Footjob Texts Seen"]
  end
  
  #Koda
  def walkies?
    return $game_switches[120]
  end
  
  #Koda
  def go_on_walkies
    $game_switches[120] = true
  end
  
  #Koda
  def end_walkies
    $game_switches[120] = false
  end
  
  #Koda
  def tt_walkies
    if walkies?
      eventid = case $game_map.map_id
        when 33; 107 
        when 36; 52
      end
      $game_player.turn_toward_character($game_map.events[eventid])
      return true
    else
      return false
    end
  end
  
  def get_event
    case $game_map.map_id
      when 33; return $game_map.events[5]
      when 34; return $game_map.events[5]
    end
  end
  alias ev get_event
  
  def cross_map_on?(args)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Cross Map"][args]
  end
  
  def cross_map_on(args)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Cross Map"][args] = true
  end
  
  def cross_map_off(args)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Cross Map"][args] = false
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # The event id of cinematics
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  EVENT_ID = {
    "First Arrival" => [44, 1, MAP_ID[0]],
  }
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Play the cinametics
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def play(play_scene_id)
    EVENT_ID.each do |scene_id, event_id|
      if play_scene_id == scene_id
        call_event(event_id[0], event_id[1], event_id[2])
      end
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Reset all the map in the story
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def reset_map
    MAP_ID.each do |i|
      $game_self_switches[[i, 1, 'A']] = false
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Tint the screen according to the time
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def tint_screen
    call_event(36, 1, MAP_ID[0]) 
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Tint the screen according to the time
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def place_actor
    case $game_map.map_id
      when MAP_ID[0] 
        call_event(37, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when MAP_ID[1] 
        call_event(34, 1, MAP_ID[1])
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Reset position of actors
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def reset_actor
    case $game_map.map_id
      when MAP_ID[0] then call_event(30, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when MAP_ID[1] then call_event(35, 1, MAP_ID[1])
    end
  end
  
  def direction_fix
    case $game_map.map_id
      when MAP_ID[0] then call_event(55, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when MAP_ID[1] then call_event(74, 1, MAP_ID[1])
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # If variables are not initialized, initialize them
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def variables_initialized?
    call_event(31, 1, MAP_ID[0]) if !$game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[0], 31, 'A']]
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Sleep
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def sleep
    call_event(28, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Screenfx
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def heartbeat
		RPG::SE.new("heartbeat",80,100).play
		game_screen.start_flash(Color.new(255,0,255,150), 20)
		game_screen.start_shake(2, 2, 10)
	end
	
	def shake
    game_screen.start_shake(2, 2, 10)
  end
  
  def draw_film_border
		screen.pictures[10].show("FilmBorder", 1, 272, 208, 100,100, 255, 0)
	end
		
	def erase_film_border
		erase_pic(10)
	end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Monk status
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def monk_status(monk_id)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Monk Status"][monk_id - 1]
  end
  
  def set_monk_status(monk_id, status)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Monk Status"][monk_id - 1] = status
  end
  
  def healthy?(monk_id)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Monk Status"][monk_id - 1] == "Healthy"
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Monk's status setup
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  POSSIBLE_SYMPTOMS = ["Dizzy", "Blind", "Tremors", "Cold", "Illusion"]

  
  def initialize_monk_status
    monk_status_list = POSSIBLE_SYMPTOMS.shuffle
    (1..5).each do |i|
      set_monk_status(i, monk_status_list[i - 1])
      set_monk_status(i, "Healthy") if (seen?("Confront Swan") || walkies?)
    end
    #draw_monk
  end
  
  def draw_monk
    "drawing monks"
    $game_map.events[105].moveto(31, 38) if time.include?("Episode 2")
    if time.include?("Episode 2")
      return unless (seen?("Confront Swan") || walkies?)
    end
    reset_monk_position
    initialize_monk_status if (seen?("Confront Swan") || walkies?) #Koda
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Monk Status"].each_with_index do |status, index|
      if status != "Healthy"
        $game_map.events[INJURED_MONK_EVENT_ID[index]].moveto(MONK_MAP_POSITION[index][0], MONK_MAP_POSITION[index][1])
      else
        $game_map.events[HEALTHY_MONK_EVENT_ID[index]].moveto(MONK_MAP_POSITION[index][0], MONK_MAP_POSITION[index][1])
      end
    end
  end
  
  def reset_monk_position
    "resetting monks"
    HEALTHY_MONK_EVENT_ID.each_with_index do |event_id, index|
      $game_map.events[event_id].moveto(HEALTHY_MONK_MAP_POSTION[index][0], HEALTHY_MONK_MAP_POSTION[index][1])
    end
    INJURED_MONK_EVENT_ID.each_with_index do |event_id, index|
      $game_map.events[event_id].moveto(INJURED_MONK_MAP_POSTION[index][0], INJURED_MONK_MAP_POSTION[index][1])
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Monk's interactions
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :active_monk, :active_antidote
  
  def interact_with_monk
    call_event(29, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  
  def talk_to_monk
    call_event(46, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  
  def help_monk
    call_event(47, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  
  def draw_monk_zzz
    if monk_status(@active_monk) == "Healthy"
      $game_map.events[HEALTHY_MONK_EVENT_ID[@active_monk - 1]].balloon_id = 10
    else
      $game_map.events[INJURED_MONK_EVENT_ID[@active_monk - 1]].balloon_id = 7
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Research related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#3
  def research_progress
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Research Progress"]
  end
  
  def research_progress=(progress)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Research Progress"] = progress
  end
  
  def gain_research_progress(args)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Research Progress"] += args
  end
  
  def toxicology_level
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Toxicology Level"]
  end
  
  def toxicology_level=(level)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Toxicology Level"] = level
  end
  
  def toxicology_level_up

  end

  #Koda

  end

  end
  
  #Koda
  def tear_synth_up

  end

  def rematch_quota
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Rematch quota"]
  end
  
  def gain_rematch_quota
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Rematch quota"] += 2
  end
  
  def secret_recipe_unlocked
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Secret Recipe Unlocked"] = true
  end
  
  #Koda
  def unlock_recipe(recipe)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Recipe Unlocked"][recipe] = true
  end
  
  #Koda
  def recipe_unlocked?(recipe)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Recipe Unlocked"][recipe]
  end
  
  def secret_recipe_unlocked?
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Secret Recipe Unlocked"]
  end
  
  def secret_recipe_consumed
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Secret Recipe Consumed"] = true
  end
  
  def secret_recipe_not_consumed
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Secret Recipe Consumed"] = false
  end
  
  def secret_recipe_consumed?
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Secret Recipe Consumed"]
  end
  
  def poison_unlocked
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Poison Unlocked"] = true
  end
  
  def poison_unlocked?
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Poison Unlocked"]
  end
  
  def helpfulness
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Helpfulness"]
  end
  
  def helpfulness=(value)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Helpfulness"] = value
  end
  
  def helpfulness_up
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Helpfulness"] = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Helpfulness"] + 1
  end
  
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Room Key Related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def have_key?(key_name)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Key Obtained"][key_name]
  end
  
  def get_key(key_name)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Key Obtained"][key_name] = true
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Addiction related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def feet_addiction
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Feet Addiction"]
  end
  
  def feet_addiction=(value)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Feet Addiction"] = value
  end
  
  def feet_addiction_up
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Feet Addiction"] += 1
  end
  
  MILD_DEPENDENCY = 1
  STRONG_DEPENDENCY = 20
  EXTREME_DEPENDENCY = 50
  MAX_DEPENDENCY = 90
  
  def feet_dependency
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Feet Dependency"]
  end
  
  def feet_dependency=(value)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Feet Dependency"] = value
  end
  
  def feet_dependency_up(value)
    old_value = feet_dependency
    new_value = [old_value + value, MAX_DEPENDENCY].min
    feet_dependency_prompt(old_value, new_value)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Feet Dependency"] = new_value
  end
  
  def feet_dependency_level(dependency = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Feet Dependency"])
    if dependency > EXTREME_DEPENDENCY
      return "Extreme"
    elsif dependency > STRONG_DEPENDENCY
      return "Strong"
    elsif dependency > MILD_DEPENDENCY
      return "Mild"
    else
      return "Clean"
    end
  end
  
  #Koda
  def feet_dependency?(check = "Mild")
    dependency = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Feet Dependency"]
    case check
      when "Mild"
        return dependency > MILD_DEPENDENCY
      when "Strong"
        return dependency > STRONG_DEPENDENCY
      when "Extreme"
        return dependency > EXTREME_DEPENDENCY
      else
        return false
    end
  end

  def feet_dependency_down(value)
    old_value = feet_dependency
    new_value = [old_value - value, 0].max
    feet_dependency_prompt(old_value, new_value)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Feet Dependency"] = new_value
  end
  
  def feet_dependency_prompt(old_value, new_value)
    p "old_value :" + old_value.to_s
    p "new_value :" + new_value.to_s
    if feet_dependency_level(old_value) != feet_dependency_level(new_value)
      msg = ""
      if old_value < new_value
        audio_id = "Darkness5"
        case new_value
          when EXTREME_DEPENDENCY..MAX_DEPENDENCY
            msg = "Your subconscious addiction to \\n[13] feet has deepened\ninto \\C[6]extreme dependence\\C[0]..."
          when STRONG_DEPENDENCY..EXTREME_DEPENDENCY
            msg = "Your desire for \\n[13]'s feet has intensified\ninto a \\C[6]strong addiction\\C[0]..."
          when MILD_DEPENDENCY..STRONG_DEPENDENCY
            msg = "You've developed an \\C[6]unconscious desire\\C[0]\\nfor \\n[13]'s feet..."
        end
      else
        audio_id = "Item3"
        case new_value
          when STRONG_DEPENDENCY..EXTREME_DEPENDENCY
            msg = "Your dependence on \\n[13]'s feet has \\C[6]lessened\\C[0]..."
                + "\\nBut your desire to sniffing them remains \\C[6]strong\\C[0]..."
          when MILD_DEPENDENCY..STRONG_DEPENDENCY
            msg = "Your addiction to \\n[13]'s feet has \\C[6]lessened\\C[0]!"
                + "\\nBut you still feel some \\C[6]temptation\\C[0]..."
          when 0..MILD_DEPENDENCY
            msg = "You've escaped your dependency on \\n[1]'s feet!"
        end
      end
      heartbeat
      RPG::SE.new(audio_id, 80, 100).play
      $game_message.background = 1 #Koda
      $game_message.add(msg)
    end
  end
end
#---------------------------------------------------------------------#
# Override 
#---------------------------------------------------------------------#
=begin
class Scene_Base
  unless $@
    alias swan_start start
  end
  
  def start
    swan_start
    Swan::MAP_ID.each do |id|
      if $game_map.map_id == id
        $swan ||= Swan.new
        Fiber.new {
          $swan.cross_map_on("Place Actor")
          $swan.cross_map_on("Tint Screen")
          $swan.reset_map
          $game_switches[82] = false
          $game_switches[83] = false
          $game_switches[84] = false
        }.resume
      end
    end
  end
end
=end

============= SCRIPT 261: > Battle =============
#=======================================================================#
# This script contains all the functions used in the Swan and Crow story
#=======================================================================#
class Game_Swan < Game_Interpreter
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Battle Mode : First Encounter, 
  # Potion Status : Clean , Dizzy(0-2),
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :battle_mode, :status, :potion_list, :poison_quota, :active_poison
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Controls the battle flow
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def battle
    case @battle_mode
      when "First Encounter" then first_encounter_battle
      when "Prelude Battle(1)" then prelude_battle_1
      when "Prelude Battle(2)" then prelude_battle_2
      when "Episode2 Battle" then episode_2_battle
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # First Encounter with Dr. Swan
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def first_encounter_battle
    if turn_no > 4 || low_in_health?
      trigger "William Interrupt"
    elsif turn_no % 3 == 0 && turn_no != 0
      call_event(34, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    else
      call_event(33, 1, MAP_ID[0]) #WaterMagic1
    end
    turn_passed
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Prelude Battle with Dr. Swan
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def prelude_battle_1
    p "Start of turn " + turn_no.to_s + "."
    if turn_no % 3 == 0 && turn_no != 0 && !@potion_list.empty?
      #Dr.Swan use potion on herself
      use_potion
    else
      #water magic
      call_event(33, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
    p "End of Dr.Swan turn."
    pose_switch
    turn_passed
  end
  
  def prelude_battle_2
    if poison_condition_met?("Dizzy")
      call_event(35, 1, MAP_ID[0]) #Use Poison
    elsif @status == "Peek"
      #skip turn
      turn_passed
      return
    elsif turn_no % 3 == 0 && turn_no != 0 && !@potion_list.empty?
      use_potion #Use potion
    else
      call_event(33, 1, MAP_ID[0]) #Water magic
    end
    pose_switch
    turn_passed
    warm_up_turn
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Switch a hint pose
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pose_switch
    pic_id = ""
    case @battle_mode
      when "Prelude Battle(1)"
        if turn_no % 3 == 2 && turn_no != 0 && !@potion_list.empty?
          pic_id = "Swan/Unmasked/Ready1"
        end
      when "Prelude Battle(2)"
        if turn_no % 3 == 2 && turn_no != 0 && !@potion_list.empty?
          if @status.include?("Dizzy")
            pic_id = "Swan/Poison1/Ready1"
          elsif 
            pic_id = "Swan/Masked/Ready1"
          end
        end
    end
    unless pic_id == ""
      pic_change(pic_id)
    end
    wind1
    flash_battler
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Play the sound effect of Wind1
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def wind1
    RPG::SE.new("Wind1", 80, 100).play
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Trigger before the battle starts
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#  
  def battle_initiate
    update_off
    $data_skills[346].damage.element_id = 6 # Make attack Water-Ele
    reset_skill_usetime
    @status = "Clean"
    @stance = "Masked"
    $swan.way_to_lose=""
    case @battle_mode
      when "First Encounter"
        call_event(39, 1, MAP_ID[0])
        turn_passed
        return
      when "Prelude Battle(1)"
        call_event(39, 2, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Prelude Battle(2)"
        call_event(39, 3, MAP_ID[0])
        return_idle
        reset_temperature
        draw_thermometer
        reset_peek
      when "Episode2 Battle"
        call_event(184, 1, MAP_ID[0])
        episode_2_battle_initiate
        return_idle
        reset_temperature
        draw_thermometer
        temperature_rise($swan.sublvl * 10) if sublvl > 0 #Koda
        reset_peek
    end
    prepare_potion
    reset_poison
    @status = "Clean"
    turn_passed
  end
  
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Trigger after you lose the battle
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------# 
  def lose_battle
    erase_thermometer
    erase_potion
    case @battle_mode
      #-----------------------------------------------------------------#
      # Handles losing in first encounter battle
      #-----------------------------------------------------------------#
      when "First Encounter"
        call_event(43, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Prelude Battle(1)"
        call_event(43, 2, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Prelude Battle(2)", "Episode2 Battle"
        call_event(43, 3, MAP_ID[0])
    end
    end_battle_clean_up
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Trigger after you win the battle
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def win_battle
    erase_thermometer
    erase_potion
    case @battle_mode
      when "First Encounter" then call_event(42, 1, MAP_ID[0])#blank
      when "Prelude Battle(1)" then call_event(42, 2, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Prelude Battle(2)", "Episode2 Battle" then call_event(42, 3, MAP_ID[0])
    end
    end_battle_clean_up
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Clean up the variables after battle
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def end_battle_clean_up
    @potion_status = nil
    @battle_mode = nil
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Handles interruption of players move
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def interrupt
    p "Player's status is " + @status.to_s + "."
    p "Swan's stance is " + @stance.to_s + "."
    case @battle_mode
      when "Prelude Battle(2)", "Episode2 Battle"
        case @status
          when "Dizzy(1)"
            trigger "Poison(1) Counter(1)"
          when "Dizzy(2)"
            trigger "Poison(1) Counter(2)"
          when "Dizzy(3)"
            trigger "Poison(1) Counter(3)"
          when "Dizzy(4)"
            trigger "Poison(1) Hold"
            interrupted
          when "Dizzy(5)", "Poisoned"
            if @battle_mode == "Prelude Battle(2)"
              trigger "Poison(1) Counter(Random)" if rand(5) == 0
            elsif @stance != "Poison1 Post Drugged" && !@stance.include?("Potion") #Koda
              trigger "Poison(1) Counter(Random)"#call_event(72,4,33)
            elsif rand(5) == 0
              trigger "Poison(1) Counter(Random)" if rand(5) == 0
            end
          when "Drugged"
            if @stance != "Poison2 Post Drugged" && !@stance.include?("Potion") #Koda
              call_event(72,4,33)
              interrupted
            else
              trigger "Poison(1) Counter(Random)" if rand(5) == 0
            end
          when "Clean"
            if is_ethan_attacking
              case @stance
                when /Holding/ then swan_intercept_potion
                end
            end
        end
    end
  end
  
  def drugstunned?
    $game_actors[1].state?(58)
  end
  
  def post_interrupt
    case @battle_mode
      when "Prelude Battle(2)", "Episode2 Battle"
        case @status
          when "Clean"
            call_event(57, 1, MAP_ID[0]) #Fire move check
            call_event(58, 1, MAP_ID[0]) #Water move check
      end
    end
    #---
    # * Break Swan's poison
    #---
    case @battle_mode
      when "Episode2 Battle"
        episode_2_post_interrupt
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Handles when the players struggle
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def struggle
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Handles surrender
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def surrender
    case @battle_mode
      when "First Encounter" then call_event(41, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Prelude Battle(1)" then call_event(41, 2, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Prelude Battle(2)", "Episode2 Battle" then call_event(41, 3, MAP_ID[0])
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Change battler sprite inside battle
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pic_change(args)
    case $game_variables[1]
      when 11
        battler_id = 167
      end
    $data_enemies[battler_id].battler_name = args
    return if $game_troop.members[0].nil?
    $game_troop.members[0].transform(battler_id)
    $game_troop.members[0].screen_y = 416
    flash_battler
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Play the "Flash" animation on the battler
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  
  def flash_battler
    $game_troop.members[0].animation_id = 114
  end
  
  def turn_passed
    $game_variables[6] += 1
  end
  
  def low_in_health?
    $game_switches[5]
  end
      
  def turn_no
    $game_variables[6]
  end
  
  def turn_no=(args)
    $game_variables[6] = args
  end
  
  def qte_succeed?
    $game_actors[1].state?(34)
  end
  
  def reset_skill_usetime
    $ethan_skill_usetime = load_data("EthanSkillUsed.rvdata2")
    (1..30).each do |i|
      $ethan_skill_usetime[i] = 0
    end
  end
  
  def hide_battler
    pic_change("")
  end
  
  def return_idle
    case @battle_mode
      when "Episode2 Battle" 
        episode_2_return_idle
      else 
        pic_change($swan.img_folder + "Idle1")
    end
  end
  
  def img_folder
    case @battle_mode
      when "First Encounter"
        return "Swan/Masked/"
      when "Prelude Battle(1)"
        return "Swan/Unmasked/"
      when "Prelude Battle(2)"
        case @status
          when "Dizzy(0)", "Dizzy(1)", "Dizzy(2)", "Dizzy(3)", "Dizzy(4)", "Dizzy(5)", "Cummed"
            return "Swan/Poison1/"
          else 
            return "Swan/Masked/"
        end
      when "Episode2 Battle"
        case @stance
          when /Holding/ then return "Swan/Masked/"
          when /Poison1/ then return "Swan/Poison1/"
          when /Poison2/ then return "Swan/Poison2/"
          else 
            return "Swan/Masked/"
        end
    end
  end
  
  def is_ethan_attacking
    return You.attacking?
    #Deprecated
    $game_variables[15] == 1 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 3 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 5 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 6 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 7 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 16 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 17 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 18 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 19 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 20
  end	
  
  def using_fire_move?
    return You.attacking?(:fire)
    #Deprecated
    $game_variables[15] == 3 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 6 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 7 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 16 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 17 ||
    $game_variables[15] == 18 ||
    attack_with_fire_sword?
  end	
  
  def using_water_move?
    return You.attacking?(:water)
    #Deprecated
    $game_variables[15] == 20 ||
    attack_with_water_sword?
  end	
  
  def attack_with_fire_sword?
    $game_actors[1].weapons.include?($data_weapons[104]) && $game_variables[15] == 1
  end
  
  def attack_with_water_sword?
    $game_actors[1].weapons.include?($data_weapons[106]) && $game_variables[15] == 1
  end
  
  def poison_condition_met?(args)
    case args
      when "Dizzy" 
        condition1 = (low_in_health? || @temperature >= 100 )
        condition2 = (@status == "Clean" && have_poison_quota?("Dizzy") && poison_unlocked?)
        return condition1 && condition2
    end
  end

  def interrupted
    $game_switches[6] = true
  end
  
  def update_on
    $game_switches[85] = true
  end
  
  def update_off
    $game_switches[85] = false
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Use skill in a command
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def use_skill(battler_name, type, animationID, debuffType, formula, firstLineMessage, secondLineMessage = "")
    $data_skills[346].message1 = firstLineMessage
    $data_skills[346].message2 = secondLineMessage
    $data_skills[346].hit_type = 0
    $data_skills[346].damage.variance  = 20
    $data_skills[346].damage.formula = formula
    case type
      when "recover"
          $data_skills[346].scope = 11
          $data_skills[346].damage.type = 3
      when "damage"
          $data_skills[346].scope = 1
          $data_skills[346].damage.type = 1
      when "hp drain"
          $data_skills[346].scope = 1
          $data_skills[346].damage.type = 5
      when "self damage"
          $data_skills[346].scope = 11
          $data_skills[346].damage.type = 1
    end
    pic_change(battler_name) unless battler_name.nil?
    $game_troop.make_unique_names
    $game_troop.members[0].animation_id = animationID unless animationID.nil?  
    $game_troop.members[0].force_action(346, -1)          #Force Action
    BattleManager.force_action($game_troop.members[0])
    Fiber.yield while BattleManager.action_forced?
    $game_actors[1].add_debuff(debuffType, 3) if debuffType > -1
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Thermometer 
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :temperature
  def reset_temperature
    @temperature = 0
  end
  
  def temperature_rise(args)
    oldtemp = @temperature
    @temperature = [@temperature += args, 100].min
    update_thermometer if @temperature != oldtemp
  end
  
  def temperature_drop(args)
    oldtemp = @temperature
    @temperature = [@temperature -= args, 0].max
    update_thermometer if @temperature != oldtemp
  end
  
  def warm_up_turn
    case @battle_mode
      when "Prelude Battle(2)", "Episode2 Battle"
        case @status
          when "Clean"
            temperature_rise(8) #Koda
          when "Dizzy(4)"
            temperature_drop(5)
        end
    end
  end
  
  def draw_thermometer
    poisoff = (["Drugged","Poisoned","Dizzy(4)","Dizzy(5)"].include?(@status) ? 60 : 0)
    screen.pictures[30].show("Swan/Hud/MeterBase", 1, 15, 150 + poisoff, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    screen.pictures[31].show("Swan/Hud/Meter", 0, 12, 35 + poisoff, 100, (100 - @temperature), 255, 0)
  end
  
  def erase_thermometer
    fade_pic(30, 0, 20, false)
    fade_pic(31, 0, 20, false)
  end
  
  def update_thermometer
    poisoff = (["Drugged","Poisoned","Dizzy(4)","Dizzy(5)"].include?(@status) ? 60 : 0)
    RPG::SE.new("Raise2", 80, 100).play
    screen.pictures[31].move(0, 12, 35 + poisoff, 100, (100 - @temperature), 255, 0 ,20)
    wait(20)
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Potion randomization
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def prepare_potion
    @potion_list = []
    potion_count.times do |i|
      case rand(3)
        when 0 then potion = "Agility Potion"
        when 1 then potion = "Rigid Body Potion"
        when 2 then potion = "Full Restore"
      end
      @potion_list << potion
    end
    draw_potion
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Draw the potion sprite on the screen
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def draw_potion
    erase_potion
    @potion_list.each_with_index do |potion_name, index|
      case potion_name
        when "Agility Potion" then potion_pic_id = "Swan/Hud/AgilityPotion"
        when "Rigid Body Potion" then potion_pic_id = "Swan/Hud/RigidBodyPotion"
        when "Full Restore" then potion_pic_id = "Swan/Hud/FullRestore"
      end
      screen.pictures[20+ index].show(potion_pic_id, 1, 530 - (index * 25), 280, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Erase the potion sprites on the screen
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def erase_potion
    (20..(20+potion_count - 1)).each do |i|
      erase_pic(i)
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Calculate how many potions can Dr Swan have in a battle
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def potion_count
    3 + (toxicology_level* 1)
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # When Dr Swan use potion
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def use_potion
    case @potion_list[0]
      when "Agility Potion" then call_event(40, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Rigid Body Potion" then call_event(40, 2, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Full Restore" then call_event(40, 3, MAP_ID[0])
    end
    @potion_list.delete_at(0)
    draw_potion
  end
  
  def reset_poison
    case @battle_mode
      when "Episode2 Battle"
        episode_2_reset_poison
      else
        @poison_quota = {
          "Dizzy" => 1,
        }
        @active_poison = ""
    end
  end
  
  def use_poison(poison)
    @poison_quota.each do |poison_name, quota|
      if poison == poison_name
        #quota -= 1
        @poison_quota[poison_name] = @poison_quota[poison_name] - 1
      end
      p "The poison " + poison_name.to_s + " has " + quota.to_s + " quota left."
    end
    @active_poison = poison
  end
  
  def have_poison_quota?(poison)
    @poison_quota.each do |poison_name, quota|
      if poison == poison_name
        p "Poison " + poison_name.to_s + " has " + quota.to_s + " quota."
        return quota > 0
      end
    end
    return false
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Battle skillslot related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  SKILLSLOT_ID = 348
  
  def name_skill(skill_name, skill_icon_index)
    $data_skills[SKILLSLOT_ID].name = skill_name
    $data_skills[SKILLSLOT_ID].icon_index = skill_icon_index
  end
  
  def custom_skill
    case $data_skills[SKILLSLOT_ID].name
      when "Stare" then call_event(79, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # End of a turn
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def turn_end
    case @battle_mode
      when "Prelude Battle(2)" then prelude_battle_2_turn_end
      when "Episode2 Battle" then episode_2_turn_end
    end
  end
  
  def prelude_battle_2_turn_end
    if peek_feet_condition_met? && rand(100) < chance_of_peeking
      call_event( 78, 1, MAP_ID[0] )
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Peek Feet Mechanic related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :peek_time
  
  def peek_feet_condition_met?
    return false if @stance != "Masked"
    return false if @peek_time >= 3
    return false if $game_actors[1].state?(86)
    @status == "Clean" && feet_dependency_level != "Clean"
  end
  
  MAXIMUM_CHANCE_OF_PEEKING = 30.0
  CHANCE_OF_PEEKING_MULTIPLIER = 1.0
  
  def chance_of_peeking
    max = MAXIMUM_CHANCE_OF_PEEKING
    p "feet_dependency: " + feet_dependency.to_s
    d = feet_dependency.to_f
    chance = max * ( (d - 2.0) / (10.0 + d) )
    chance = chance * CHANCE_OF_PEEKING_MULTIPLIER
    p "chance: " + chance.to_s
    chance.ceil
  end
  
  def reset_peek
    @peek_time = 0
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Record how you lose a battle
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def way_to_lose=(args)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Way to Lose"] = args
  end
  
  def way_to_lose
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Way to Lose"]
    #way = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Way to Lose"]
    #way = "Generic" if way.empty?
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Clean up after battle ends
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def battle_clean
    case @battle_mode
      when "Prelude Battle(2)", "Episode2 Battle"
        reset_peek
        @status = nil
        $game_actors[1].forget_skill(Game_Swan::SKILLSLOT_ID) 
    end
  end
end
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------#
# Record Certain item usage
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------#
class Game_Battler < Game_BattlerBase

  alias :swan_use_item use_item
	
  def use_item(item)
    swan_use_item(item)
    if ($game_variables[1] == 11)
      #-----------------------------------------------------------------#
      # Item handles
      #-----------------------------------------------------------------#
      if item.is_a?(RPG::Item) # Enemy is Dr.Swan
        if (item.id == 121) # Antidode(DarkGreen)
          #Fiber.new{$swan.use_antidode}.resume
          if $swan.status.include? "Dizzy"
            use_dark_green_antidode
          else
            fail_to_use_antidode
          end
        end
      #elsif item.is_a?(RPG::Skill)
        #if (item.id == 161)
          #p "Player is using Ember!"
        #end
      end
    end
  end
  
end

============= SCRIPT 263: > Cinematics =============
