    # Gavin Related
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    "Gavin Interact" => [49, 1, MAP_ID[0]],
    "Gavin Chat" => [50, 1, MAP_ID[0]],
    "Gavin Chat Prelude(0)" => [51, 1, MAP_ID[0]],
    "Gavin Chat Prelude(1)" => [51, 2, MAP_ID[0]],
    "Gavin Relationship Up(1)" => [67, 1, MAP_ID[0]],
    "Gavin Relationship Check" => [69, 1, MAP_ID[0]],
    }
  
  def trigger(id)
    CHAT_EVENT_ID.each do |name, event_id|
      if name == id
        call_event(event_id[0], event_id[1], event_id[2])
      end
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Interaction with Gavin in differenct circumstances
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  
  def william_interact
    call_event(48, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  
  def william_chat
    call_event(53, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  
  def william_chat_prelude
    call_event(52, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Relationship
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def relationship(char_id)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Relationship"][char_id]
  end
  
  def set_relationship(char_id, value)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Relationship"][char_id] = value
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Cinematics On Off Switches
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def sleep_walk_start
    case $game_map.map_id
      when MAP_ID[0] then $game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[0], 63, 'A']] = true
      when MAP_ID[1] then $game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[1], 47, 'A']] = true
    end
  end
  
  def sleep_walk_stop
    $game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[0], 63, 'A']] = false
    $game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[1], 47, 'A']] = false
  end
end

============= SCRIPT 264: > Pictures =============
#=======================================================================#
# This script contains functions used to manipulate images
#=======================================================================#
class Game_Swan < Game_Interpreter
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Show static pictures ( Without any animation )
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def draw_pic(*args) #0:index 1:img_id 2:opacity 3:pos_x 4:pos_y 5:anchor
    screen.pictures[args[0]].show(args[1], args[5], args[3], args[4], 100, 100, args[2], 0)
	end
  
  def show_pic(args, index = PIC_INDEX)
    @loop_mode = :static
    screen.pictures[index].show(args, 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0)
  end
  
  def stamp_pic(args, index = PIC_INDEX )
    screen.pictures[index].show(args, 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    6.times do
      game_screen.pictures[index].move(1, 270, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 2)
      wait(2)
      game_screen.pictures[index].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 2)
      wait(2)
    end
  end
  
  def quick_fade_out_pic(index = PIC_INDEX)
		fade_pic(index, 0, 20, false)
	end
  
  attr_accessor :loop_mode, :breathe_frame, 
  :pic_id, :new_pic_id,
  :pic_opacity, :new_pic_opacity, 
  :pic_target_opacity, :new_pic_target_opacity, 
  :pic_opacity_duration, :new_pic_opacity_duration,
  :pic_scale_y, :pic_idle
  
	def fade_in_pic(image_name)
    @pic_id = image_name
    
    #Koda
    old_image = screen.pictures[PIC_INDEX].name
    either_mc = image_name.include?("mc") || old_image.include?("mc")
    both_mc = image_name.include?("mc") && old_image.include?("mc")
    fullvis = screen.pictures[PIC_INDEX].opacity == 255 && @loop_mode == :breathe
    
    #Koda
    pic_breathe_initialize unless fullvis && (!either_mc || both_mc) 
    #pic_breathe_initialize unless screen.pictures[PIC_INDEX].opacity == 255 #Koda
    #pic_breathe_initialize
		@loop_mode = :breathe
		pic_loop_on
	end
	
	def fade_out_pic
		@pic_target_opacity = 0
    @pic_opacity_duration = @new_pic_opacity_duration = 30
    @new_pic_target_opacity = 0
	end
	
	def cross_fade_pic(image_name)
    @new_pic_id = image_name
    @pic_opacity = 255
    @new_pic_opacity = 0
    @new_pic_target_opacity = 255
    @new_pic_opacity_duration = 30
	end
	
	def pic_loop_on
    $game_switches[84] = true
    wait(10)
    @pic_idle = 0
  end
  
	def pic_loop_off
    $game_switches[84] = false
    wait(10)
  end
	
	def pic_loop
		@loop_mode ||= :breathe
		case @loop_mode
			when :breathe
        pic_breathe
      when :static
        wait(10)
    end
    pic_idle_check
	end
	
  BREATHE_FRAME_PER_LOOP = 80.0
  
  def pic_breathe
    @breathe_frame += Math::PI / BREATHE_FRAME_PER_LOOP
    scaling_factor = Math.sin(@breathe_frame)
    @pic_scale_y = 100.0 + scaling_factor
    pic_breathe_calculate_opacity
    pic_breathe_check_subsitute
    pic_breathe_update_pic
    wait(1)
	end
  
  def pic_breathe_calculate_opacity
    if @pic_opacity_duration > 0
      @pic_opacity = (@pic_opacity * (@pic_opacity_duration - 1) + @pic_target_opacity) / @pic_opacity_duration
      @pic_opacity_duration = [@pic_opacity_duration - 1, 0].max
    end
    if !@new_pic_id.empty? && @new_pic_opacity_duration > 0
      @new_pic_opacity = (@new_pic_opacity * (@new_pic_opacity_duration - 1) + @new_pic_target_opacity) / @new_pic_opacity_duration
      @new_pic_opacity_duration = [@new_pic_opacity_duration - 1, 0].max
    end
  end
  
  def pic_breathe_update_pic
    screen.pictures[PIC_INDEX].show(@pic_id, 2, 272, 416, 100, @pic_scale_y, @pic_opacity, 0)
    return if @new_pic_id.empty?
    screen.pictures[NEW_PIC_INDEX].show(@new_pic_id, 2, 272, 416, 100, @pic_scale_y, @new_pic_opacity, 0)
  end
  
  def pic_breathe_check_subsitute
    if @new_pic_opacity >= 255
      @pic_id = @new_pic_id
      @new_pic_id = ""
      @new_pic_opacity = 0
      @pic_opacity_duration = @new_pic_opacity_duration = 0 
      erase_pic(NEW_PIC_INDEX)
    end
  end
  
  def pic_breathe_initialize
    @pic_opacity = 0
    @pic_target_opacity = 255
    @pic_opacity_duration = 20
    @breathe_frame = 0.0
    @pic_scale_y = 100
    
    @new_pic_id = ""
    @new_pic_opacity = 0
    @new_pic_target_opacity = 0
    @new_pic_opacity_duration = 0
  end
  
  def pic_idle_check
    if @pic_opacity <= 0 && @new_pic_opacity <= 0
      @pic_idle += 1
    else
      @pic_idle = 0
    end
    
    if @pic_idle >= 10 
      pic_loop_off
    end
  end
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------#
# Miscellous picture effects
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------#
	def pic_sniff(index = PIC_INDEX)
    anim_pic(index, 115)
  end
  
	def pic_cum(index = PIC_INDEX)
    anim_pic(index, 156)
  end
    
  def pic_shake
    i = PIC_INDEX
		pic_loop_off
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 104, 100, 255, 0, 7);wait(7)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 106, 255, 0, 4);wait(4)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 102, 100, 255, 0, 3);wait(3)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 102, 255, 0, 3);wait(3)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 101, 100, 255, 0, 2);wait(2)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 101, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)	
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 101, 100, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)	
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)
		pic_loop_on
		wait(10)
	end
		
	def tilt_pic(args)
		draw_pic(4, args, 0, 272, 416, 1)
		screen.pictures[4].move(1, 272, 0, 100, 100, 255, 0, 200)
		wait(200)
		fade_pic(4,0,20,false)
	end
 end
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------#
# Overload the origin system of Pictures
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------#
class Sprite_Picture < Sprite
  
  def update_origin
    return if @picture.name.empty?
    case @picture.origin
      when 0
        self.ox = 0
        self.oy = 0
      when 1
        self.ox = bitmap.width / 2
        self.oy = bitmap.height / 2
      when 2
        self.ox = bitmap.width / 2
        self.oy = bitmap.height
    end
  end
end
============= SCRIPT 265: > Cut-In Pictures =============
#=======================================================================#
# This script contains functions used to manipulate cut-in images
#=======================================================================#
class Game_Swan < Game_Interpreter
  
  TOGGLE_SWITCH_ID = 82
  CIP_INDEX = 29
  FADE_IN_DURATION = 20
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Turning the cut-in image update event on and off
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def cut_in_pic_on
    $game_switches[TOGGLE_SWITCH_ID] = true
  end
  def cut_in_pic_off
    $game_switches[TOGGLE_SWITCH_ID] = false
  end
  
  attr_accessor :cip_pic_id, 
  :cip_opacity, :cip_pos_x, :cip_pos_y, :cip_scale_x, :cip_scale_y,
  :cip_target_opacity,  
  :cip_duration, :cip_keyframe, :cip_current_keyframe
  :cip_loop_mode
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Function to call
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Fade in a picture
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def insert_pic(pic_id)
    cut_in_pic_on
    @cip_pic_id = pic_id
    cip_set_default
    @cip_target_opacity = 255
    cip_reset_duration
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Sniff
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def cip_sniff(index = CIP_INDEX)
    anim_pic(index, 115)
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Breathe
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def insert_breathe_cip(pic_id)
    insert_pic(pic_id)
    cip_reset_keyframe
    @cip_keyframe = [100.0, 100.3, 100.5, 100.8, 101.0, 101.3, 101.5, 101.8, 102.0, 102.3, 102.5, 102.8, 103.0, 103.3, 103.5, 103.8, 104.0, 104.3, 104.5, 104.8, 105.0]
    @cip_keyframe = @cip_keyframe + @cip_keyframe.reverse
    @cip_loop_mode = "Breathe"
  end
  
  def breathe_cip_update
    @cip_scale_x = @cip_keyframe[cip_current_keyframe]
    @cip_scale_y = @cip_keyframe[cip_current_keyframe]
    cip_next_keyframe
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Shake
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def insert_shake_cip(pic_id)
    insert_pic(pic_id)
    cip_reset_keyframe
    @cip_keyframe = [272.0, 271.0, 270.0, 271.0]
    @cip_loop_mode = "Shake"
  end
  
  def cross_fade_shake_cip(pic_id)
    @cip_pic_id = pic_id
    cip_reset_keyframe
    @cip_keyframe = [272.0, 271.0, 270.0, 271.0]
    @cip_loop_mode = "Shake"
  end
  
  def shake_cip_update
    @cip_pos_x = @cip_keyframe[cip_current_keyframe]
    cip_next_keyframe
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Jelly
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def insert_jelly_cip(pic_id)
    insert_pic(pic_id)
    cip_reset_keyframe
    @cip_keyframe = [[100.0, 100.0], [101.0, 100.0], [102.0, 100.0], [103.0, 100.0], [104.0, 100.0], [105.0, 100.0], [106.0, 100.0], [107.0, 100.0], 
    [108.0, 100.0], [109.0, 100.0], [110.0, 100.0], [108.6, 101.0], [107.1, 102.0], [105.7, 103.0], [104.3, 104.0], [102.9, 105.0], [101.4, 106.0], 
    [100.0, 107.0], [100.8, 105.6], [101.6, 104,2], [102.4, 102.8], [103.2, 101.4], [104.0, 100.0], [103.0, 100.8], [102.0, 101.5], [101.0, 102.3], 
    [100.0, 103.0], [100.4, 101.5], [101.0, 100.0]]
    8.times do
      @cip_keyframe << [100.0, 100.0]
    end
    @cip_loop_mode = "Jelly"
  end
  
  def jelly_cip_update
    @cip_scale_x = @cip_keyframe[cip_current_keyframe][0]
    @cip_scale_y = @cip_keyframe[cip_current_keyframe][1]
    cip_next_keyframe
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Fade out the cut in picture
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def fade_out_cip
    @cip_target_opacity = 0
    cip_reset_duration
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Default variables
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def cip_set_default
    cip_reset_opacity
    cip_reset_pos
    cip_reset_scale
    cip_reset_target  
  end
  
  def cip_reset_opacity
    @cip_opacity = 0
  end
  
  def cip_reset_pos
    @cip_pos_x = 272
    @cip_pos_y = 208
  end
  
  def cip_reset_scale
    @cip_scale_x = 100
    @cip_scale_y = 100
  end
  
  def cip_reset_target
    @cip_target_opacity = @cip_opacity
  end
  
  def cip_reset_keyframe
    @cip_current_keyframe = 0
  end
  
  def cip_reset_duration
    @cip_duration = FADE_IN_DURATION
  end
  
  def cip_next_keyframe
    @cip_current_keyframe += 1
    @cip_current_keyframe = 0 if @cip_current_keyframe >= @cip_keyframe.count
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Update
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def cip_update
    breathe_cip_update if @cip_loop_mode == "Breathe"
    shake_cip_update if @cip_loop_mode == "Shake"
    jelly_cip_update if @cip_loop_mode == "Jelly"
    unless @cip_duration == 0
      @cip_opacity = (@cip_opacity * (@cip_duration - 1) + @cip_target_opacity) / @cip_duration
      @cip_duration = [@cip_duration -= 1, 0].max
    end
    screen.pictures[CIP_INDEX].show(@cip_pic_id, 1, @cip_pos_x, @cip_pos_y, @cip_scale_x, @cip_scale_y, @cip_opacity, 0)
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
end
============= SCRIPT 266: > Screen FX =============
class Game_Swan < Game_Interpreter
  
  SCREEN_FX_IMG_INDEX = 16
  
  attr_accessor :screen_fx_id
  def screen_fx_update
    return if @screen_fx_id.nil?
    case @screen_fx_id
      when "Foggy Border" then call_event(76, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
  end
  
  def foggy_border_on
    @screen_fx_id = "Foggy Border" 
    $game_switches[83] = true
    
  end
  
  def foggy_border_off
    $game_switches[83] = false
    @screen_fx_id = "" 
    screen_fx_clean
  end
  
  def screen_fx_clean
    erase_pic(SCREEN_FX_IMG_INDEX)
  end
  
end
============= SCRIPT 267: > Ping Pong Game =============
#=======================================================================#
# This script contains functions used to do the ping pong mini game
#=======================================================================#
class Game_Swan < Game_Interpreter
  
  attr_accessor :pp_status, :pp_time, :pp_arousal, :pp_fail_count, :pp_succeed_count,
  :pp_cursor_pos, :pp_cursor_target_pos, :pp_anim, :pp_frame_num, :pp_tolerance,
  :pp_speed, :pp_duration,
  :pp_id, :pp_anim_type
  
  AROUSAL_LIMIT = 4
  INITIAL_SPEED = 50
  MINIMUM_SPEED = 20
  START_POS = 100
  END_POS = 445
  ACCUMULATE_TIME = 3
  
  SWEET_SPOT_WIDTH = 35
  
  PP_LOOP_ANIM_PIC_INDEX = 7
  PP_LOOP_ANIM_SFX_INDEX = 8
  PP_FACE_PIC_INDEX = 9
  PP_METER_PIC_INDEX = 10
  PP_CURSOR_PIC_INDEX = 11
  PP_CURSOR_AFTERIMAGE_PIC_INDEX = 14
  
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Score and Outcome related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  PP_LOW_SCORE = 10
  PP_MEDIUM_SCORE = 20
  PP_HIGH_SCORE = 30
  PP_FULL_SCORE = 40
  
  PP_ANIM_SETTING = {
    "Footjob" => {
      "Loop" => ["Swan/Sleepwalk/Footjob/Loop/", ["00","01","02","03","04","05","06","07","06","05","04","03","02","01"], 4],
      "Fail" => ["Swan/Sleepwalk/Footjob/Fail/", ["01","02","01","02","01","02","01","02","01","02","01","02","01","02","01","02"], 2],
      "Succeed" => ["Swan/Sleepwalk/Footjob/Succeed/", ["01","02","01","02","01","02","01","02","01","02","01","02","01","02","01","02"], 2],
    },
  }
  
  PP_ANIM_SFX_SETTING = {
    "Footjob" => {
      "Loop" => [
        ["Swan/Sleepwalk/Footjob/Loop/Fog/01", [280, 225]],
        ["Swan/Sleepwalk/Footjob/Loop/Fog/02", [230, 245]],
        ["Swan/Sleepwalk/Footjob/Loop/Fog/02", [245, 375]]
      ],
    },
  }
  
  def pp_start(pp_id, tp_id)
    @pp_id = pp_id
    @tp_id = tp_id
    pp_initialize
    $game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[1], 69, 'A']] = true
  end
  
  def pp_stop
    $game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[1], 69, 'A']] = false
  end
  
  def pp_initialize
    @pp_time = 0
    @pp_arousal = 0
    @pp_fail_count = 0 
    @pp_succeed_count = 0
    @pp_tolerance = 1
    @pp_status = "Running"
    pp_cursor_initialize
    pp_anim_initialize
    pp_initialize_sfx
    tp_initialize
  end
  
  def pp_update
    pp_draw_loop_anim
    pp_draw_face
    pp_draw_sfx
    pp_cursor_update
    pp_input_update
    pp_arousal_check
    @pp_time += 1
    tp_update
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Playing Animation
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pp_draw_loop_anim
    return unless Graphics.frame_count % @pp_anim[2] == 0
    screen.pictures[PP_LOOP_ANIM_PIC_INDEX].show(@pp_anim[0] + @pp_anim[1][@pp_frame_num], 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    pp_check_anim_reset
  end
  
  def pp_set_anim
    case @pp_anim_type
     when "Loop" then @pp_anim = PP_ANIM_SETTING[@pp_id]["Loop"]
     when "Fail" then @pp_anim = PP_ANIM_SETTING[@pp_id]["Fail"]
     when "Succeed" then @pp_anim = PP_ANIM_SETTING[@pp_id]["Succeed"]
    end
  end
  
  def pp_anim_initialize
    @pp_frame_num = 0
    @pp_anim_type = "Loop"
    pp_set_anim
  end
  
  def pp_check_anim_reset
    if @pp_frame_num >= @pp_anim[1].count - 1
      @pp_frame_num = 0
      unless @pp_anim_type == "Loop"
        @pp_anim_type = "Loop"
        pp_set_anim
      end
    else
      @pp_frame_num += 1
    end
  end
  
  def pp_fail_anim
    @pp_frame_num = 0
    @pp_anim_type = "Fail"
    pp_set_anim
  end
  
  def pp_succeed_anim
    @pp_frame_num = 0
    @pp_anim_type = "Succeed"
    pp_set_anim
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Drawing the screen effects
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :pp_sfx_list, :pp_sfx_index,
  :pp_sfx_pic_id, :pp_sfx_pos, 
  :pp_sfx_scale, :pp_sfx_target_scale,
  :pp_sfx_opacity, :pp_sfx_target_opacity,
  :pp_sfx_duration
  
  PP_SFX_TARGET_SCALE = 150
  PP_SFX_DURATION = 60
  
  def pp_draw_sfx
    return if @pp_sfx_list.nil? || pp_sfx_duration <= 0
    @pp_sfx_scale = (@pp_sfx_scale * (@pp_sfx_duration - 1) + @pp_sfx_target_scale) / @pp_sfx_duration
    @pp_sfx_opacity = (@pp_sfx_opacity * (@pp_sfx_duration - 1) + @pp_sfx_target_opacity) / @pp_sfx_duration
    screen.pictures[PP_LOOP_ANIM_SFX_INDEX].show(@pp_sfx_pic_id , 1, @pp_sfx_pos[0], @pp_sfx_pos[1], @pp_sfx_scale, @pp_sfx_scale, @pp_sfx_opacity, 0)
    pp_check_sfx_end
  end
  
  def pp_initialize_sfx
    return if PP_ANIM_SFX_SETTING[@pp_id][@pp_anim_type].nil?
    @pp_sfx_list = PP_ANIM_SFX_SETTING[@pp_id][@pp_anim_type]
    p @pp_sfx_list
    @pp_sfx_index = 0
    pp_reset_sfx
  end
  
  def pp_reset_sfx
    @pp_sfx_pic_id = @pp_sfx_list[@pp_sfx_index][0]
    @pp_sfx_pos = @pp_sfx_list[@pp_sfx_index][1]
    @pp_sfx_scale = 100
    @pp_sfx_target_scale = PP_SFX_TARGET_SCALE
    @pp_sfx_opacity = 255
    @pp_sfx_target_opacity = 0
    @pp_sfx_duration = PP_SFX_DURATION
  end
  
  def pp_check_sfx_end
    if @pp_sfx_opacity <= 10
      pp_next_sfx_index
      pp_reset_sfx
    else
      @pp_sfx_duration -= 1
    end
  end
  
  def pp_next_sfx_index
    if @pp_sfx_index == @pp_sfx_list.count - 1
      @pp_sfx_index = 0
    else
      @pp_sfx_index += 1
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Drawing the hud
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pp_draw_meter
    RPG::SE.new("Wind1", 80, 100).play
    screen.pictures[PP_METER_PIC_INDEX].show("Swan/Hud/PingPong/Meter1", 1, 272, 300, 100, 100, 0, 0)
    screen.pictures[PP_METER_PIC_INDEX].move(1, 272, 300, 100, 100, 255, 0 , 30)
    wait(30)
  end
  
  def pp_show_cursor
    RPG::SE.new("Sword1", 80, 100).play
    screen.pictures[PP_CURSOR_PIC_INDEX].show("Swan/Hud/PingPong/Cursor1", 1, 100, 303, 100, 100, 0, 0)
    screen.pictures[PP_CURSOR_PIC_INDEX].move(1, 100, 303, 100, 100, 255, 0 , 20)
    wait(20)
    3.times do
      screen.pictures[PP_CURSOR_PIC_INDEX].start_tone_change(Tone.new(255, 255, 255, 0), 10)
      wait(10)
      screen.pictures[PP_CURSOR_PIC_INDEX].start_tone_change(Tone.new(0, 0, 0, 0), 10)
      wait(10)
    end
  end
  
  def pp_clean_meter
    erase_pic(PP_LOOP_ANIM_PIC_INDEX)
    erase_pic(PP_LOOP_ANIM_SFX_INDEX)
    erase_pic(PP_FACE_PIC_INDEX)
    erase_pic(PP_METER_PIC_INDEX)
    erase_pic(PP_CURSOR_PIC_INDEX)
    erase_pic(PP_CURSOR_AFTERIMAGE_PIC_INDEX)
  end
  
  def pp_clean
    pp_stop
    pp_clean_meter
    pp_clean_variables
  end
  
  def pp_clean_variables
    @pp_status = nil
    @pp_time = nil
    @pp_arousal = nil
    @pp_fail_count = nil
    @pp_succeed_count = nil
    @pp_cursor_pos = nil
    @pp_cursor_target_pos = nil
    @pp_anim = nil
    @pp_frame_num = nil
    @pp_tolerance = nil
    @pp_speed = nil
    @pp_duration = nil
    @pp_id = nil
    @pp_anim_type = nil
    @pp_face_id = nil
    @pp_face_frame = nil
    @pp_face_duration = nil
    @pp_face_opacity = nil
    @pp_face_target_opacity = nil
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Drawing the cursor
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pp_cursor_update
    pp_draw_cursor
    pp_check_cursor_pos
  end
  
  def pp_draw_cursor
    return if @pp_duration <= 0
    @pp_cursor_pos = ( @pp_cursor_pos * ( @pp_duration - 1 ) + @pp_cursor_target_pos) / @pp_duration
    screen.pictures[PP_CURSOR_PIC_INDEX].show("Swan/Hud/PingPong/Cursor1", 1, @pp_cursor_pos, 303, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    @pp_duration -= 1
  end
  
  def pp_cursor_initialize
    @pp_cursor_pos = START_POS
    @pp_cursor_target_pos = END_POS
    @pp_speed = INITIAL_SPEED
    @pp_duration = @pp_speed
  end
  
  def pp_check_cursor_pos
    if @pp_cursor_pos >= END_POS
      @pp_cursor_target_pos = START_POS
      pp_reach_end
      
    elsif @pp_cursor_pos <= START_POS
      @pp_cursor_target_pos = END_POS
      pp_reach_end
    end
  end
  
  def pp_reach_end
    call_event(70, 1, MAP_ID[1])
    pp_duration_reset
    pp_check_tolerance
  end
  
  def pp_check_tolerance
    if @pp_tolerance < 1
      @pp_fail_count += 1
      pp_arousal_handle
      pp_reset_tolerance
    else 
      @pp_tolerance -= 1
    end
  end
  
  def pp_reset_tolerance
    @pp_tolerance = 1
  end
  
  def pp_duration_reset
    @pp_duration = [(@pp_speed - (@pp_time/60).floor), MINIMUM_SPEED].max
  end
  
  def pp_draw_cursor_afterimage
    screen.pictures[PP_CURSOR_AFTERIMAGE_PIC_INDEX].show("Swan/Hud/PingPong/Cursor1", 1, @pp_cursor_pos, 303, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    screen.pictures[PP_CURSOR_AFTERIMAGE_PIC_INDEX].move(1, @pp_cursor_pos, 280, 100, 100, 0, 0 , 10)
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Checking input
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pp_input_update
    if Input.trigger?(:C)
      if pp_in_sweet_spot?
        pp_good_fx
        @pp_succeed_count += 1
        pp_reset_tolerance
        pp_arousal_handle
      else
        pp_bad_fx
        @pp_fail_count += 1
        pp_reset_tolerance
        pp_arousal_handle
      end
    end
  end
  
  def pp_in_sweet_spot?
    return @pp_cursor_pos > (544 - SWEET_SPOT_WIDTH) / 2 && @pp_cursor_pos < (544 + SWEET_SPOT_WIDTH) / 2
  end
  
  def pp_arousal_handle
    if @pp_succeed_count >= ACCUMULATE_TIME
      pp_succeed_anim
      pp_arousal_down
      pp_reset_succeed_fail
    elsif @pp_fail_count >= ACCUMULATE_TIME
      pp_fail_anim
      pp_arousal_up
      pp_reset_succeed_fail
    end
  end
  
  def pp_reset_succeed_fail
    @pp_succeed_count = 0
    @pp_fail_count = 0
  end
  
  def pp_good_fx
    anim_pic(11, 201)
    call_event(70, 2, MAP_ID[1])
    pp_draw_cursor_afterimage
  end
  
  def pp_bad_fx
    anim_pic(11, 202)
    call_event(70, 3, MAP_ID[1])
    pp_draw_cursor_afterimage
  end
  
  def pp_arousal_up
    @pp_arousal = [@pp_arousal += 1, 0].max
    pp_show_face
  end
  
  def pp_arousal_down
    @pp_arousal = [@pp_arousal -= 1, 0].max
    pp_show_face
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Checking Arousal
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pp_arousal_check
    if @pp_arousal >= AROUSAL_LIMIT
      pp_clean_meter
      pp_cum
      pp_stop
      tp_stop
    end
  end
  
  def pp_cum
    call_event(71, 1, MAP_ID[1])
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Drawing reaction face
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :pp_face_id, :pp_face_frame, :pp_face_duration, :pp_face_opacity, :pp_face_target_opacity
  PP_FACE_PIC_PATH = {
    "Footjob" => {
      "Caution" => "Swan/Sleepwalk/Footjob/Status/01",
      "Danger" => "Swan/Sleepwalk/Footjob/Status/02",
      "Insane" => "Swan/Sleepwalk/Footjob/Status/03",
    },
  }
  
  PP_FACE_SHAKE_POS_INDEX = [272.0, 271.0, 270.0, 271.0]
  
  def pp_draw_face
    return if @pp_face_duration.nil? || @pp_face_duration <= 0
    @pp_face_opacity = ( @pp_face_opacity * ([@pp_face_duration/4, 1].max - 1 ) + @pp_face_target_opacity ) / [@pp_face_duration/4, 1].max
    screen.pictures[PP_FACE_PIC_INDEX].show(@pp_face_id, 1, PP_FACE_SHAKE_POS_INDEX[@pp_face_frame], 160, 100, 100, @pp_face_opacity, 0)
    pp_check_face_life
    pp_check_face_frame
    pp_check_face_fade
  end
  
  def pp_check_face_life
    @pp_face_duration = [@pp_face_duration -= 1, 0].max
  end
  
  def pp_check_face_frame
    if @pp_face_frame >= PP_FACE_SHAKE_POS_INDEX.count - 1
      @pp_face_frame = 0
    else 
      @pp_face_frame += 1
    end
  end
  
  def pp_check_face_fade
    return if @pp_face_duration.nil? || @pp_face_target_opacity == 0
    if @pp_face_duration <= 0
      @pp_face_target_opacity = 0
      @pp_face_duration = 40
    end
  end
  
  def pp_show_face
    return if @pp_arousal < AROUSAL_LIMIT/4
    pp_set_face
    @pp_face_frame = 0
    @pp_face_duration = 40
    @pp_face_opacity = 0
    @pp_face_target_opacity = 255
    @pp_face_pos_x = PP_FACE_SHAKE_POS_INDEX[0]
  end
  
  def pp_set_face
    case @pp_arousal
      when ((AROUSAL_LIMIT*3)/4 ).ceil
        @pp_face_id = PP_FACE_PIC_PATH[@pp_id]["Insane"]
      when (AROUSAL_LIMIT/2 ).ceil
        @pp_face_id = PP_FACE_PIC_PATH[@pp_id]["Danger"]
      when (AROUSAL_LIMIT/4 ).ceil
        @pp_face_id = PP_FACE_PIC_PATH[@pp_id]["Caution"]
    end
  end
  
end
============= SCRIPT 268: > Text Pop BACKUP =============
=begin
class Game_Swan < Game_Interpreter
  
  attr_accessor :tp_bitmap, :tp_sprite, :tp_duration, 
  :tp_pos_x, :tp_pos_y, :tp_opacity, :tp_target_opacity, :tp_scale,
  :tp_msg, :tp_current_chunk, :tp_close
  
  TP_DURATION = 200
  TP_LINE_COUNT = 4
  TP_TARGET_SCALE = 1.05
  TP_BITMAP_WIDTH = 490
  TP_BITMAP_HEIGHT = Font.default_size * 4
  
  TP_MSG = {
    "Footjob" => 
      ["Unable to move, unable to think.\nLeaving you no choice but to surrender,\nBut you are not so easy to give yourself in,\nYou are a sparrow.",
      "So you struggle, you revolt,\nYou fight against that tremendous power,\nthat body warmth can bring everyone to kneel.",
      "You crenched your teeth,\n shaked your head,\n exposing that foolish struggling face of yours.",
      "But not every part of your body,\n shares that firmness of will.",
      "The black silky pantyhose feet,\n warm and smooth,\n pressed against your weakened cock.",
      "Your dripping cock is being held tight,\n pressure exerted left and right,\n having nowhere to go.",
      "Steamy and stuffy, you can imagine the thick smell\n just by merely staring at her feet.",],
      }
  
  def tp_stop
    @tp_close = true
    #@tp_duration = 40
    #@tp_target_opacity = 0
  end
  
  def tp_update
    tp_draw_message
    tp_check_close
    tp_check_next_chunk
  end
  
  def tp_check_close
    if @tp_close
      #if @tp_opacity < 10
      #  $game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[1], 44, 'A']] = false
      #  @tp_sprite.dispose
      #end
      @tp_sprite.dispose
    end
  end
  
  def tp_set_text
    @tp_pos_x = 20
    @tp_pos_y = 20
    @tp_opacity = 255
    @tp_target_opacity = 0
    @tp_scale = 1
    @tp_duration = TP_DURATION
    
    text = @tp_msg[@tp_current_chunk]
    @tp_bitmap.clear
    @tp_msg[@tp_current_chunk].each_with_index do |msg, index|
      @tp_bitmap.draw_text(0, (Font.default_size* index), TP_BITMAP_WIDTH, Font.default_size, msg, 0)
    end
    @tp_sprite.bitmap = @tp_bitmap

    tp_next_chunk
  end
  
  def tp_next_chunk
    if @tp_current_chunk <  @tp_msg.count - 1
      @tp_current_chunk += 1
    end
  end
  
  def tp_check_next_chunk
    if  @tp_duration == 0 && !tp_last_chunk?
      tp_set_text
    end
  end
  
  def tp_last_chunk?
    @tp_current_chunk == @tp_msg.count - 1
  end
  
  def tp_initialize
    @tp_duration = 0
    @tp_pos_x = 20
    @tp_pos_y = 20
    @tp_scale = 1
    @tp_opacity = 0
    @tp_target_opacity = 0
    @tp_close = false
    
    @tp_sprite = Sprite.new
    @tp_sprite.x = @tp_pos_x
    @tp_sprite.y = @tp_pos_y
    @tp_bitmap = Bitmap.new(TP_BITMAP_WIDTH, TP_BITMAP_HEIGHT)
    @tp_sprite.bitmap = @tp_bitmap
    
    @tp_current_chunk = 0
    tp_import_text
  end
  
  def tp_import_text
    @tp_msg = []
    
    TP_MSG[@pp_id].each_with_index do |msg, index|
      @tp_msg[index] = msg.split("\n")
    end
    
    p @tp_msg
  end
  
  def tp_draw_message
    return if @tp_sprite.nil? || @tp_duration <= 0 || @tp_sprite.disposed? 
    @tp_sprite.x = @tp_pos_x
    @tp_sprite.y = @tp_pos_y
    if @tp_duration <= TP_DURATION / 4
      @tp_opacity = (@tp_opacity * ( @tp_duration - 1) + @tp_target_opacity ) / @tp_duration
    end
    @tp_sprite.opacity = @tp_opacity
    @tp_scale = (@tp_scale * ( @tp_duration - 1) + TP_TARGET_SCALE) / @tp_duration
    @tp_sprite.zoom_x = @tp_scale
    @tp_sprite.zoom_y = @tp_scale
    tp_cool_down_pass
  end
  
  def tp_cool_down_pass
    return if @tp_duration == 0
    @tp_duration = [@tp_duration -= 1, 0].max
  end
end
=end

    end
    @tp_sprite.opacity = @tp_opacity
    @tp_scale = 1#(@tp_scale * ( @tp_duration - 1) + TP_TARGET_SCALE) / @tp_duration
    @tp_sprite.zoom_x = @tp_scale
    @tp_sprite.zoom_y = @tp_scale
    tp_cool_down_pass
  end
  
  def tp_cool_down_pass
    return if @tp_duration == 0
    @tp_duration = [@tp_duration -= 1, 0].max
  end
end
============= SCRIPT 270: > Button Mash Game =============
class Game_Swan < Game_Interpreter
  
  attr_accessor :bm_id, :bm_timer, :bm_mode, :bm_state,
  :bm_arousal, :bm_endurance,
  :bm_round, :bm_round_to_pass, :bm_state_change_round,
  :bm_wait_duration, :bm_anim, :bm_resist_duration,
  :bm_timer_full, :bm_successes, :bm_fails, :bm_last_outcome #Koda
  
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Initialize and toggle on off
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  BATTLE_UPDATE_SWITCH_ID = 85
  
  def bm_start(id)
    @bm_id = id
    bm_initialize
    $game_switches[BATTLE_UPDATE_SWITCH_ID]= true
  end
  
  def bm_stop
    $game_switches[BATTLE_UPDATE_SWITCH_ID]= false
  end
  
  def bm_initialize
    #@bm_id = ""
    @bm_timer_full = bm_time
    @bm_timer = @bm_timer_full
    bm_initialize_mode
    bm_endurance_reset
    bm_initialize_bm_bar
    @bm_arousal = 0 #No longer used but left here -Koda
    @bm_successes = 0 #Koda
    @bm_fails = 0 #Koda
    @bm_last_outcome = "" #Koda
    @bm_round = 0
    @bm_state_change_round = 1
    @bm_state = "Ready"
    @bm_anim_frame = 0
    bm_set_anim
    p "Finish initializing variables for button mashing game."
    p SceneManager.scene.class
  end
  
  def bm_clean
    bm_clean_pic
    bm_variables_clean
  end
  
  def bm_variables_clean
    @bm_id = nil
    @bm_timer = nil
    @bm_timer_full = nil
    @bm_mode = nil
    @bm_state = nil
    @bm_arousal = nil
    @bm_successes = nil #Koda
    @bm_fails = nil #Koda
    @bm_endurance = nil
    @bm_round = nil
    @bm_state_change_round = nil
    @bm_wait_duration = nil
    @bm_anim = nil
    @bm_resist_duration = nil
    @bm_bar_tint = nil
    @bm_anim_frame = nil
    @bm_pp_id = nil
    @bm_anim = nil
    @bm_pp_opacity = nil
    @bm_pp_pos = nil
    @bm_pp_frame = nil
    @bm_pp_duration = nil
    @bm_pp_target_opacity = nil
  end
  
  def bm_clean_pic
    erase_pic(BM_ANIM_PIC_INDEX)
    erase_pic(BM_POPUP_PIC_INDEX)
    erase_pic(BAR_BASE_PIC_INDEX)
    erase_pic(BAR_PIC_INDEX)
    erase_pic(BM_TIMER_BAR_PIC_INDEX)
  end
  
  def bm_initialize_mode
    case @bm_id
      when "Sniffing Feet" then @bm_mode = "Heel"
      else
        @bm_mode = ""
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # UI related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  BM_ANIM_PIC_INDEX = 10
  BM_POPUP_PIC_INDEX = 11
  BAR_BASE_PIC_INDEX = 12
  BAR_PIC_INDEX = 13
  BM_TIMER_BAR_PIC_INDEX = 14
  
  BM_INITIAL_ENDURANCE = 10
  BM_WAIT_DURATION = 90
  BM_ROUNDS_TO_WIN = 4
  BM_ROUNDS_TO_LOSE = 4
  
  attr_accessor :bm_bar_scale, :bm_bar_target_scale, :bm_bar_duration,
  :bm_bar_color, :bm_bar_target_color, :bm_bar_color_duration,
  :bm_timer_bar_scale, :bm_timer_bar_target_scale, :bm_timer_bar_duration
  
  def bm_initialize_bm_bar
    @bm_bar_scale = @bm_endurance
    @bm_bar_target_scale = @bm_endurance
    @bm_bar_duration = 0
    @bm_bar_color = [0, 0, 0, 0]
    @bm_bar_target_color = @bm_bar_color
    @bm_bar_color_duration = 0
    @bm_timer_bar_scale = 100 * (@bm_timer / @bm_timer_full)
    @bm_timer_bar_target_scale = 100 * (@bm_timer / @bm_timer_full)
    @bm_timer_bar_duration = 0
  end
  
  def bm_bar_update
    bm_endurance_bar_update
    bm_timer_bar_update
  end
  
  def bm_update_endurance_bar
    @bm_bar_target_scale = @bm_endurance
    @bm_bar_duration = 10
  end
  
  def bm_update_timer_bar
    @bm_timer_bar_target_scale = 100.0 * (@bm_timer.to_f / @bm_timer_full.to_f)
    @bm_timer_bar_duration = 5
  end
  
  def bm_endurance_bar_update
    return if @bm_bar_duration <= 0
    @bm_bar_scale = (@bm_bar_scale * ( @bm_bar_duration - 1 ) + @bm_bar_target_scale) / @bm_bar_duration
    screen.pictures[BAR_PIC_INDEX].show("Swan/Hud/ButtonMash/Bar1", 0, 87, 291, @bm_bar_scale, 100, 255, 0)
    @bm_bar_duration = [@bm_bar_duration - 1, 0].max
    bm_endurance_bar_color_update
  end
  
  def bm_endurance_bar_color_update
    return if @bm_bar_color_duration <= 0
    @bm_bar_color.each_with_index do |color, index|
      @bm_bar_color[index] = ( @bm_bar_color[index] * ( @bm_bar_color_duration - 1) + @bm_bar_target_color[index] ) / @bm_bar_color_duration
    end
    bar_tone = Tone.new(@bm_bar_color[0],@bm_bar_color[1],@bm_bar_color[2],@bm_bar_color[3])
    screen.pictures[BAR_PIC_INDEX].start_tone_change(bar_tone, 1)
    @bm_bar_color_duration = [@bm_bar_color_duration - 1, 0].max
  end
  
  BM_BAR_TINT_DURATION = 20
  
  def bm_bar_tint_green
    @bm_bar_target_color = [ 0, 255, 0, 0 ]
    @bm_bar_color_duration = BM_BAR_TINT_DURATION
  end
  
  def bm_bar_tint_red
    @bm_bar_target_color = [ 255, 0, 0, 100 ]
    @bm_bar_color_duration = BM_BAR_TINT_DURATION
  end
  
  def bm_bar_tint_reset
    @bm_bar_target_color = [ 0, 0, 0, 0 ]
    @bm_bar_color_duration = BM_BAR_TINT_DURATION
  end
  
  def bm_timer_bar_update
    return if @bm_timer_bar_duration <= 0
    @bm_timer_bar_scale = (@bm_timer_bar_scale * ( @bm_timer_bar_duration - 1 ) + @bm_timer_bar_target_scale) / @bm_timer_bar_duration
    screen.pictures[BM_TIMER_BAR_PIC_INDEX].show("Swan/Hud/ButtonMash/Bar2", 0, 87, 308, @bm_timer_bar_scale, 100, 255, 0)
    @bm_timer_bar_duration = [@bm_timer_bar_duration - 1, 0].max
  end
  
  def bm_show_bar_base
    RPG::SE.new("Wind3", 80, 100).play
    screen.pictures[BAR_BASE_PIC_INDEX].show("Swan/Hud/ButtonMash/Base1", 1, 272, 290, 100, 100, 0, 0)
    screen.pictures[BAR_BASE_PIC_INDEX].move(1, 272, 300, 100, 100, 255, 0, 20) 
  end
  
  def bm_show_bar
    RPG::SE.new("Wind1", 80, 100).play
    screen.pictures[BAR_PIC_INDEX].show("Swan/Hud/ButtonMash/Bar1", 0, 87, 291, 0, 100, 255, 0)
    RPG::SE.new("Up1", 80, 100).play
    screen.pictures[BAR_PIC_INDEX].move(0, 87, 291, BM_INITIAL_ENDURANCE, 100, 255, 0, 20) 
  end
  
  def bm_hide_misc_ui
    erase_potion
    erase_thermometer
  end
  
  def bm_show_misc_ui
    draw_potion
    draw_thermometer
  end
  
  def bm_show_timer_bar
    i = BM_TIMER_BAR_PIC_INDEX
    screen.pictures[i].show("Swan/Hud/ButtonMash/Bar2", 0, 87, 308, 0, 100, 255, 0)
    RPG::SE.new("Up1", 80, 150).play
    screen.pictures[i].move(0, 87, 308, 100, 100, 255, 0, 20) 
  end
  
  def bm_hide_bar
    erase_pic(BAR_BASE_PIC_INDEX)
    erase_pic(BAR_PIC_INDEX)
    erase_pic(BM_TIMER_BAR_PIC_INDEX)
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Updates
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bm_update
    p "bm_updating"
    case @bm_state
      when "Ready"
        bm_arousal_check
        bm_anim_update
        bm_pp_update
        bm_check_input
        bm_endurance_loss
        bm_bar_update
        bm_time_pass
        bm_check_outcome
      else
        p "U) Updating animation"
        bm_anim_update
        p "U) Updating Pop-up pictures"
        bm_pp_update
        p "U) Updating bars"
        bm_bar_update
        p "U) Pass one wait frame"
        bm_wait_pass
        bm_finish_wait_check
        bm_mode_change_check
    end
  end
    
  def bm_check_input
    if Input.trigger?(:C)
      bm_endurance_up(5)
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Flow control related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bm_time_pass
    @bm_timer = [@bm_timer - 1, 0].max
    bm_update_timer_bar
  end
  
  BM_MAXIMUM_TIME = 3
  BM_TEMPERATURE_MULTIPLIER = 3
  BM_HARD_MODE_MULTIPLIER = 0.5
  
  def bm_time
    max = BM_MAXIMUM_TIME
    d = feet_dependency
    t = @temperature
    dependency_factor = (d + (t/100)) / (d + 10)
    timer_in_second = max * ( 1 - dependency_factor )
    timer_in_frame = timer_in_second * 60
    if bm_hard_mode?
      timer_in_frame =(timer_in_frame.to_f * BM_HARD_MODE_MULTIPLIER).ceil
    end
    return timer_in_frame
  end
  
  def bm_hard_mode?
    case @bm_id
      when "Sniffing Feet"
        return true if @bm_mode == "Feet"
      end
      return false
  end
  
  def bm_reset_timer
    @bm_timer_full = bm_time
    @bm_timer = @bm_timer_full
    bm_update_timer_bar
  end
  
  def bm_succeed?
    @bm_endurance >= 100
  end
    
  def bm_fail?
    return @bm_timer <= 0
  end
  
  def bm_round_pass
    @bm_round += 1
  end
  
  def bm_check_outcome
    if bm_succeed? || bm_fail?
      @bm_wait_duaration = BM_WAIT_DURATION
      if bm_succeed?
        @bm_state = "Succeed" 
        #bm_arousal_down Koda
        bm_bar_tint_green
        RPG::SE.new("Item3", 80, 100).play
        bm_round_success
      else
        @bm_state = "Fail"
        #bm_arousal_up Koda
        bm_bar_tint_red
        RPG::SE.new("Buzzer1", 80, 100).play
        pic_sniff(BM_ANIM_PIC_INDEX)
        bm_round_fail
      end
      bm_set_anim
      bm_round_pass
    end
  end
  
  #Koda
  def bm_round_success
    @bm_last_outcome = "success"
    @bm_successes += 1
  end
  
  #Koda
  def bm_round_fail
    @bm_last_outcome = "fail"
    @bm_fails += 1
  end
  
  #Koda
  def bm_interval_text
    if @bm_last_outcome == "fail"
      trigger("Mash Round Fail")
      wait(1)
    elsif @bm_last_outcome = "success"
      trigger("Mash Round Success")
      wait(1)
    end
  end
  
  def bm_wait_pass
    @bm_wait_duaration = [@bm_wait_duaration - 1, 0].max
  end
  
  def bm_finish_wait_check
    if @bm_wait_duaration <= 0
      bm_reset_round
      bm_bar_tint_reset
    end
  end

  def bm_reset_round
    bm_endurance_reset
    bm_reset_timer
    @bm_state = "Ready"
    bm_set_anim
    bm_interval_text #Koda
  end
  
  def bm_arousal_check
    if @bm_successes >= BM_ROUNDS_TO_WIN #Koda @bm_arousal <= -BM_ROUNDS_TO_WIN
      #Win
      bm_win
    elsif @bm_fails >= BM_ROUNDS_TO_LOSE #Koda @bm_arousal >= BM_ROUNDS_TO_LOSE
      bm_lose
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Outcomes
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bm_win
    @bm_state = "Break"
    case @bm_id
      when "Sniffing Feet"
    end
  end
  
  def bm_lose
    case @bm_id
      when "Sniffing Feet"
        bm_hide_bar
        bm_draw_cum
    end
    @bm_state = "Cum"
    trigger("Mash Cum") #Koda
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Variables controls
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bm_endurance_up(value)
    @bm_endurance = [(@bm_endurance + value), 100].min
    bm_update_endurance_bar
  end
  
  def bm_endurance_down(value)
    @bm_endurance = [(@bm_endurance - value), 0].max
    bm_update_endurance_bar
  end
  
  def bm_endurance_loss
    if Graphics.frame_count % 20 == 0 ##Need change
      bm_endurance_down(1) 
    end
  end
  
  def bm_endurance_reset
    @bm_endurance = BM_INITIAL_ENDURANCE
    bm_update_endurance_bar
  end
  
  def bm_arousal_up
    #Currently unused, see bm_round_fail -Koda
    @bm_arousal = [(@bm_arousal + 1), 5].min
  end
  
  def bm_arousal_down
    #Currently unused, see bm_round success -Koda
    @bm_arousal = [(@bm_arousal - 1), 0].max
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Animation / Showing pictures related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :bm_anim_frame
  
  BM_ANIM_LIST = {
    "Sniffing Feet" => {
      "Heel" => {
        "Ready" => ["Swan/Addict1/Heel/Ready/", ["01","02"]],
        "Succeed" => ["Swan/Addict1/Heel/Succeed/",["01","02"]],
        "Fail" => ["Swan/Addict1/Heel/Fail/", ["01","02"]],
      },
      "Feet" => {
        "Ready" => ["Swan/Addict1/Feet/Ready/", ["01","02"]],
        "Succeed" => ["Swan/Addict1/Feet/Succeed/",["01","02"]],
        "Fail" => ["Swan/Addict1/Feet/Fail/", ["01","02"]],
      },
    }
  }
  
  def bm_set_anim
    @bm_anim = BM_ANIM_LIST[@bm_id][@bm_mode][@bm_state]
  end
  
  def bm_anim_update
    p "Checking if bm_anim is nil"
    return if @bm_anim.nil? || Graphics.frame_count % 2 != 0
    i = BM_ANIM_PIC_INDEX
    p "Setting the pic_id"
    p "@bm_anim :" + @bm_anim.to_s
    pic_id = @bm_anim[0] + @bm_anim[1][@bm_anim_frame]
    p "Drawing the anim pictures."
    screen.pictures[i].show(pic_id, 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    p "Moving on to next frame"
    bm_anim_next_frame
  end
  
  def bm_anim_next_frame
    if @bm_anim_frame >= @bm_anim[1].count - 1
      @bm_anim_frame = 0
    else
      @bm_anim_frame += 1
    end
  end
  
  def bm_show_ready_pic(id)
    case id
      when "Sniffing Feet" then pic_id = "Swan/Addict1/Heel/Ready/01"
    end
    screen.pictures[BM_ANIM_PIC_INDEX].show(pic_id, 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0)
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Pop-up pictures related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :bm_pp_id, :bm_pp_anim,
  :bm_pp_pos, :bm_pp_frame, :bm_pp_duration,
  :bm_pp_opacity, :bm_pp_target_opacity, :bm_pp_opacity_duration
  
  BM_PP_ANIM = {
    "Cum1" => [272, 271],
    "Change1" => [272],
  }
  BM_PP_DUARATION = 80
  BM_PP_FADE_IN_DUARATION = 20
  
  def bm_set_pp(id)
    @bm_pp_id = id
    @bm_pp_anim = BM_PP_ANIM[id]
    bm_pp_initialize
  end
  
  def bm_pp_initialize
    @bm_pp_opacity = 0
    @bm_pp_pos = 272
    @bm_pp_frame = 0
    @bm_pp_duration = BM_PP_DUARATION
    @bm_pp_target_opacity = 255
    @bm_pp_opacity_duration = BM_PP_FADE_IN_DUARATION
  end
  
  def bm_pp_update
    return if @bm_pp_id.nil? || @bm_pp_duration <= 0 
    i = BM_POPUP_PIC_INDEX
    @bm_pp_pos = @bm_pp_anim[@bm_pp_frame]
    
    if @bm_pp_opacity_duration > 0
      @bm_pp_opacity = (@bm_pp_opacity * ( @bm_pp_opacity_duration - 1) + @bm_pp_target_opacity) / @bm_pp_opacity_duration
      @bm_pp_opacity_duration = [@bm_pp_opacity_duration - 1, 0].max
    end
    
    if @bm_pp_duration == BM_PP_FADE_IN_DUARATION
      p "Setting back opacity"
      @bm_pp_target_opacity = 0
      @bm_pp_opacity_duration = BM_PP_FADE_IN_DUARATION - 1
    end
    
    p "Drawing the pop-up pic"
    screen.pictures[i].show(bm_pic_path + @bm_pp_id, 1, @bm_pp_pos, 208, 100, 100, @bm_pp_opacity, 0)
    bm_pp_next_frame
    @bm_pp_duration = [@bm_pp_duration - 1, 0].max
  end
  
  def bm_pp_next_frame
    if @bm_pp_frame >= @bm_pp_anim.count - 1
      @bm_pp_frame = 0
    else
      @bm_pp_frame += 1
    end
  end
  
  def bm_draw_cum
    case @bm_id
      when "Sniffing Feet"
        cum_img_id = "Swan/Addict1/Cum1"
      end
    i = BM_POPUP_PIC_INDEX
    screen.pictures[i].show(cum_img_id, 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    pic_cum(i)
    wait(200)
    fade_pic(i, 0, 20, false)
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Mode related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bm_mode_change_check
    return unless @bm_last_outcome == "fail"
    if (@bm_round >= @bm_state_change_round) && !bm_mode_changed?
      bm_mode_change
    end
  end
  
  def bm_mode_change
    p "Changing Mode."
    #RPG::SE.new("Equip1", 80, 100).play
    bm_mode_change_set
    @bm_state = "Mode Change"
    @bm_wait_duaration = 30
    #p "Drawing Pop-up picture for mode change."
    #bm_set_pp("Change1")
    #p "Finish drawing Pop-up picture for mode change."
  end
  
  def bm_mode_changed?
    case @bm_id
      when "Sniffing Feet"
        return true if @bm_mode == "Feet"
    end
    return false
  end
  
  def bm_mode_change_set
    case @bm_id
      when "Sniffing Feet" then @bm_mode = "Feet"
    end
  end
  
  def bm_pic_path
    case @bm_id
      when "Sniffing Feet"
        return "Swan/Addict1/"
    end
  end
end
============= SCRIPT 271: > Submission (Koda) =============
class Game_Swan < Game_Interpreter
  def submission
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Submission"]
  end
  
  def subcap
    return 15 if seen?("Lab Ass Worship")
    return 10 if seen?("Lab Pussy Worship")
    return 9 if seen?("Lab Deodorize")
    return 5
  end
  
  def domcap
    return 0
  end
  
  def at_sub_cap?
    return (submission == subcap)
  end
  
  def domify(amount=1)
    curr = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Submission"]
    curr -= amount
    curr = domcap if curr < domcap
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Submission"] = curr
  end

  def subify(amount=1)
    curr = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Submission"]
    curr += amount
    curr = subcap if curr > subcap
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Submission"] = curr
  end
  
  def sublvl(check=false)
    curdef = case submission
      when 10..15
        3
      when 6,7,8,9
        2
      when 3,4,5
        1
      when 0,1,2
        0
      else
        0
      end
    
    unless check
      return curdef
    else
      return curdef == check
    end
  end
end

============= SCRIPT 273: ▼ Crow - 6F South II =============
class Game_Swan < Game_Interpreter
  def formula_updated?
    $game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[1], 81, 'A']]
  end
end

class Crow < Game_Swan
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Initialize
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def initialize
    super
    initialize_variables
    $game_actors[14].change_level([$game_actors[1].level + 10, 99].min,false)
    draw_emblems if playing_crow?
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Variables read and write
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def initialize_variables
    variables = {
      "Fume Hood Completion" => 0,
      "Identity Revealed" => false, #No longer used?
      "Crow Woke Up" => false, #No longer used
      "Defeated Crow" => false, #No longer used
      "Vaccine" => false, #Essentially replaces Defeated Crow
      #-------------------------------------------------
      # Koda Additions
      #-------------------------------------------------
      "Passage Key" => false,
      "CrowPotions" => ['potion c'],
