  def post_escape_menu
    call_event(34, 2, 36)
  end
  
  def woke_action?
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Woke Action"]
  end
  
  def woke_action
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Woke Action"] = true
  end
  
  def reset_woke_action
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Woke Action"] = false
  end
  
  def broken?
    #Crow's Slave?
    seen?("Break 5") && deflvl <= 0
  end
  
  def mistress?
    return broken?
  end 
  
  def escaped?
    #Not Crow's Slave 
    vaccine? && deflvl > 0
    #seen?("Confront Swan") && deflvl > 0
  end
  
  def ex_level
    return Exlevels.level(:crow)
  end
  
  def true_ex_on
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["True EX"] = true
  end

  def true_ex_off
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["True EX"] = false
  end
  
  def true_ex?
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["True EX"]
  end
  
  def won_ex?
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Won EX"]
  end
  
  def won_ex
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Won EX"] = true
  end
  
  def wins
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowWins"]
  end
  
  def won
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowWins"] += 1
  end
  
  def losses
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowLosses"]
  end
  
  def lost
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowLosses"] += 1
  end
  
  def potion_unlocked?(which)
    # potion c, hell, hel, delta, beta, omega
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowPotions"].include?(which)
  end
  
  def unlock_potion(which)
    6.times do
      $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowPotions"].delete(false) rescue ""
    end
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowPotions"] << which if !potion_unlocked?(which)
  end
  
  def captured #$crow.captured
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Day Captured"] = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Day"]
  end
  
  def crow_day
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Day"] - $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Day Captured"]
  end
  
  def warmup?
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Warmup"]
  end
  
  def workout
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Warmup"] = true
  end
  
  def un_warmup
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Warmup"] = false
  end
  
  def stink
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Stink"]
  end
  
  def stinkify(amount=2)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Stink"] += amount
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Stink"] = 0 if $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Stink"] < 0
  end
  
  def fought_today?
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Crow Fought Today"]
  end
  
  #Koda
  def reset_mistress_actions
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowActions"] = case deflvl
      when 0; 6
      when 1; 5
      when 2; 5
      when 3; 4
      when 4; 4
      when 5; 3
      when 6; 3
    end
    draw_emblems
  end
  
  def out_of_actions?
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowActions"] <= 0
  end
  
  #Koda
  def mistress_action
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowActions"] -= 1
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowActions"] = 0 if $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowActions"] < 0
    draw_emblems
  end
  
  #Koda
  def armor_dura(slot=0)
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][slot]
  end
  
  #Koda
  def armor_repaired?
    return (armor_dura(0) >= 3 && armor_dura(1) >= 3 && armor_dura(2) >= 3)
  end
  
  #Koda
  def repair_armor
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][0] = 3 if $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][0] < 3
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][1] = 3 if $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][1] < 3
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][2] = 3 if $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][2] < 3
  end
  
  #Koda
  def equip_upgrade(which)
    case which
      when 'blade'; $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowBlade"] += 1
      when 'helm'
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][0] += 3
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][0] += 1
      when 'upper'
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][1] += 3
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][1] += 1
      when 'lower'
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][2] += 3
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][2] += 1
    end
  end
  
  #Koda
  def equip_reset(which)
    case which
      when 'blade'; $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowBlade"] = 0
      when 'helm'
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][0] = rand(2) + 1
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][0] = 0
      when 'upper'
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][1] = rand(2) + 1
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][1] = 0
      when 'lower'
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][2] = rand(2) + 1
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][2] = 0
    end
  end
  
  #Koda
  def equip_decay
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowBlade"] -= 1 if past_cap?('blade')
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][0] -= 1 if past_cap?('helm')
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][1] -= 1 if past_cap?('upper')
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][2] -= 1 if past_cap?('lower')
  end
  
  def equip_cap
    return (10 + (ex_level * 5))
  end
  
  def at_cap?(which)
    return equip_level(which) >= equip_cap
  end
  
  def past_cap?(which)
    return equip_level(which) > equip_cap
  end
  
  def equip_level(which)
    return case which
      when 'blade'; $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowBlade"]
      when 'helm'; $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][0]
      when 'upper'; $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][1]
      when 'lower'; $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][2]
      when 'armor'
        $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][0] + $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][1] + $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowFort"][2]
    end
  end
  
  #Koda
  def foodbowl
    # empty
    # kibble
    # potionc
    # hell
    # hel
    # delta
    # beta
    # omega
    # piss
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["FoodBowl"]
  end
  
  def foodbowl=(feed)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["FoodBowl"] = feed
  end
  
  def willing_to_eat?
    return case foodbowl
      when 'empty'; false
      when 'kibble'; true
      when 'potionc'; true
      when 'hell'; true
      when 'hel'; true
      when 'delta'; deflvl <= 3
      when 'beta'; deflvl <= 3
      when 'omega'; deflvl <= 3
      when 'piss'; deflvl <= 1
    end
  end
    
  def willing_to_drink?
   return case waterbowl
      when 'empty'; false
      when 'water'; true
      when 'sweat'; deflvl <= 3
      when 'piss'; deflvl <= 1
    end
  end
  
  #Koda
  def waterbowl
    # empty, water, sweat, piss
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["WaterBowl"]
  end
  
  def waterbowl=(feed)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["WaterBowl"] = feed
  end
  
  def stat_death(atk=0,dff=0,lvl=0)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["StatDeath"][0] += atk
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["StatDeath"][1] += dff
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["StatDeath"][2] += lvl
    p $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["StatDeath"]
  end

  def fume_hood_completion
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Fume Hood Completion"]
  end
  
  def fume_hood_completion_up
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Fume Hood Completion"] += 1
  end
  
  def fume_hood_completed?
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Fume Hood Completion"] >= 4
  end
  
  def woke_up
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Crow Woke Up"] = true
  end
  
  def go_back_sleep
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Crow Woke Up"] = false
  end
  
  def woke_up?
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Crow Woke Up"]
  end
  
  #Koda - Just in case
  def defeated
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Defeated Crow"] = true
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Vaccine"] = true
  end
  
  #Koda - Just in case
  def defeated?
    #$game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Defeated Crow"]
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Vaccine"] = true
  end
  
  def vaccine
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Vaccine"] = true
  end
  
  def vaccine?
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Vaccine"]
  end
  
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Event caller
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :event_id_list
  
  def event_id_list
    list = {
      "Battle" => [86, 1, MAP_ID[0]],
      "Generic Lose Battle" => [99, 1, MAP_ID[0]],
      "Armpit Punish Battle" => [129, 1, MAP_ID[0]],
      "Ass Punish Battle" => [151, 1, MAP_ID[0]],
    }
    list = list.deep_merge(boot_shine_event_id_list)
    list = list.deep_merge(@event_id_list) rescue list
    @event_id_list = list
  end
  
  def trigger(event_name)
    event_id_list.each do |name, event_id|
      if name == event_name
        call_event(event_id[0], event_id[1], event_id[2])
      end
    end
  end
  
  def before_crow_comes?
    $swan.time.include?("Prelude") || $swan.time == "Episode 2 Day Crow Comes"
  end
end

module Bowei
  module Crow
    MAP_ID = [35, 36]
    class << self
      def place_events
        case $game_map.map_id
          #--- Crow's secret hideout
          when MAP_ID[1]
            if $crow.seen?("Confront Swan")
              $game_map.events[18].moveto(22, 14)
              if $crow.broken?
                $game_map.events[63].moveto(11, 20)
              end
            end
            #if $swan.time=="Episode 2 Night"
              #if $crow.woke_up?
              #  $game_map.events[30].moveto(7, 2)
              #  $game_map.events[17].moveto(22, 14) 
              #else
              #  $game_map.events[30].moveto(23, 14) 
              #  $game_map.events[17].moveto(6, 1)
              #end
            #elsif $swan.time=="Episode 2 Day"
              #$game_map.events[30].moveto(7, 2)
              #$game_map.events[17].moveto(6, 1)
            #end
        end
      end
      
      def update_map
        case $game_map.map_id
          when MAP_ID[1]
            if $swan.time=="Episode 2 Night" && !$crow.woke_up?
              #--- ZZZ on Crow's head
              #$game_map.events[30].balloon_id = 10 if Graphics.frame_count % 60 == 0
            end
        end
      end
      
      def tint_screen
        return unless MAP_ID.include?($game_map.map_id)
        if $swan.time.include?("Day")
          $game_map.screen.start_tone_change(Tone.new(0,0,0,0), 1)
        elsif $swan.time.include?("Night")
          $game_map.screen.start_tone_change(Tone.new(-68,-68,0,68), 1)
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

class Scene_Map < Scene_Base
  alias crow_start start
  alias crow_update update
  alias crow_post_transfer post_transfer
  def start
    crow_start
    $game_switches[85] = false
    Bowei::Crow.place_events
    Bowei::Crow.tint_screen
  end
  
  def update
    crow_update
    if $pc.on_map?('santa')
      $kisswindow ||= Window_Kisses.new
      $kisswindow.update 
    end
    Bowei::Crow.update_map
  end
  
  def post_transfer
    #p "Scene_Map post_transfer"
    Bowei::Crow.place_events
    Bowei::Crow.tint_screen
    crow_post_transfer
  end
end
============= SCRIPT 274: > Pictures Related =============
class Crow < Game_Swan
  def pic_jelly(pic_index)
    i = pic_index
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 104, 100, 255, 0, 7);wait(7)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 106, 255, 0, 4);wait(4)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 102, 100, 255, 0, 3);wait(3)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 102, 255, 0, 3);wait(3)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 101, 100, 255, 0, 2);wait(2)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 101, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)	
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 101, 100, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)	
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)
	end
  
  def pic_shake(pic_index)
    i = pic_index
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 276, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 7);wait(7)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 269, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 4);wait(4)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 275, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 3);wait(3)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 270, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 3);wait(3)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 274, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 2);wait(2)
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 271, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)	
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 273, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)	
		screen.pictures[i].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)
	end
  
  def pic_flash(id=1) #pic id)
    anim_pic(id, 114)
    #return unless time
    #p time
    #value = time.include?("Night") ? 255 : 255 # 55
    #screen.pictures[id].start_tone_change(Tone.new(value, value, value, -68), 5)
    #wait(5)
    #value = time.include?("Night") ? -68 : 0
    #screen.pictures[id].start_tone_change(Tone.new(value, value, 0, value), 15)
  end
end

class Game_Picture
  alias crow_init_tone init_tone
  def init_tone
    crow_init_tone
    init_crow_battle_tone
    init_crow_room_tone
  end
  
  def init_crow_battle_tone
    return if !SceneManager.scene_is?(Scene_Battle)
    return if $game_variables[1] != 12
    return if $crow.nil?
    #p $swan.time
    #p $crow.time
    return unless $crow.time.include?("Night")
    #start_tone_change($game_troop.screen.tone, 0)
    @tone = tone_clone_amp #Koda - $game_troop.screen.tone.clone
  end
  
  def init_crow_room_tone
    return if !SceneManager.scene_is?(Scene_Map)
    #return if !Swan::MAP_ID.include($game_map.map_id)
    return if $game_map.map_id != Swan::MAP_ID[3]
    @tone = tone_clone_amp #Koda - $game_troop.screen.tone.clone
  end
end
============= SCRIPT 275: > Boot Shine =============
#=======================================================================#
# This script contains functions used inside the boot shine game
#=======================================================================#
class Crow < Game_Swan
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Events used inside the boot shine event
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def boot_shine_event_id_list
    list = {
      "Boot Shine" => [97, 1, MAP_ID[0]],
      "Boot Shine Opening" => [98, 1, MAP_ID[0]],
    }
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Variables declared
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :bs_time, :bs_service_time, :bs_dialogue_time,
  :bs_status,
  :bs_serving_count, :bs_satisfaction,
  :bs_service_id, :bs_service_list,
  :bs_face_id,
  :bs_active_msg, :bs_active_msg_raw
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Initialize variables used
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bs_initialize
    @diapool = select_diapool
    bs_initialize_time
    bs_initialize_variables
    bs_initialize_service
    bs_initialize_service_anim
    bs_initialize_face
    bs_initialize_dialogue
    bs_initialize_fade
    bs_initialize_timeout_bar
    @bs_status = "Taunt"
  end
  
  def bs_initialize_time
    @bs_time = 0
    @bs_service_time = 0
    @bs_dialogue_time = 0
  end
  
  def bs_initialize_variables
    @bs_serving_count = 0
    @bs_satisfaction = 0
  end
  
  def bs_reset_service_time
    @bs_service_time = 0
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Update related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bs_update_on
    case $game_map.map_id
      when MAP_ID[0]
        $game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[0], 100, 'A']] = true
      when MAP_ID[3]
        $game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[3], 33, 'A']] = true
    end
  end
  
  def bs_update_off
    case $game_map.map_id
      when MAP_ID[0]
        $game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[0], 100, 'A']] = false
      when MAP_ID[3]
        $game_self_switches[[MAP_ID[3], 33, 'A']] = false
    end
  end
  
  def bs_update
    bs_update_face
    bs_update_service_anim
    bs_check_input
    bs_update_highlight_box
    bs_fade_update
    bs_reward_update
    bs_update_timeout_bar
    bs_time_pass
    p "@bs_service_list: " + @bs_service_list.to_s
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Flow control
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  BS_SERVICE_LIST = ["BootShine", "LickSole", "LickBoot", "SuckHeel", "HeadBrush"]
  
  def bs_initialize_service
    @bs_service_list = Marshal.load(Marshal.dump(BS_SERVICE_LIST))
    @bs_service_list.delete("BootShine") unless (outfit == 'dojo' && !omega?) 
  end
  
  def bs_sample_a_service
    @bs_service_id = @bs_service_list.sample
    @bs_service_list.delete(@bs_service_id)
  end
  
  def bs_start
    bs_initialize
    bs_reset_service_time
    bs_sample_a_service
    bs_draw_first_frame
    bs_draw_hud
    bs_set_first_dialogue
    bs_draw_dialogue
    bs_update_on
    RPG::BGM.new("Dungeon2", 50, 100).play
  end
  
  def bs_end
    bs_update_off
    bs_clean_sprite
  end
  
  def bs_time_pass
    @bs_time += 1
    @bs_service_time += 1
    @bs_dialogue_time += 1
    bs_dialogue_timeout_check
  end
  
  def bs_phase_checker
    serve_status = ["Taunt", "Urge", "Ask Question", "Urge Question", "Respond Question", "Respond Question(Wrong)", "Answer Question"]
    reward_status = ["Reward", "Pick Up Reward", "Pick Up Gold", "Trample"]
    serve_status.each {|status| return "Serve" if status == @bs_status}
    reward_status.each {|status| return "Reward" if status == @bs_status}
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Dialogue Timeout Check
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  BS_TALKING_INTERVAL = 5 * 60
  
  def bs_dialogue_timeout_check
    if @bs_dialogue_time > BS_TALKING_INTERVAL
      case @bs_status
        when "Taunt"
          if bs_session_times_up?
            bs_serve_end
          else
            if @bs_serving_count <= 0
              bs_switch_dialogue("Urge")
              @bs_status = "Urge"
              bs_change_face("Angry")
            else
              bs_question_or_taunt
            end
          end
        when "Urge"
          if @bs_serving_count <= 0
          else
            bs_change_face("Smile")
            bs_question_or_taunt
            @bs_status = "Taunt"
          end
        when "Ask Question"
          bs_draw_answer
          @bs_status = "Answer Question"
          bs_change_face("Smile")
        when "Answer Question"
          RPG::SE.new("Decision3", 80, 100).play
          bs_answer_question
          #bs_switch_dialogue("Urge Question")
          #@bs_status = "Urge Question"
          #bs_change_face("Angry")
        when "Urge Question"
          bs_draw_question
          @bs_status = "Ask Question"
          bs_change_face("Talk")
        when /Respond Question/
          if bs_session_times_up?
            bs_serve_end
          else
            if bs_service_change_condition_met?
              bs_start_fade
            else
              bs_question_or_taunt
            end
          end
      end
      bs_reset_dialogue_time
    end
  end
  
  def bs_reset_dialogue_time
    @bs_dialogue_time = 0
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Service Change Check
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  BS_SERVICE_ROUND_INTERVAL = 10 * 60
  
  def bs_service_change
    bs_sample_a_service
    bs_draw_first_frame
    bs_set_first_dialogue
    bs_draw_dialogue
    bs_change_face("Smile")
    @bs_status = "Taunt"
    RPG::SE.new("Equip2", 80, 100).play
  end
  
  def bs_service_change_condition_met?
    @bs_service_time >= BS_SERVICE_ROUND_INTERVAL
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Dialogue Related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bs_dialogue_list
    #Gets overwritten in "> Boot Shine Dialogue"
  end 
    
  def bs_initialize_dialogue
    bs_initialize_question
    @bs_active_msg = @bs_active_msg_raw = ""
    @bs_dialogue_bitmap = [Bitmap.new(500, 24), Bitmap.new(500, 24), Bitmap.new(500, 24)]
    @bs_dialogue_sprite = [Sprite.new, Sprite.new, Sprite.new]
    @bs_dialogue_sprite.each_with_index do |i, index|
      i.x = 22
      i.y = BS_DIALOGUE_POS_Y[index]
      i.z = 100
      i.bitmap = @bs_dialogue_bitmap[index]
    end
    bs_initialize_taunt_list
  end
  
  def bs_set_first_dialogue
    @bs_active_msg_raw = bs_dialogue_list[@bs_service_id]["Start"]
  end
  
  def bs_switch_dialogue(dialogue_type)
    @bs_active_msg_raw = bs_dialogue_list[@bs_service_id][dialogue_type]
    bs_draw_dialogue
  end
  
  BS_DIALOGUE_POS_Y = [323, 348, 373]#[335, 360, 385]
  
  def bs_draw_dialogue
    bs_clean_dialogue
    @bs_active_msg = @bs_active_msg_raw.split("\n")
    @bs_active_msg.each_with_index do |msg, index|
      p "drawing text"
      p "msg: " + msg
      @bs_dialogue_bitmap[index].draw_text(0, 0, 500, Font.default_size, msg, 1)
      @bs_dialogue_sprite[index].bitmap = @bs_dialogue_bitmap[index]
    end
  end
  
  def bs_clean_dialogue
    return if @bs_dialogue_sprite.nil? || !@bs_dialogue_sprite.is_a?(Array)
    @bs_dialogue_sprite.each do |sprite|
      sprite.bitmap.clear
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Dialogue : Taunt
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :bs_taunt_list
  
  def bs_initialize_taunt_list
    @bs_taunt_list = []
  end
  
  def bs_reset_taunt_list
    @bs_taunt_list = []
    bs_dialogue_list[@bs_service_id]["Taunt"].each do |taunt|
      @bs_taunt_list << taunt
    end
  end
  
  def bs_sample_a_taunt
    bs_reset_taunt_list if @bs_taunt_list.empty?
    @bs_active_msg_raw = @bs_taunt_list.sample
    @bs_taunt_list.delete(@bs_active_msg_raw)
    bs_draw_dialogue
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Dialogue : Question
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  BS_CHANCE_OF_QUESTION = 60
  
  attr_accessor :bs_active_question_index,
  :bs_active_option, 
  :bs_highlight_box_opacity_frame,
  :bs_option
  
  def bs_initialize_question
    @bs_active_question_index = 0
    @bs_active_option = 0
    @bs_highlight_box_opacity_frame = 0
    @bs_option = ["Answer0", "Answer1", "Answer2"]
  end
  
  def bs_sample_a_question
    @bs_active_question_index = rand(3)
    bs_draw_question
  end
  
  def bs_draw_question
    question_index = @bs_active_question_index
    @bs_active_msg_raw = bs_dialogue_list[@bs_service_id]["Question"][question_index]
    bs_draw_dialogue
  end
  
  def bs_draw_answer
    @bs_option = ["Answer0", "Answer1", "Answer2"].shuffle
    @bs_active_msg_raw = ""
    @bs_active_msg_raw << bs_dialogue_list[@bs_service_id][@bs_option[0]][@bs_active_question_index]
    @bs_active_msg_raw << "\n"
    @bs_active_msg_raw << bs_dialogue_list[@bs_service_id][@bs_option[1]][@bs_active_question_index]
    @bs_active_msg_raw << "\n"
    @bs_active_msg_raw << bs_dialogue_list[@bs_service_id][@bs_option[2]][@bs_active_question_index]
    bs_draw_dialogue
  end
  
  def bs_question_or_taunt
    bs_change_face("Talk")
    if rand(100) < BS_CHANCE_OF_QUESTION
      @bs_status = "Ask Question"
      bs_sample_a_question  
    else
      @bs_status = "Taunt"
      bs_sample_a_taunt
    end
  end
  
  BS_HIGHLIGHT_BOX_PIC_INDEX = 11
  BS_HIGHLIGHT_BOX_FRAME_PER_LOOP = 60
  
  def bs_update_highlight_box
    index = BS_HIGHLIGHT_BOX_PIC_INDEX
    pic_id = "Crow/BootShine/Hud/Highlight"
    pos_y = BS_DIALOGUE_POS_Y[@bs_active_option] + 12
    if @bs_status == "Answer Question"
      @bs_highlight_box_opacity_frame += Math::PI / BS_HIGHLIGHT_BOX_FRAME_PER_LOOP
      opacity_factor = (Math.sin(@bs_highlight_box_opacity_frame)).abs
      opacity = 125 * opacity_factor
    else
      opacity = 0
    end
    screen.pictures[index].show(pic_id, 1, 272, pos_y, 100, 100, opacity, 0)
  end
  
  def bs_answer_question
    if bs_pick_the_right_asnwer? 
      bs_satisfaction_up(10)
      face = "Laugh"
      @bs_status = "Respond Question"
      RPG::SE.new("Boss_Laugh_06", 80, 100).play
    else
      bs_satisfaction_down(10)
      face = "Angry"
      @bs_status = "Respond Question(Wrong)"
      RPG::SE.new("hit_007", 80, 100).play
      bs_draw_first_frame
    end
    bs_change_face(face) 
    respond = @bs_option[@bs_active_option] =~ /Answer(\d)/ ? $1 : nil
    respond = "Response" + respond.to_s
    @bs_active_msg_raw = bs_dialogue_list[@bs_service_id][respond][@bs_active_question_index]
    bs_draw_dialogue
    bs_reset_dialogue_time
  end
  
  def bs_pick_the_right_asnwer?
    @bs_option[@bs_active_option] == "Answer2"
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Draw face
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  BS_FACE_PIC_INDEX = 38
  attr_accessor :bs_breathe_frame, :bs_face_scale_y
  
  def bs_initialize_face
    @bs_face_id = "Smile"
    @bs_breathe_frame = 0
    @bs_face_scale_y = 100
  end
  
  def bs_draw_face
    pic_id = "Crow/BootShine/Face/" + @bs_face_id rescue "Crow/BootShine/Face/Smile" 
    screen.pictures[BS_FACE_PIC_INDEX].show(pic_id, 2, 80, 310, 100, @bs_face_scale_y, 255, 0)
  end 
  
  def bs_change_face(face_id)
    @bs_face_id = face_id
  end
  
  def bs_update_face
    return if @bs_status == "End"
    begin
      @bs_breathe_frame += Math::PI / BREATHE_FRAME_PER_LOOP
    rescue
      @bs_breathe_frame = Math::PI / BREATHE_FRAME_PER_LOOP
    end
    scaling_factor = Math.sin(@bs_breathe_frame)
    @bs_face_scale_y = 100.0 + scaling_factor
    bs_draw_face
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Service Animation Related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  BS_SERVICE_PIC_INDEX = 10
  
  attr_accessor :bs_service_anim_frame, :bs_service_anim_skip_frame,
  :bs_serving, 
  :bs_active_pic_id
  
  def bs_initialize_service_anim
    bs_reset_service_anim
    @bs_active_pic_id = ""
  end
  
  def bs_reset_service_anim
    @bs_service_pic_frame = @bs_service_anim_skip_frame = 0
    @bs_serving = false
  end
  
  def bs_service_anim_list
    list = { # 0: index sequence, 1: frame interval, 2: audio play between loops
      "BootShine" => [["01","02","01","02"], 10, "Equip2"],
      "LickSole" => [["01","02","01","02"], 10, "mizu00"],
      "LickBoot" => [["01","02","01","02"], 10, "mizu00"],
      "SuckHeel" => [["01","02","01","02"], 10, "mizu00"],
      "HeadBrush" => [["01","02","01","02"], 10, "Equip2"],
      "Trample" => [["01","02","01","02"], 10, "Restrain_Lock"],
    } 
  end
  
  def bs_draw_first_frame
    folder_path = "Crow/BootShine/" + @bs_service_id + "/"
    folder_path += outfitpath
    #Wrong answer override
      folder_path = "Crow/BootShine/Trample/" + outfitpath if @bs_status == "Respond Question(Wrong)"
    img_path =  bs_service_anim_list[@bs_service_id][0][0]
    @bs_active_pic_id = folder_path + img_path
    bs_show_service_anim_pic
  end
  
  def bs_update_service_anim
    return unless bs_phase_checker == "Serve"
    return bs_draw_first_frame if !bs_serving
    folder_path = "Crow/BootShine/" + @bs_service_id.to_s + "/"
    folder_path += outfitpath
    img_path =  bs_service_anim_list[@bs_service_id][0][@bs_service_pic_frame]
    #Wrong answer override
      folder_path = "Crow/BootShine/Trample/" + outfitpath if @bs_status == "Respond Question(Wrong)"
    @bs_active_pic_id = folder_path + img_path
    bs_show_service_anim_pic
    bs_play_service_anim_audio 
    bs_service_anim_next_frame
  end
  
  def bs_play_service_anim_audio
    if @bs_service_pic_frame == 0 && @bs_service_anim_skip_frame == 0
      audio_file = bs_service_anim_list[@bs_service_id][2]
      #Wrong answer override
        audio_file = "Restrain_Lock" if @bs_status == "Respond Question(Wrong)"
      RPG::SE.new(audio_file, 80, 100).play
    end
  end
  
  def bs_show_service_anim_pic
    
    screen.pictures[BS_SERVICE_PIC_INDEX].show(@bs_active_pic_id, 1, 352, 155, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    #Koda Fullscreen Coords
    #screen.pictures[BS_SERVICE_PIC_INDEX].show(@bs_active_pic_id, 0, 0, 0, 135, 135, 255, 0)
  end
  
  def bs_service_anim_next_frame
    if @bs_service_anim_skip_frame <= bs_service_anim_wait_length
      @bs_service_anim_skip_frame += 1
    else
      @bs_service_anim_skip_frame = 0
      reach_the_last_frame = @bs_service_pic_frame >= bs_service_anim_last_frame_index
      if reach_the_last_frame
        bs_reset_service_anim
        bs_draw_first_frame
      else
        @bs_service_pic_frame += 1
      end
    end
  end
  
  def bs_service_anim_last_frame_index
    bs_service_anim_list[@bs_service_id][0].length - 1
  end
  
  def bs_service_anim_wait_length
    bs_service_anim_list[@bs_service_id][1]
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Check Input
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bs_check_input
    bs_check_serve_input
    bs_check_option_input
  end
  
  def bs_check_serve_input
    if Input.trigger?(:C)
      if !@bs_serving 
        @bs_serving = true
        bs_satisfaction_up(2)
        @bs_serving_count += 1
      end
    end
  end
  
  def bs_check_option_input
    return unless @bs_status == "Answer Question"
    if Input.trigger?(:DOWN)
      if @bs_active_option == 2
        @bs_active_option = 0
      else
        @bs_active_option += 1
      end
      RPG::SE.new("Cursor2", 80, 100).play
    end
    if Input.trigger?(:UP)
      if @bs_active_option == 0
        @bs_active_option = 2
      else
        @bs_active_option -= 1
      end
      RPG::SE.new("Cursor2", 80, 100).play
    end
    if Input.trigger?(:RIGHT)
      RPG::SE.new("Decision3", 80, 100).play
      bs_answer_question
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Satisfaction Related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bs_satisfaction_up(value)
    @bs_satisfaction = [@bs_satisfaction + value, 100].min
  end
  
  def bs_satisfaction_down(value)
    @bs_satisfaction = [@bs_satisfaction - value, 0].max
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Check if time's up, move to reward scene
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  BS_SESSION_TIME = 60 * 60
  
  def bs_session_times_up?
    @bs_time > BS_SESSION_TIME
  end
  
  def bs_serve_end
    bs_start_fade
    @bs_status = "Reward"
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Reward Fade
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :bs_fade_duration, :bs_fade_block_opacity, :bs_fade_status
  BS_FADE_BLOCK_PIC_INDEX = 39
  BS_FADE_FREEZE = 50
  BS_FADE_DURATION = 30
  
  def bs_initialize_fade
    @bs_fade_status = "Not Fading"
    @bs_fade_duration = 0
    @bs_fade_block_opacity = 0
  end
  
  def bs_start_fade
    @bs_fade_duration = BS_FADE_DURATION
    @bs_fade_block_opacity = 0
    @bs_fade_status = "Fade Start"
  end
  
  def bs_fade_update
    return if @bs_fade_status == "Not Fading"
    case @bs_fade_status
      when "Fade Start"
        @bs_fade_block_opacity = (@bs_fade_block_opacity * (@bs_fade_duration - 1) + 255)/@bs_fade_duration rescue 255
        if @bs_fade_block_opacity >= 255
          @bs_fade_duration = BS_FADE_FREEZE
          bs_fade_start_event
          @bs_fade_status = "Fade Freeze"
        end
      when "Fade Freeze"
        @bs_fade_block_opacity = 255
        if @bs_fade_duration <= 0
          @bs_fade_duration = BS_FADE_DURATION
          bs_fade_freeze_event
          @bs_fade_status = "Fade End"
        end
      when "Fade End"
        @bs_fade_block_opacity = (@bs_fade_block_opacity * (@bs_fade_duration - 1) + 0)/@bs_fade_duration rescue 0
        if @bs_fade_block_opacity <= 0
          bs_fade_end_event
          @bs_fade_status = "Not Fading"
        end
    end
    opacity = @bs_fade_block_opacity
    index = BS_FADE_BLOCK_PIC_INDEX
    pic_id = "Crow/BootShine/Hud/Fadeblock"
    screen.pictures[index].show(pic_id, 1, 352, 155, 100, 100, opacity, 0)

    @bs_fade_duration = [@bs_fade_duration - 1, 0].max
  end
  
  def bs_fade_start_event
    case @bs_status
      when "Reward"
        bs_set_fade_text
        wait(30) #Koda
        bs_clean_serve_pic
        bs_reward_start
        bs_set_score_text(0)
        wait(30) #Koda
      when /Respond Question/
        bs_service_change
    end
  end
  
  def bs_fade_freeze_event
  end
  
  def bs_fade_end_event
    case @bs_status
      when "Reward"
        @bs_status = "Pick Up Reward"
        bs_set_score_text(1)
    end
  end
  
  def bs_clean_serve_pic
    index = BS_SERVICE_PIC_INDEX
    screen.pictures[index].erase
  end
  
  def bs_set_fade_text
    bs_change_face("Satisfy")
    case @bs_status
      when "Reward"
        @bs_active_msg_raw = bs_dialogue_list["Reward"]["Fade"]
    end
    bs_draw_dialogue
  end
  
  def bs_set_score_text(args)
    bs_change_face("Talk")
    @bs_active_msg_raw = bs_dialogue_list["Reward"]["Evaluate"][bs_evaluate_score][args]
    bs_draw_dialogue
  end
  
  def bs_set_result_text
    bs_change_face("Laugh")
    @bs_active_msg_raw = bs_dialogue_list["Reward"]["Result"][bs_evaluate_score]
    bs_draw_dialogue
  end
  
  def bs_set_gold_text
    bs_change_face("Satisfy")
    @bs_active_msg_raw = bs_dialogue_list["Reward"]["Gold"]
    bs_draw_dialogue
  end
  
  def bs_evaluate_score
    result = "WorstScore"
    case @bs_satisfaction
      when (0..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[1])
        result = "WorstScore"
      when (BS_SCORE_STANDARD[1]..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[2])
        result = "OkScore"
      when (BS_SCORE_STANDARD[2]..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[3])
        result = "BestScore"
    end
    result
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Hud Related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  #BS_BORDER_PIC_INDEX = 40
  #BS_BACKGROUND_PIC_INDEX = 5
  
  def bs_draw_hud
    @bs_background_sprite = Sprite.new
    @bs_background_sprite.bitmap = Cache.picture("Crow/BootShine/Hud/Background")
    @bs_background_sprite.x = @bs_background_sprite.y = @bs_background_sprite.z = 0
    @bs_background_sprite.opacity = 200
    @bs_background_sprite.visible = true
    @bs_border_sprite = Sprite.new
    @bs_border_sprite.bitmap = Cache.picture("Crow/BootShine/Hud/Border")
    @bs_border_sprite.x = @bs_border_sprite.y = 0
    @bs_border_sprite.z = 100
    @bs_border_sprite.visible = true
    
    @bs_background_sprite.tone = tone_clone_amp #Koda
    @bs_border_sprite.tone = tone_clone_amp #Koda
  end
  
  def bs_clean_sprite
    pic_index_to_clean = [BS_CROW_PIC_INDEX, BS_ETHAN_PIC_INDEX, 
    BS_FADE_BLOCK_PIC_INDEX, BS_HIGHLIGHT_BOX_PIC_INDEX, BS_FACE_PIC_INDEX, BS_SERVICE_PIC_INDEX]
    pic_index_to_clean.each do |i|
      screen.pictures[i].erase
    end
    @bs_dialogue_sprite.each {|sprite| sprite.dispose}
    @bs_pop_up_text.dispose
    @bs_timeout_bar_sprite.dispose
    @bs_border_sprite.dispose
    @bs_background_sprite.dispose
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Timeout Bar
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bs_initialize_timeout_bar
    @bs_timeout_bar_sprite = Sprite.new
    @bs_timeout_bar_sprite.bitmap = Cache.picture("Crow/BootShine/Hud/Timebar")
    @bs_timeout_bar_sprite.x = 2
    @bs_timeout_bar_sprite.y = 409
    @bs_timeout_bar_sprite.z = 101
    @bs_timeout_bar_sprite.zoom_x = 1.0
    @bs_timeout_bar_sprite.visible = false
    
    @bs_timeout_bar_sprite.tone = tone_clone_amp #Koda
  end
  
  def bs_update_timeout_bar
    if @bs_status == "Answer Question"
      @bs_timeout_bar_sprite.visible = true
      zoom_x = 1.0 - (@bs_dialogue_time.to_f/BS_TALKING_INTERVAL.to_f)
      @bs_timeout_bar_sprite.zoom_x = zoom_x
    else
      begin 
        @bs_timeout_bar_sprite.visible = false 
      rescue 
        return
      end
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Reward related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :bs_reward_list,
  :bs_ethan_crawl_frame, :bs_ethan_pos_x, :bs_ethan_dir,
  :bs_item_icon, :bs_item_icon_bitmap
  
  BS_CROW_PIC_INDEX =  21
  BS_ETHAN_PIC_INDEX = 22
  
  BS_ETHAN_CRAWL_INTERVAL = 20
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Update related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bs_reward_start
    bs_draw_crow
    @bs_ethan_dir = "L"
    @bs_ethan_pos_x = 470
    bs_initialize_crawling_ethan
    bs_set_reward_list
    bs_initialize_item_icon
    bs_initialize_pop_up_msg
    bs_draw_item
  end
  
  def bs_reward_update
    bs_update_ethan
    bs_check_crawl_input
    bs_pick_up_check
    bs_update_pop_up_msg
    bs_draw_crow_trampling
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Drawing crawling Ethan && Crow
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bs_ethan_crawling_anim
    anim = ["01", "02"]
  end
  
  def bs_initialize_crawling_ethan
    @bs_ethan_crawl_frame = 0
    bs_draw_ethan_first_frame
  end
  
  def bs_draw_ethan_first_frame
    #Koda added outfitpath
    pic_id = "Crow/BootShine/Reward/Crawling/" + outfitpath + "L01"
    index = BS_ETHAN_PIC_INDEX
    pos_x = @bs_ethan_pos_x
    screen.pictures[index].show(pic_id, 1, pos_x, 236, 100, 100, 255, 0)
  end
  
  def bs_update_ethan
    return unless bs_picking_up_loot?
    #Koda added outfitpath
    pic_id = "Crow/BootShine/Reward/Crawling/" + outfitpath + @bs_ethan_dir + bs_ethan_crawling_anim[@bs_ethan_crawl_frame]
    index = BS_ETHAN_PIC_INDEX
    pos_x = @bs_ethan_pos_x
    screen.pictures[index].show(pic_id, 1, pos_x, 236, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    #Koda Fullscreen Coords
    #screen.pictures[index].show(pic_id, 1, pos_x, 353, 100, 100, 255, 0)
  end
  
  def bs_draw_ethan_next_frame
    if Graphics.frame_count % BS_ETHAN_CRAWL_INTERVAL == 0
      if @bs_ethan_crawl_frame < bs_ethan_crawling_anim.length - 1
        @bs_ethan_crawl_frame += 1
      else
        @bs_ethan_crawl_frame = 0
      end
      RPG::SE.new("Equip2", 80, 100).play if Graphics.frame_count % (4 * BS_ETHAN_CRAWL_INTERVAL) == 0
    end
  end
  
  def bs_picking_up_loot?
    @bs_status.include? "Pick Up"
    #return @bs_status =~ /Pick Up/ ? true : false
  end
  
  def bs_check_crawl_input
    return unless bs_picking_up_loot?
    if Input.press?(:LEFT)
      if @bs_ethan_pos_x > BS_ITEM_POS_X[0]
        @bs_ethan_pos_x -= 1
      else
        RPG::SE.new("Buzzer1", 30, 100).play
      end
      bs_draw_ethan_next_frame
      @bs_ethan_dir = "L"
    end
    if Input.press?(:RIGHT)
      if @bs_ethan_pos_x < 470
        @bs_ethan_pos_x += 1
      else
        RPG::SE.new("Buzzer1", 30, 100).play
      end
      bs_draw_ethan_next_frame
      @bs_ethan_dir = "R"
    end
  end
  
  def bs_draw_crow
    pic_id = "Crow/BootShine/Reward/Crow"
    index = BS_CROW_PIC_INDEX
    screen.pictures[index].show(pic_id, 1, 464, 147, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    #Koda Fullscreen Coords
    #screen.pictures[index].show(pic_id, 1, 464, 268, 100, 100, 255, 0)
  end
  
  attr_accessor :bs_crow_trampling_frame, :bs_crow_trampling_duration
  BS_CROW_TRAMPLE_DURATION = 240
  
  def bs_initialize_trampling_anim
    @bs_crow_trampling_duration = 0
  end
  
  def bs_crow_trampling_anim
    anim = ["01", "02"]
  end
  
  def bs_draw_crow_trampling
    return unless @bs_status == "Trample"
    @bs_crow_trampling_frame ||= 0
    screen.pictures[BS_ETHAN_PIC_INDEX].erase
    #Koda added outfitpath
    pic_id = "Crow/BootShine/Reward/Trampling/" + outfitpath + bs_crow_trampling_anim[@bs_crow_trampling_frame]
    index = BS_CROW_PIC_INDEX
    screen.pictures[index].show(pic_id, 1, 396, 147, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    bs_crow_trampling_next_frame
  end
  
  def bs_crow_trampling_next_frame
    @bs_crow_trampling_duration ||= BS_CROW_TRAMPLE_DURATION
    if Graphics.frame_count % 30 == 0
      RPG::SE.new("Restrain_Lock", 80, 100).play if Graphics.frame_count % 60 == 0
      if @bs_crow_trampling_frame < bs_crow_trampling_anim.count - 1
        @bs_crow_trampling_frame += 1
      else
        @bs_crow_trampling_frame = 0
      end
    end
    if @bs_crow_trampling_duration <= 0
      bs_reward_end 
    else
      @bs_crow_trampling_duration -= 1
    end
  end
  
  def bs_reset_crow_trample_anim
    @bs_crow_trampling_duration = BS_CROW_TRAMPLE_DURATION
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Drawing item
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  BS_ITEM_POS_X = [175, 235, 295, 355]
  BS_SCORE_STANDARD = [25, 50, 75, 100]
  
  def bs_possible_reward_list
    #list = [1, 4, 101, 102, 103, 104, 105, 115, 117, 128, 302, 303, 305, 307]
    case @bs_satisfaction
      when (0..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[0])
        list = [1, 4, 101, 102, 103, 104, 105, 115, 117, 128, 302, 303, 305]
      when (BS_SCORE_STANDARD[0]..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[1])
        list = [1, 4, 101, 102, 103, 104, 105, 115, 117, 128, 302, 303, 305]
      when (BS_SCORE_STANDARD[1]..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[2])
        list = [105, 115, 117, 128, 302, 303, 305, 306]
        list += [313, 314, 315] if rand(2) == 0
      when (BS_SCORE_STANDARD[2]..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[3])
        list = [105, 115, 117, 128, 302, 303, 305, 306]
        list += [313, 314, 315, 316, 317] if rand(2) == 0
    end
    return list
  end
  
  def bs_set_reward_list
    @bs_reward_list = []
    item_count = 1
    case @bs_satisfaction
      when (0..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[0])
        item_count = 1
      when (BS_SCORE_STANDARD[0]..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[1])
        item_count = 2
      when (BS_SCORE_STANDARD[1]..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[2])
        item_count = 3
      when (BS_SCORE_STANDARD[2]..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[3])
        item_count = 4
    end
    item_count.times do 
      @bs_reward_list << bs_possible_reward_list.sample
    end
  end
    
  def bs_initialize_item_icon
    @bs_item_icon = [Sprite.new, Sprite.new, Sprite.new, Sprite.new]
    @bs_item_icon_bitmap = [Bitmap.new(24,24), Bitmap.new(24,24), Bitmap.new(24,24), Bitmap.new(24,24)]
    @bs_item_icon.each_with_index do |sprite, index|
      sprite.x = BS_ITEM_POS_X[index]
      sprite.y = 280
      sprite.z = 100 #Just right before the fade block
      sprite.opacity = 255
      sprite.bitmap = @bs_item_icon_bitmap[index]
    end
  end
 
  def bs_draw_item
    @bs_reward_list.each_with_index do |item_index, index|
      temp_bitmap = Cache.system("Iconset")
      icon_index = $data_items[item_index].icon_index
      rect = Rect.new(icon_index % 16 * 24, icon_index / 16 * 24, 24, 24)
      @bs_item_icon_bitmap[index].blt(0, 0, temp_bitmap, rect, 255)
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Drawing pop up when item received
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#  
  attr_accessor :bs_pop_up_msg_duration
  
  def bs_initialize_pop_up_msg
    @bs_pop_up_text = Sprite.new
    @bs_pop_up_text_bitmap = Bitmap.new(200, Font.default_size)
    @bs_pop_up_text.bitmap = @bs_pop_up_text_bitmap
    @bs_pop_up_text.z = 120
    @bs_pop_up_msg_duration = 0
  end
  
  def bs_pop_up_msg(item_id)
    msg = $data_items[item_id].name.to_s + " obtained!"  
    @bs_pop_up_text_bitmap.clear
    @bs_pop_up_text_bitmap.draw_text(0, 0, 200, Font.default_size, msg, 1)
    @bs_pop_up_text.x = @bs_ethan_pos_x - 70
    @bs_pop_up_text.y = 200
    @bs_pop_up_text.opacity = 255
    @bs_pop_up_msg_duration = 30
  end
  
  def bs_pop_up_gold(gold_amount)
    msg = gold_amount.to_s + "G obtained!"  
    @bs_pop_up_text_bitmap.clear
    @bs_pop_up_text_bitmap.draw_text(0, 0, 200, Font.default_size, msg, 1)
    @bs_pop_up_text.x = @bs_ethan_pos_x - 70
    @bs_pop_up_text.y = 200
    @bs_pop_up_text.opacity = 255
    @bs_pop_up_msg_duration = 30
  end

  def bs_update_pop_up_msg
    return unless @bs_status =~ /(Pick Up|Trample)/
    return if @bs_pop_up_msg_duration <= 0 rescue return
    @bs_pop_up_text.y = (@bs_pop_up_text.y * (@bs_pop_up_msg_duration - 1) + 160) / @bs_pop_up_msg_duration
    @bs_pop_up_text.opacity = (@bs_pop_up_text.opacity * (@bs_pop_up_msg_duration - 1) + 0) / @bs_pop_up_msg_duration
    @bs_pop_up_msg_duration = [@bs_pop_up_msg_duration - 1, 0].max rescue nil
  end
  
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Collision detect
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bs_pick_up_check
    if @bs_status == "Pick Up Reward"
      @bs_reward_list.each_with_index do |item_id, index|
        if @bs_ethan_pos_x == BS_ITEM_POS_X[index]
          RPG::SE.new("Item3", 80, 100).play
          @bs_item_icon_bitmap[index].clear
          item_id = @bs_reward_list[index]
          $game_party.gain_item($data_items[item_id], 1)
          bs_pop_up_msg(item_id)
          @bs_reward_list.delete_at(index)
          bs_check_all_item_picked_up
        end
      end
    elsif @bs_status == "Pick Up Gold"
      if @bs_ethan_pos_x == 345
        bs_pick_up_gold
        @bs_crow_trampling_duration = BS_CROW_TRAMPLE_DURATION
        RPG::SE.new("Boss_Laugh_06", 80, 100).play
        RPG::SE.new("hit_007", 80, 100).play
        @bs_status = "Trample"
        bs_set_result_text
      end
    else
      return
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Pick up gold
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bs_check_all_item_picked_up
    if @bs_reward_list.empty?
      bs_draw_gold
      @bs_status = "Pick Up Gold"
      bs_set_gold_text
    end
  end
  
  def bs_draw_gold
    RPG::SE.new("Coin", 100, 100).play
    @bs_item_icon[0].x = 410
    @bs_item_icon[0].y = 280
    temp_bitmap = Cache.system("Iconset")
    icon_index = 262
    rect = Rect.new(icon_index % 16 * 24, icon_index / 16 * 24, 24, 24)
    @bs_item_icon_bitmap[0].blt(0, 0, temp_bitmap, rect, 255)
    @bs_item_icon[0].bitmap = @bs_item_icon_bitmap[0]
  end
  
  def bs_pick_up_gold
    RPG::SE.new("Item3", 80, 100).play
    @bs_item_icon_bitmap[0].clear
    coin = 0
    case @bs_satisfaction
      when (0..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[0])
        coin = 250
      when (BS_SCORE_STANDARD[0]..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[1])
        coin = 500
      when (BS_SCORE_STANDARD[1]..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[2])
        coin = 1000
      when (BS_SCORE_STANDARD[2]..BS_SCORE_STANDARD[3])
        coin = 2000
    end
    $game_party.gain_gold(coin)
    bs_pop_up_gold(coin)
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Finish
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def bs_reward_end
    bs_clean_reward_sprite
    @bs_status = "End"
  end
  
  def bs_clean_reward_sprite
    pic_index_to_clean = []
    pic_index_to_clean << BS_CROW_PIC_INDEX
    pic_index_to_clean << BS_ETHAN_PIC_INDEX
    pic_index_to_clean.each do |i|
      screen.pictures[i].erase
    end
  end
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------#
end
============= SCRIPT 276: > (Koda) Methods =============
class Crow < Game_Swan
  def playing_crow?
    return $game_party.members.include?($game_actors[14])
  end
  
  #Accessors etc.
  def armor=(string="Full")
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowArmor"] = string
  end
  
  def armor
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowArmor"]
  end
  
  def outfit
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["MCOutfit"]
  end
  
  def dress_player
    call_event(61, 1, 36)
  end
  
  def tempdress_player
    call_event(61, 2, 36)
  end
  
  def switch_to_crow
    call_event(48, 2, 36)
  end
  
  def switch_to_boy
    call_event(48, 3, 36)
  end
  
  def outfitpath
    path = case outfit
      when "dojo"; ""
      when "puppy"; "Pup/"
      when "naked"; "Naked/"
    end
    return path
  end
  
  def outfit_change(newoutfit='dojo')
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["MCOutfit"] = newoutfit
  end
  
  alias pc_outfit outfit_change #Oops
  
  alias face_walkies tt_walkies #Oops

  def defiance
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Defiance"]
  end
  
  def subcap
    return 0 if seen?("Break 5")
    return 1 if seen?("Break 4")
    return 13 if seen?("Break 3")
    return 25 if seen?("Break 2")
    return 37 if seen?("Break 1")
    return 49 if seen?("First Loss")
    return 49
    return
  end
  
  def domcap
    return 0 if deflvl == 0
    return 12 if deflvl == 1
    return 24 if deflvl == 2
    return 36 if deflvl == 3
    return 48 if deflvl == 4
    return 60 if deflvl > 4
    return 60
    return
  end
  
  def at_sub_cap?
    return (defiance == subcap)
  end
  
  def subify(amount=1)
    curr = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Defiance"]
    curr -= amount
    curr = subcap if curr < subcap
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Defiance"] = curr
  end

  def domify(amount=1)
    curr = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Defiance"]
    curr += amount
    curr = domcap if curr > domcap
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Defiance"] = curr
  end
  
  def pisslvl
    return [$game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Pisspot"],10].min
  end
  
  def pissify(amount=1)
    return unless (broken? || pisslvl < 4)
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Pisspot"] += 1
  end
  
  def deflvl(check=false)
    curdef = case defiance
      when 60; 6
      when 49..59; 5
      when 37..48; 4
      when 25..36; 3
      when 13..24; 2
      when 1..12; 1
      when 0; 0
      end
    
    unless check
      return curdef
    else
      return curdef == check
    end
  end
  
  def omega?
    return $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Omega"]
  end
  
  def start_omega
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Omega"] = true
  end
  
  def end_omega
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Omega"] = false
  end
  
  #Mc Sub Plate
  def mc_sub_plate_text
    if omega?
      return "\\i[122]\\i[122]\\i[122]\\i[122]\\i[122]"
    elsif deflvl > 0
      return case deflvl
        when 6; "\\i[617]\\i[617]\\i[617]\\i[617]\\i[617]"
        when 5; "\\i[615]\\i[615]\\i[615]\\i[615]\\i[615]"
        when 4; "\\i[615]\\i[615]\\i[615]\\i[615]\\i[616]"
        when 3; "\\i[615]\\i[615]\\i[615]\\i[616]\\i[616]"
        when 2; "\\i[615]\\i[615]\\i[616]\\i[616]\\i[616]"
        when 1; "\\i[615]\\i[616]\\i[616]\\i[616]\\i[616]"
      end
    else
      return case pisslvl
          when 0; "\\i[616]\\i[616]\\i[616]\\i[616]\\i[616]"
          when 1; "\\i[619]\\i[616]\\i[616]\\i[616]\\i[616]"
          when 2; "\\i[618]\\i[616]\\i[616]\\i[616]\\i[616]"
          when 3; "\\i[618]\\i[619]\\i[616]\\i[616]\\i[616]"
          when 4; "\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[616]\\i[616]\\i[616]"
          when 5; "\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[619]\\i[616]\\i[616]"
          when 6; "\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[616]\\i[616]"
          when 7; "\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[619]\\i[616]"
          when 8; "\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[616]"
          when 9; "\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[619]"
          when 10, 80; "\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[618]\\i[618]"
      end
    end
  end
  
  #Text Used in Captive Menu
  def captive_menu_text
    
    if omega?
      pimg = outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_omega","Crow/MC/mc_naked_omega","Crow/MC/mc_paws_omega")
      return [
        #["\\n[1]'s will is dominated by the \\ii[131]\\ni[131]!",pimg],
        ["\\c[8]The \\ii[131]\\ni[131] has melted \\n[1]'s mind\\c[0]!",pimg],
        ["He was blissfully submissive for a while...",pimg],
        ["But won't retain any memory...",pimg],
      ]
    end
    
    capment = case deflvl
    when 6
      [
        ["\\n[1] is defiant and confident.","Ethan_Face_11"],
        ["He won't obey any commands you give him.","Ethan_Face_04"],
        ["You'll need to defeat him to break his will.","Ethan_Face_02"]
      ]
    when 5
      [
        ["\\n[1] is stubborn and defiant.","Ethan_Face_02"],
        ["He won't obey any commands you give him.","Ethan_Face_04"]
      ]
    when 4
      [
        ["\\n[1] is shaken, but remains defiant.",outfit_split("Ethan_Face_05","Faces/MC/mc_handsfront_naked_00")],
        ["He will eat or drink on command, within reason.",outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_def2","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def4")],
        outfit_split(
          ["He understands the price of defeat.","Crow/HelmetOn/Win2"],
          ["He accepts being stripped as the price of defeat.","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def4"]
        ),
      ]
    when 3
      [
        ["\\n[1] is humbled and ashamed of his weakness.",outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_def3","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def3")],
        ["He will eat or drink most meals on command.",outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_def1","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def1")],
        outfit_split(
          ["He feels unworthy of his own dojo uniform.","Crow/MC/mc_dojo_def2"],
          ["He feels unworthy of his own dojo uniform.","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def2"]
        )
      ]
    when 2
      [
        ["\\n[1] is becoming more docile and submissive.",outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_def2","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def2","Crow/MC/mc_pup_def2")],
        ["He has learned to lower his gaze in your presence.",outfit_split("Faces/MC/mc_shy_03","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def1","Faces/MC/mc_shy_pup_03")],
        ["He will eat or drink most meals without fuss.",outfit_split("Faces/MC/mc_shy_01","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def1","Faces/MC/mc_shy_pup_01")],
        ["He will shine your boots on command.","Crow/BootShine/LickBoot/" + outfit_split("","Naked/","Pup/") + "01"],
        outfit_split(
          ["He knows his attire is at your whim.","Faces/MC/mc_shy_03"],
          ["He no longer resists the shame of being stripped.","Faces/MC/mc_handsfront_naked_00"],
          ["He accepts being bound as the price of weakness.","Faces/MC/mc_shy_pup_00"]
        )
      ]
    when 1
      [
        ["\\n[1]'s resistance is nearly broken.",outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_def4","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def1","Faces/MC/mc_shy_pup_05")],
        outfit_split(
          ["He has learned to kneel in your presence.","Crow/HelmetOff/Kneel/Beg/01"],
          ["He has learned to kneel in your presence.","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def2"],
          ["He greets you like an obedient dog.","Faces/MC/mc_paws_pup_03"],
        ),
        ["He will eat or drink whatever you command.",outfit_split("Faces/MC/mc_shy_04","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def1","Faces/MC/mc_paws_pup_04")],
        ["He will diligently clean and polish your boots.","Crow/BootShine/LickBoot/" + outfit_split("","Naked/","Pup/") + "02"],
        outfit_split(
          ["You keep him in his dojo raiment for amusement.","Crow/MC/mc_dojo_def1"],
          ["You no longer grant him the dignify of clothing.","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def1"],
          ["You keep him locked in humiliating bondage gear.","Crow/MC/mc_pup_def1"]
        )
      ]
    when 0
      #Normal
      [
        ["\\n[1]'s will is completely broken.", outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_def0","Crow/MC/mc_naked_def0","Crow/MC/mc_paws_def0")],
        ["He shows total submission in your presence.","Crow/LeotardOff/LockE/01_" + outfit],
        ["He worships your boots with slavish devotion.","Crow/BootShine/LickBoot/" + outfit_split("","Naked/","Pup/") + "02"],
        outfit_split(
          ["You force him to wear his old raiment in shame.","Crow/MC/underboot_" + outfit],
          ["You keep him naked, humble, and humiliated.","Crow/MC/underboot_" + outfit],
          ["You keep him bound as your helpless puppy-boy.","Crow/MC/underboot_" + outfit]
        ),
      ]
    end
    
    #Pee
    pimg = outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_pisspot","Crow/MC/mc_naked_pisspot","Crow/MC/mc_paws_pisspot") + "1"
    capment << ["\\c[6]He no longer resists drinking your urine\\c[0].",outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_pisspot","Crow/MC/mc_naked_pisspot","Crow/MC/mc_paws_pisspot") + "1"] if pisslvl >= 2
    capment << ["\\c[6]He accepts his place as your personal toilet\\c[0].",outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_pisspot","Crow/MC/mc_naked_pisspot","Crow/MC/mc_paws_pisspot") + "2"] if pisslvl >= 4
    capment << ["\\c[6]He's becoming addicted to your smell and taste\\c[0].",outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_pisspot","Crow/MC/mc_naked_pisspot","Crow/MC/mc_paws_pisspot") + "3"] if pisslvl >= 6
    capment << ["\\c[6]Your waste is permanently staining his mind\\c[0].",outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_pisspot","Crow/MC/mc_naked_pisspot","Crow/MC/mc_paws_pisspot") + "4"] if pisslvl >= 8
    capment << ["\\c[6]You've fully brainwashed him into your piss-pot\\c[0]!",outfit_split("Crow/MC/mc_dojo_pisspot","Crow/MC/mc_naked_pisspot","Crow/MC/mc_paws_pisspot") + "5"] if pisslvl >= 10
    #capment << capmenti unless capmenti == nil
  
    return capment
  end
  
  def outfit_split(dojo="",naked="",puppy="")
    case outfit
      when 'dojo'; return dojo
      when 'naked'; return naked
      when 'puppy'; return puppy
    end
  end
  
end
============= SCRIPT 277: > (Koda) Mistress Actions =============
class Crow < Game_Swan
  attr_accessor :emblem_sprite
  
  def draw_emblems
    number_of_emblems = $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowActions"]
    erase_emblems
    return if number_of_emblems > 6
    emblem_pic = Cache.picture("Crow/Hud/Emblem")
    number_of_emblems.times do |i|
      @emblem_sprite[i] = Sprite.new
      @emblem_sprite[i].bitmap = emblem_pic
      @emblem_sprite[i].x = Graphics.width - 20 - (i * 25)
      @emblem_sprite[i].y = 400
      @emblem_sprite[i].z = 51
      @emblem_sprite[i].ox = @emblem_sprite[i].bitmap.width / 2
      @emblem_sprite[i].oy = @emblem_sprite[i].bitmap.height / 2
    end
  end
  
  def erase_emblems
    unless @emblem_sprite.nil? || @emblem_sprite.empty?
      @emblem_sprite.each do |i|
        i.dispose
      end
    end
    @emblem_sprite = []
  end
end
