============= SCRIPT 279: > (Koda) Crow Menu =============
#=======================================================================#
# This script contains functions for the Menu when playing as Crow
#=======================================================================#
class Scene_Menu < Scene_MenuBase
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
# * Start Processing
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  alias og_start start
  def start
    if $crow.playing_crow? #$pc.playing_as?('Crow')
      super
      crow_start
    elsif $pc.on_map?(:kaori)
      $windowskin = "KaoriWindow"
      og_start
    else
      $windowskin = "Window"
      og_start
    end
  end

  def crow_start
    $windowskin = "CrowWindow"
    $game_system.window_tone = Tone.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
    $crow.draw_emblems if $crow.playing_crow?
    create_crow_windows
  end
  
  def crow
    return @crow
  end

  def create_crow_windows
    @bg_window = Window_CrowBackground.new
    @bg_window.z = 49
    @name_window = Window_CrowNameplate.new
    @mcname_window = Window_CrowMCNameplate.new
    @mcname_window.hide
    @mcsub_window = Window_CrowMCSub.new
    @mcsub_window.hide
    @crow = Sprite.new
    @crow.z = 50
    crow_portrait
    #Command Window
    @command_window = Window_CrowCommand.new
    @command_window.set_handler(:item,      method(:crow_item))
    @command_window.set_handler(:equip,     method(:crow_equip))
    @command_window.set_handler(:captive,   method(:crow_captive))
    @command_window.set_handler(:save,      method(:command_save))
    @command_window.set_handler(:game_end,  method(:command_game_end))
    @command_window.set_handler(:cancel,    method(:return_scene))
    @command_window.y = @name_window.height
    
    #Captive Windows
    create_crowcaptive_window
    @captive_window.hide
    create_crowcaptivestatus_window
    @captivestatus_window.hide
    
    #Armor Window
    create_crowarmor_window
    @armor_window.hide
    
    #Item Windows
    create_crowitem_window
    @item_window.hide
    @help_window.hide
  end
  
  def crow_portrait
    #img = "Crow/HelmetOn/Ready2"
    #img = "Crow/HelmetOff/Blink"
    #img = "Crow/HelmetOff/POV1"
    img = case $crow.armor
      when "Full"
        if ($crow.pisslvl >= 6) && (rand(3) == 0)
          "Crow/HelmetOn/Pee/03"
        else
          case $crow.deflvl
            when 6; "Crow/HelmetOn/Lose1"
            when 5; "Crow/HelmetOn/Idle2"
            when 4; "Crow/HelmetOn/Idle2"
            when 3; "Crow/HelmetOn/Idle2"
            when 2; "Crow/HelmetOn/POV"
            when 1; "Crow/HelmetOn/POV"
            when 0; "Crow/HelmetOn/POV"
          end
        end
      when "NoHelm"
        case $crow.deflvl
          when 6; "Crow/HelmetOff/Lose1"
          when 5; "Crow/HelmetOff/Idle2"
          when 4; "Crow/HelmetOff/Talk"
          when 3; "Crow/HelmetOff/Laugh"
          when 2; "Crow/HelmetOff/Win1"
          when 1; "Crow/HelmetOff/POV2"
          when 0; "Crow/HelmetOff/POV1"
        end
      when "NoPlate"
        case $crow.deflvl
          when 6; "Crow/PlatebodyOff/Lose1"
          when 5; "Crow/PlatebodyOff/Idle1"
          when 4; "Crow/PlatebodyOff/Talk1"
          when 3; "Crow/PlatebodyOff/Talk3"
          when 2; "Crow/PlatebodyOff/Win1"
          when 1; "Crow/PlatebodyOff/POV2"
          when 0; "Crow/PlatebodyOff/Hose1"
        end
      when "NoLeo"
        case $crow.deflvl
          when 6; "Crow/HelmetOff/Lose1"
          when 5; "Crow/LeotardOff/Idle1"
          when 4; "Crow/LeotardOff/Talk1"
          when 3; "Crow/LeotardOff/Talk1"
          when 2; "Crow/LeotardOff/LockD/POV1"
          when 1; "Crow/LeotardOff/POV1"
          when 0; "Crow/LeotardOff/POV1"
        end
    end
    @crow.x = 90#60
    @crow.y = 0
    @crow.bitmap = Cache.picture(img)
    @cage.opacity = 0 if @cage
    #@crow.bitmap = Cache.picture("Crow/HelmetOff/POV1")
  end
  
  def mc_crowport(face='randpup')
    if !@cage
      @cage = Sprite.new
      @cage.bitmap = Cache.picture("Swan/Trap/02")
      @cage.z = 51
      @cage.zoom_x = 0.7
      @cage.zoom_y = 0.7
      @cage.x = 170
      @cage.y = -100
    end
    @cage.opacity = 200
    img = case face
    when 'randpup'
      "Faces/MC/mc_paws_pup_tamed_0" + rand(6).to_s + "_lily"
    else
      face
    end
    #base coords
    @crow.x = 230
    @crow.y = 33
    #offsets
    if face.include?("Face")
      @crow.x += 20 if face.include?("Ethan_Face_")
      unless face.include?("naked")
        #@crow.y += 50 if $crow.deflvl < 2
      end
    end
    @crow.mirror = false
    if face.include?("Crow/") && !face.include?("mc_")
      @crow.x = 0; @crow.y = 0; @crow.z = @cage.z + 1
      
      @crow.x = 110 if face.include?("HelmetOn/Win2")
    
      @crow.x = 60 if face.include?("HelmetOff/LegLock/")
      
      @crow.x = 82 if face.include?("HelmetOff/Kneel/Beg/")
      @crow.y = -72 if face.include?("HelmetOff/Kneel/Beg/")
      
      @crow.x = 158 if face.include?("BootShine/LickBoot/Full")
      @crow.y = -54 if face.include?("BootShine/LickBoot/Full")
      
      @crow.x = 82 if face.include?("HelmetOff/Trample/")
      @crow.y = -58 if face.include?("HelmetOff/Trample/")
      
      #@crow.zoom_x = 0.8 if face.include?("LockE/")
      #@crow.zoom_y = 0.8 if face.include?("LockE/")
      @crow.x = 85 if face.include?("LockE/")
      @crow.x = 80 if face.include?("LeotardOff/Serve/")
      
      @crow.x = 163 if face.include?("BootShine/")
      @crow.y = 3 if face.include?("BootShine/")
      @crow.mirror = true if face.include?("BootShine/LickSole")
      @crow.y = -269 if face.include?("02_full")
      @crow.x = 40 if face.include?("02_full")
    else
      @crow.z = @cage.z - 1
    end
    #end offsets
    @crow.bitmap = Cache.picture(img)
  end

  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * SELECT CROW ITEM WINDOW
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def crow_item
    @help_window.show
    @item_window.show
    @item_window.activate
    @item_window.select_last
  end
  
  def crow_equip
    @armor_window.show
    @armor_window.activate
    @armor_window.select_last
  end
  
  def crow_captive
    mc_crowport
    @captive_window.show
    @name_window.hide
    @mcname_window.show
    @mcsub_window.show
    @captive_window.activate
    @captive_window.select_last
    @captivestatus_window.show
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * ARMOR WINDOW STUFF
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def create_crowarmor_window
    offset = (Graphics.height - (@name_window.height + @command_window.height))
    @armor_window = Window_CrowArmor.new(0,Graphics.height-offset,160,offset)
    @armor_window.viewport = @viewport
    @armor_window.set_handler(:cancel, method(:crow_cancel))
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * DISPOSE
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def dispose_crowarmor_window
    return unless @armor_window
    @armor_window.hide
    @armor_window.deactivate
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * CAPTIVE WINDOW STUFF
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * CREATE CAPTIVE WINDOW
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def create_crowcaptive_window
    @captive_window = Window_CrowCaptive.new
    @captive_window.viewport = @viewport
    #@captive_window.set_handler(:ok,     false)
    @captive_window.set_handler(:cancel, method(:crow_cancel))
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * STATUS WINDOW
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def create_crowcaptivestatus_window
    offset = @command_window.height
    offset += @name_window.height #*2
    hite = Graphics.height - (offset + @mcsub_window.height + @name_window.fitting_height(2))
    @captivestatus_window = Window_CrowCaptiveStatus.new(0,offset,160,hite)
    @captivestatus_window.viewport = @viewport
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * DISPOSE
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def dispose_crowcaptive_window
    return unless @captive_window
    @captive_window.hide
    @captive_window.deactivate
    @captivestatus_window.hide
    @captivestatus_window.deactivate
    @mcname_window.hide
    @mcsub_window.hide
    @name_window.show
    crow_portrait
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * CREATE CROWITEM WINDOW
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def create_crowitem_window
    @help_window = Window_CrowHelp.new
    @help_window.viewport = @viewport
    #@item_window = Window_CrowItems.new(0,208,180,208)
    offset = @command_window.height + @name_window.height
    @item_window = Window_CrowItems.new(0,offset,160,Graphics.height - offset)
    #@item_window.oy = @item_window.fitting_height(2)
    @item_window.viewport = @viewport
    @item_window.help_window = @help_window
    #@item_window.set_handler(:ok,     method(:on_item_ok))
    @item_window.set_handler(:cancel, method(:crow_cancel))
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * DISPOSE CROWITEM WINDOW
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def dispose_crowitem_window
    return unless @item_window
    return unless @help_window
    @help_window.hide
    @help_window.deactivate
    @item_window.hide
    @item_window.deactivate
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Submenu [Cancel]
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def crow_cancel
    dispose_crowcaptive_window
    dispose_crowitem_window
    dispose_crowarmor_window
    @command_window.activate
  end
end

class Window_CrowCommand < Window_MenuCommand
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Initialize Command Selection Position (Class Method)
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def self.init_command_position
    @@last_command_symbol = nil
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Object Initialization
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def initialize
    super
    @crow_symbol = false
    select_last
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Window Width
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def window_width
    return 160
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Number of Lines to Show
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def visible_line_number
    item_max
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Create Command List
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def make_command_list
    add_main_commands
    add_save_command
    add_game_end_command
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Add Main Commands to List
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def add_main_commands
    add_command("Status",  :equip,  main_commands_enabled)
    add_command("Items",   :item,   main_commands_enabled)
    add_command("Captive",  :captive,  main_commands_enabled)
  end
  
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * UPDATER FUNCTION (UNUSED)
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #def update
  #  super
  #  #p "BELIEVE!"
  #  return if current_symbol == @crow_symbol
  #  @scene = SceneManager.scene
  #  @crow_symbol = current_symbol
  #  case current_symbol
  #  when :item
  #  #  p "item!"
  #  #  #SceneManager.scene.create_crowitem_window
  #  @scene.crow_portrait
  #  when :equip
  #  #  @scene.dispose_crowitem_window
  #  #  p "equip!"
  #  @scene.crow_portrait
  #  when :captive
  #   @scene.dispose_crowitem_window
  #   #@scene.create_crowcaptive_window
  #   p "captive!"
  #   #@scene.crow.bitmap = Cache.picture("Faces/MC/mc_paws_pup_tamed_00_lily")
  #  @scene.mc_crowport
  # end
  #end
end

#==============================================================================
# ** Crow Nameplate
#==============================================================================
class Window_CrowNameplate < Window_Base
  def initialize
    super(0,0,160,fitting_height(1))
    make_text
  end
  
  def make_text
    namecontents = ($crow.deflvl > 1 ? "\\c[6]The Crow\\c[0]" : "\\c[6]Mistress Crow\\c[0]")
    
    draw_text(0, 0, Graphics.width, line_height, namecontents)
  end
end
#==============================================================================
# ** Crow MC Nameplate
#==============================================================================
class Window_CrowMCNameplate < Window_Base
  def initialize
    super(0,0,160,fitting_height(1))
    make_text
  end
  
  def make_text
    draw_text(0, 0, Graphics.width, line_height, "\\c[1]\\n[1]\\c[0]")
  end
end
#==============================================================================
# ** Crow MC Sub Plate
#==============================================================================
class Window_CrowMCSub < Window_Base
  def initialize
    #super(0,fitting_height(7),160,fitting_height(1))
    super(0,Graphics.height-fitting_height(4),160,fitting_height(1))
    make_text
  end
  
  def make_text
    platetext = $crow.mc_sub_plate_text
    draw_text(5, 0, Graphics.width, line_height, platetext)
  end
end
#==============================================================================
# ** Crow Background
#==============================================================================
class Window_CrowBackground < Window_Base
  def initialize
    super(160,0,Graphics.width-160,Graphics.height)
  end
end
#==============================================================================
# ** Crow Captive Status
#==============================================================================
class Window_CrowCaptiveStatus < Window_Base
  def initialize(x, y, width, height)
    super#(0,fitting_height(7),160,fitting_height(1))
    make_text
  end
  
  def make_text
    offset = 3
      
    foodcontents = case $crow.foodbowl
      when "empty"; "\\i[655] \\c[7]Empty\\c[0]"
      when "kibble"; "\\i[652] Kibble"
      when "potionc"; "\\i[652] HEAL"
      when "hell"; "\\i[652] ATK🠕"
      when "hel"; "\\i[652] DEF🠕"
      when "delta"; "\\i[652] LVL↓"
      when "beta"; "\\i[652] SUB+"
      when "omega"; "\\i[652] SUB∞"
      when "piss"; "\\i[652] \\c[6]Heh\\c[0]."
    end
        
    watercontents = case $crow.waterbowl
      when "empty"; "\\i[655] \\c[7]Empty\\c[0]"
      when "water"; "\\i[653] Water"
      when "sweat"; "\\i[653] Sweat"
      when "piss"; "\\i[654] \\c[6]Piss\\c[0]♥"
    end
        
    outfitcontents = $crow.outfit_split("\\i[615] Fire Dojo","\\i[121] Stripped","\\i[579] Puppy")
    
    draw_text(0, offset, Graphics.width, line_height, foodcontents)
    draw_text(0, offset + line_height, Graphics.width, line_height, watercontents)
    draw_text(0, offset + line_height*2, Graphics.width, line_height, outfitcontents)
    
    #draw_text(0, offset + line_height*2, Graphics.width, line_height, "\\i[579] Puppy")
    #draw_text(0, offset + line_height*2, Graphics.width, line_height, "\\i[121] Stripped")
    #draw_text(0, offset + line_height*2, Graphics.width, line_height, "\\i[615] Fire Dojo")
  end
end
#==============================================================================
# ** Window_CrowItems (Window_ItemList alternate)
#==============================================================================
class Window_CrowItems < Window_Selectable
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Object Initialization
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def initialize(x, y, width, height)
    super
    @category = :item
    @data = []
    refresh
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Set Category
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def category=(category)
    @category = :item
    refresh
    self.oy = 0
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Digit Count
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def col_max
    return 1
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Number of Items
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def item_max
    @data ? @data.size : 1
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Item
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def item
    @data && index >= 0 ? @data[index] : nil
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Activation State of Selection Item
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def current_item_enabled?
    false#true
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Include in Item List?
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def include?(item)
    true
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Display in Enabled State?
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def enable?(item)
    false#true
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Create Item List
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def make_item_list
    #@data = $game_party.all_items.select {|item| include?(item) }
    #@data = [
    #$data_items[132],
    #$data_items[133],
    #$data_items[134],
    #$data_items[129],
    #$data_items[130],
    #$data_items[131],
    #]
    @data = []
    
    @data << $data_items[132] if $crow.potion_unlocked?("potion c")
    @data << $data_items[133] if $crow.potion_unlocked?("hell")
    @data << $data_items[134] if $crow.potion_unlocked?("hel")
    @data << $data_items[129] if $crow.potion_unlocked?("delta")
    @data << $data_items[130] if $crow.potion_unlocked?("beta")
    @data << $data_items[131] if $crow.potion_unlocked?("omega")
    #@data.push(nil) if include?(nil)
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Restore Previous Selection Position
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def select_last
    select(@data.index($game_party.last_item.object) || 0)
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Draw Item
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def draw_item(index)
    item = @data[index]
    if item
      rect = item_rect(index)
      rect.width -= 4
      draw_item_name(item, rect.x-5, rect.y, true)
    end
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Update Help Text
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def update_help
    @help_window.set_item(item)
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Refresh
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def refresh
    make_item_list
    create_contents
    draw_all_items
  end
end

class Window_CrowHelp < Window_Base
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Object Initialization
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def initialize(line_number = 2)
    #super(180, 330, 364, fitting_height(line_number))
    super(160, Graphics.height - fitting_height(line_number), Graphics.width-160, fitting_height(line_number))
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Set Text
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def set_text(text)
    if text != @text
      @text = text
      refresh
    end
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Clear
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def clear
    set_text("")
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Set Item
  #     item : Skills and items etc.
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def set_item(item)
    set_text(item ? item.description : "")
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Refresh
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def refresh
    contents.clear
    draw_text_ex(4, 0, @text)
  end
end

class Window_CrowCaptive < Window_Selectable

  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------

    return 1
  end

    @data ? @data.size : 1
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------

    @data && index >= 0 ? @data[index] : nil
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Create Item List
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def make_item_list
    @data = $crow.captive_menu_text
    #@data = [
    #["\\n[1] has become completely submissive.","randpup"],
    #["You've dressed him as an adorable puppy-boy.","randpup"],
    #["He will eat or drink anything you wish.","randpup"],
    #["He worships your boots with total devotion.","randpup"],
    #["He obeys your commands like a trained dog.","randpup"],
    #["He no longer resists being used as your toilet.","randpup"]
    #]
    #@data.push(nil) if include?(nil)
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------

  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def select_last
    select(0)
  end

  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------

    text = @data[index][0]
    draw_text(0, line_height*index, Graphics.width, line_height, text)
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Refresh
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def refresh
    make_item_list
    create_contents
    draw_all_items
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------

  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  #alias crow_select select
  #def select(index)
  #  crow_select
  #  SceneManager.scene.mc_crowport(@data[index][1])
  #end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Select Item
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def select(index)
    self.index = index if index
    p @data[index][1]
    SceneManager.scene.mc_crowport(@data[index][1])
  end
end

#==============================================================================
# ** Window_CrowArmor (Window_ItemList alternate)
#==============================================================================
class Window_CrowArmor < Window_Selectable
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Object Initialization
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def initialize(x, y, width, height)
    super
    @data = []
    refresh
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Digit Count
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def col_max
    return 1
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Number of Items
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def item_max
    @data ? @data.size : 1
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Get Item
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def item
    @data && index >= 0 ? @data[index] : nil
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Create Item List
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def make_item_list
    
    bladeinfo = $crow.equip_level('blade') > 3 ? "\\c[8]" : ""
    bladeinfo += "\\i[386] Blade +" + $crow.equip_level('blade').to_s + "\\c[0]"
    
    helminfo = $crow.armor_dura(0) > 3 ? "\\c[8]" :  ($crow.armor_dura(0) <= 1 ? "\\c[2]" : "")
    upperinfo = $crow.armor_dura(1) > 3 ? "\\c[8]" : ($crow.armor_dura(1) <= 1 ? "\\c[2]" : "")
    lowerinfo = $crow.armor_dura(2) > 3 ? "\\c[8]" : ($crow.armor_dura(2) <= 1 ? "\\c[2]" : "")

    helminfo += "\\i[637] Helm +" + $crow.equip_level('helm').to_s + "\\c[0]"
    upperinfo += "\\i[638] Plate +" + $crow.equip_level('upper').to_s + "\\c[0]"
    lowerinfo += "\\i[639] Under +" + $crow.equip_level('lower').to_s + "\\c[0]"
    
    helminfo = "\\c[7]Off\\c[0]" if $crow.armor == "NoHelm"
    upperinfo = "\\c[7]Off\\c[0]" if $crow.armor == "NoPlate"
    lowerinfo = "\\c[7]Off\\c[0]" if $crow.armor == "NoLeo"
    
    @data = [
    bladeinfo,
    helminfo,
    upperinfo,
    lowerinfo,
    ]
    
    @data << "\\i[113] Warmup" if $crow.warmup?
    @data << "\\i[99] Sweaty" if $crow.stink >= 3
    @data << "\\i[122] Steamy" if $crow.stink >= 4
    @data << "\\i[2] Stinky" if $crow.stink >= 5
    
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Restore Previous Selection Position
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def select_last
    select(0)
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Draw Item
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def draw_item(index)
    text = @data[index]
    height = line_height*index
    gap = line_height/2
    #height += gap if index > 3
    draw_text(0, height, Graphics.width, line_height, text)
  end
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # * Refresh
  #--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  def refresh
    make_item_list
    create_contents
    draw_all_items
  end
end
============= SCRIPT 280:  =============

============= SCRIPT 281: > Swan's Battle (2) =============
class Game_Swan < Game_Interpreter
  attr_accessor :stance, :qte_id, :qte_stage
  
  def episode_2_battle_initiate
    @stance = "Masked"
    @status = "Clean"
    @qte_id = ""
    stats_setup
  end
  
  def stats_setup
    #case $game_actors[1].level
    #  when 0..15 then factor = 1
    #  when 15..20 then factor = 1.3
    #  when 20..30 then factor = 1.6
    #  when 30..40 then factor = 2
    #  when 40..50 then factor = 2.3
    #  when 50..60 then factor = 2.6
    #  else
    #    factor = 3.0
    #  end
    
    #Koda curve version
    factorlevel = [$game_actors[1].level.to_f - 15.0, 0.0].max
    factor = 1.0 + [2.0 * (factorlevel/45.0),2.0].min
    factor = 1.0 if factor <= 1.0
    
    #factor += 0.3 if warmup? || true_ex?
    #factor += 0.3 * (wins - losses).to_f if wins > losses
    #factor += 0.5 if last_stand
    
    factor += (0.2 * (toxicology_level))
    factor += [1.0, (0.01 * feet_addiction)].min
    factor += (0.1 * sublvl)
    
    base_atk = 60.0
    base_def = 125.0
    $data_enemies[167].params[2] = (base_atk * factor * 0.8).ceil
    $data_enemies[167].params[3] = (base_def * factor * 0.8).ceil
     
    # Crow Scaling
    #base_atk = 45.0 * (1 + equip_level('blade').to_f/30.0) #Koda
    #base_def = 110.0 * (1 + equip_level('armor').to_f/30.0) #Koda
    
    $data_enemies[167].params[2] = (base_atk * factor).ceil
    $data_enemies[167].params[3] = (base_def * factor).ceil
    
    #Based on Crow, likely to change
    $game_switches[113] = false
    if false #pseudo_ex?
      #Turn EX On
      $game_switches[113] = true
      
      mhpmatch = $game_actors[1].nobuff_param(0).to_f * 0.7 # MHP
      atkmatch = $game_actors[1].nobuff_param(2).to_f * 0.7 # ATK
      defmatch = $game_actors[1].nobuff_param(3).to_f * 0.7 # DEF
      
      $data_enemies[167].params[0] = [$data_enemies[168].params[0],mhpmatch].max
      $data_enemies[167].params[2] = [$data_enemies[168].params[2],atkmatch].max
      $data_enemies[167].params[3] = [$data_enemies[168].params[3],defmatch].max
      
      $data_enemies[167].params[0] += 20 * ex_level
      $data_enemies[167].params[2] += 5 * ex_level
      $data_enemies[167].params[3] += 5 * ex_level
    end
    
    eff_factor = (
      ($data_enemies[167].params[2].to_f/45.0) +
      ($data_enemies[167].params[3].to_f/110.0) /2.0
      )
      
    if eff_factor < 1.5
      $game_variables[9] = 1
    elsif eff_factor < 2.5
      $game_variables[9] = 2
    else
      $game_variables[9] = 3
    end
    
    p "Factor: " + factor.to_s
    p "Effective Factor: " + eff_factor.to_s
    p "Difficulty: " + $game_variables[9].to_s
    
    $game_troop.members[0].recover_all
    $game_system.boss_hp_meter[4] = $game_troop.members[0].hp
    
    p "Swan final stats"
    p $data_enemies[167].params[0]
    p $data_enemies[167].params[2]
    p $data_enemies[167].params[3]
  end
    
  def episode_2_reset_poison
    @poison_quota =
      {
        "Poison1" => 1,
        "Poison2" => 1,
      }
  end
  
  def episode_2_battle
    p @stance
    #if @stance == "Poison1 Post Drugged"
    #  call_event(33, 1, MAP_ID[0]) 
    #  return
    #end
    case @stance
      when "Masked", "Poison1 Post Drugged", "Poison2 Post Drugged"
        call_event(33, 1, MAP_ID[0]) 
      when /Potion/
        use_potion
      when "Holding Poison1"
        @status = "Poisoned"#"Dizzy(1)"#"Poisoned"
        @stance = "Poison1 Drugged"
        call_event(61, 1, Swan::MAP_ID[0])
      when "Holding Poison2"
        @status = "Poisoned"
        @stance = "Poison2 Drugged"
        call_event(176, 1, Swan::MAP_ID[0])
      when "Poison1 Drugged"
        if @stance == "Dizzy(4)" || "Poisoned" || drugstunned?
          call_event(60, 1, MAP_ID[0]) 
          @stance = "Poison1 Post Drugged"
        end
      when "Poison2 Drugged"
        call_event(183, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      else
        p "else"
    end
  end
  
  def episode_2_turn_end
    episode_2_pose_switch
    
    case @stance
      when /Holding/
      else
        if peek_feet_condition_met? && rand(100) < chance_of_peeking
          call_event( 78, 1, MAP_ID[0] )
        end
      end
      
    turn_passed
    warm_up_turn
  end
    
  def have_potion_left?
    !@potion_list.empty?
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Switch a hint pose
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def episode_2_pose_switch
    pic_id = ""
    #---
    # * Condition of using poison:
    # > Hp belows 40%
    # > Havn't used any poison before in this battle
    # > Tempeture > 100
    # > Have at least 1 poison flask left
    #---
    if $game_variables[15] == 15
      call_event(33, 2, MAP_ID[0]) #Hydroscreen Punish
    elsif @temperature >= 100 && (@stance == "Masked" && @status == "Clean")
      call_event(33, 3, MAP_ID[0]) #Steam Wave Punish
    end
    
    condition1 = low_in_health? || @temperature >= 100 || drugstunned?
    condition2 = @stance == "Masked" && @status == "Clean"
    condition3 = episode_2_have_any_poison_left?
    
    p "cond1" + condition1.to_s
    p "cond2" + condition2.to_s
    p "cond3" + condition3.to_s
    
    if condition1 && condition2 && condition3
      #---
      # Randomly pick one poison
      #---
      randpoison = (seen?("Second Poison Loss") ? rand(100) : 99)
      case randpoison
        when 0..29 #--- 30%
          return unless episode_2_have_poison_left?("Poison1")
          pic_id = "Swan/Masked/Poison/1"
          @stance = "Holding Poison1"
          episode_2_use_poison("Poison1")
        when 30..99 #--- 70%
          return unless episode_2_have_poison_left?("Poison2")
          pic_id = "Swan/Masked/Poison/2"
          @stance = "Holding Poison2"
          episode_2_use_poison("Poison2")
        end
    else
      #---
      # * Only 3 situation when Swan will bring out potions
      #---
      condition_a = @stance == "Masked"
      condition_b = @stance.include?("Post Drugged")
      return unless condition_a || condition_b
      #--- 
      # * Condition of using potion:
      # > Every 3 turns
      # > Have Potions left
      #---
      if turn_no % 3 == 2 && turn_no != 0 && have_potion_left?
        case @stance
          when "Masked"
            pic_id = "Swan/Masked/Ready1"
            @stance = "Potion"
          when /Poison1/
            pic_id = "Swan/Poison1/Ready1"
            @stance = "Poison1 Potion"
          when /Poison2/
            pic_id = "Swan/Poison2/Ready1"
            @stance = "Poison2 Potion"
          end
      end 
    end
    #---
    unless pic_id.empty?
      pic_change(pic_id) 
      wind1
      flash_battler
    end
  end
  
  def episode_2_return_idle
    case @stance
      when /Holding/ then @stance = "Masked"
      when /Poison1/ then @stance = "Poison1 Post Drugged"
      when /Poison2/ then @stance = "Poison2 Post Drugged"
      else 
        @stance = "Masked"
    end
    pic_change($swan.img_folder + "Idle1")
  end
  
  def episode_2_post_interrupt
    #return #Koda
    if is_ethan_attacking
      case @stance
        when /Holding/ then call_event(99, 1, MAP_ID[0])
        end
    end
  end
  
  def episode_2_have_poison_left?(poison_id)
    @poison_quota[poison_id] > 0
  end
  
  def episode_2_have_any_poison_left?
    @poison_quota.each do |key, value|
      return true if value > 0
    end
    return false
  end
  
  def episode_2_use_poison(poison_id)
    @poison_quota[poison_id] = [@poison_quota[poison_id] - 1, 0].max
  end
end
