============= SCRIPT 283:  =============

============= SCRIPT 284: > Crow's Battle =============
#=======================================================================#
# This script contains functions used in the Crow's battle
#=======================================================================#
class Crow < Game_Swan
  attr_accessor :stamina, :stance, :active_pic
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Controls the battle flow
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def battle
    random_taunt_sfx if ["Idle"].include?(@stance) #Koda
    forced_start if forced_start?
    case @battle_mode
      when "First Encounter(Part 1)" then first_encounter_battle_part_1
      when "First Encounter(Part 2)" then first_encounter_battle_part_2
      when "Full Armour" then full_armour_battle
      when "Helmet Off" then helmet_off_battle
      when "Platebody Off" then platebody_off_battle
      when "Leotard Off" then ass_punish_battle
    end
  end
  
  def last_stand
    return ($crow.wins == 2 && !$crow.vaccine?)
  end
  
  def battle_results
    call_event(234, 2, MAP_ID[0]) rescue nil
  end
  
  def pseudo_ex?
    return true_ex? || last_stand || ($crow.wins > 2 && ($crow.wins > ($crow.losses + 2)))
  end
  
  def steamy? #Koda
    stink >= 3
  end
  
  def sweaty? #Koda
    stink >= 4
  end
  
  def stinky? #Koda
    stink >= 5
  end
  
  def mc_guarding? #Koda
    $game_actors[1].state?(9)
  end
  
  def mc_grabblock? #Koda
    $game_actors[1].state?(35)
  end
  
  def urge_surrender_service
    urgeobey = [
      "Obey!",
      "Hurry up.",
      "Do as you're told!",
      "Submit!",
      "Prove your sincerity~!",
      "This isn't over until you obey~!"
    ].sample
    $game_message.add("\\cn[Crow]\n" + urgeobey)
    wait_for_message
  end
  
  def steam_puff(fast=false)
    #call_event(106, 2, MAP_ID[0])
    RPG::SE.new("Sand",70,[100,90,110].sample).play
    screen.pictures[22].show("Khulan_CloseMist", 1, 272, 208, 150, 150, 255, 0)
    zoom = 300 + rand(30)
    screen.pictures[22].move(1, 272, 208, zoom, zoom, 0, 0, 120)
    screen.pictures[22].rotate([1,2,3,-3,-2,-1].sample)
    wait(60) unless fast
    screen.pictures[22].erase unless fast
    #RPG::SE.new("Sand",70,[100,90,110].sample).play
    #screen.pictures[16].show("Khulan_CloseMist", 1, 272, 208, 150, 150, 255, 0)
    #zoom = 300 + rand(30)
    #screen.pictures[16].move(1, 272, 208, zoom, zoom, 0, 0, 120)
    #screen.pictures[16].rotate([1,2,3,-3,-2,-1].sample)
  end
  
  def battle_initiate
    $game_switches[2] = true
    update_off
    @active_pic = ""
    @surrendered = false #Koda
    @armpit_arousal = 0 #Koda
    reset_skill_usetime
    reset_stamina
    reset_stance
    reset_armour
    draw_armour_hud
    update_armours_hud
    initialize_battle_anim
    $data_skills[346].damage.element_id = 0 # Make attack Non-Ele
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Crow Fought Today"] = true #Koda
    forget_moves #Koda moved up here
    case @battle_mode
      when "First Encounter(Part 1)"
        $pc.lock_items #Item Lock
        call_event(87, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "First Encounter(Part 2)"
        $pc.lock_items #Item Lock
        call_event(186, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Full Armour"
        if true_ex?
            $game_troop.members[0].add_state(82) #Full Armor buff
            crow_armor_durability
            update_armours_hud
            call_event(197, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Greet Full Armor
            initiate_stink
        else
          case armor
            when "Full"
              $game_troop.members[0].add_state(82) #Full Armor buff
              crow_armor_durability
              update_armours_hud
              call_event(197, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Greet Full Armor
              initiate_stink
            when "NoHelm"
              erase_armour_hud
              @battle_mode = "Helmet Off"
              call_event(197, 2, MAP_ID[0]) # Greet No Helm
              helmet_off_initiate
            when "NoPlate"
              erase_armour_hud
              @battle_mode = "Platebody Off"
              call_event(197, 3, MAP_ID[0]) # Greet No Platebody
              platebody_off_initiate
            when "NoLeo"
              erase_armour_hud
              @battle_mode = "Leotard Off"
              call_event(197, 4, MAP_ID[0]) # Greet No Leotard
              platebody_off_initiate
              ass_punish_initialize
            end
        end
      end
    update_on
    stats_setup
    turn_passed
    p "finish battle init"
  end
  
  #Koda
  def initiate_stink
    armorscore = case @battle_mode
      when "Full Armour"; 5
      when "Helmet Off"; 4
      when "Platebody Off"; 3
      when "Leotard Off"; 0 
    end
    p "armorscore: " + armorscore.to_s
    #armorscore = case armor
    #  when "Full"; 5
    #  when "NoHelm"; 4
    #  when "NoLeo"; 3
    #  when "NoPlate"; 0 
    #end
    
    @armpit_arousal = [(stink - armorscore),ARMPIT_AROUSAL_MAX].min
    @armpit_arousal = 0 if @armpit_arousal < 0
    @aim_introduced = false if @armpit_arousal > 0
    call_event(197, 6, MAP_ID[0]) if @armpit_arousal > 0
    p "armpit arousal: " + @armpit_arousal.to_s
  end
  
  def forget_moves
    $game_actors[1].forget_skill(347)
    $game_actors[1].forget_skill(348)
  end
  
  def stats_setup
    #case $game_actors[1].level
    #  when 0..15 then factor = 1
    #  when 15..20 then factor = 1.3
    #  when 20..30 then factor = 1.6
    #  when 30..40 then factor = 2
    #  when 40..50 then factor = 2.3
    #  when 50..60 then factor = 2.6
    #  else
    #    factor = 3.0
    #  end
    
    #Koda curve version
    factorlevel = [$game_actors[1].level.to_f - 15.0, 0.0].max
    factor = 1.0 + [2.0 * (factorlevel/45.0),2.0].min
    factor = 1.0 if factor <= 1.0
    
    factor += 0.3 if warmup? || true_ex?
    factor += 0.3 * (wins - losses).to_f if wins > losses
    factor += 0.5 if last_stand
      
    base_atk = 45.0 * (1.0 + equip_level('blade').to_f/50.0) #Koda
    base_def = 110.0 * (1.0 + equip_level('armor').to_f/50.0) #Koda
    
    $data_enemies[168].params[0] = 2200
    $data_enemies[168].params[2] = (base_atk * factor).ceil
    $data_enemies[168].params[3] = (base_def * factor).ceil
    
    $game_switches[113] = false
    if pseudo_ex?
      #Turn EX On
      $game_switches[113] = true
      
      mhpmatch = $game_actors[1].nobuff_param(0).to_f * 0.6 # MHP
      atkmatch = $game_actors[1].nobuff_param(2).to_f * 0.6 # ATK
      defmatch = $game_actors[1].nobuff_param(3).to_f * 0.6 # DEF
      
      $data_enemies[168].params[0] = [$data_enemies[168].params[0],mhpmatch].max
      $data_enemies[168].params[2] = [$data_enemies[168].params[2],atkmatch].max
      $data_enemies[168].params[3] = [$data_enemies[168].params[3],defmatch].max
      
      $data_enemies[168].params[0] += (20 * ex_level)
      $data_enemies[168].params[2] += 5 * ex_level
      $data_enemies[168].params[3] += 5 * ex_level
    end
    
    if omega? #NYI
      $data_enemies[168].params[2] = 1
      $data_enemies[168].params[3] = 5000
    end
    
    eff_factor = (
      ($data_enemies[168].params[2].to_f/45.0) +
      ($data_enemies[168].params[3].to_f/110.0) /2.0
      )
      
    if eff_factor < 1.5
      $game_variables[9] = 1
    elsif eff_factor < 2.5
      $game_variables[9] = 2
    else
      $game_variables[9] = 3
    end
    
    p "Factor: " + factor.to_s
    p "Effective Factor: " + eff_factor.to_s
    p "Difficulty: " + $game_variables[9].to_s
    
    #$game_variables[9] = case factor.to_i
    #  when 1; 1
    #  when 2; 2
    #  when 3; 3
    #  else; 3
    #  end
    
    #$game_troop.members[0].transform(168)
    #$game_troop.members[0].screen_y = 416
    $game_troop.members[0].recover_all
    $game_system.boss_hp_meter[4] = $game_troop.members[0].hp
    
    p "crow final stats"
    p $data_enemies[168].params[0]
    p $data_enemies[168].params[2]
    p $data_enemies[168].params[3]
    
    $game_switches[2] = false
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Battle flow 
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  
  def acknowledge
    RPG::SE.new("Crow/Crow4",90,100).play
  end
  
  def lose_voice
    RPG::SE.new("Crow/CrowLose",90,100).play
  end
    
  def random_taunt_sfx
    #pic_change(img_folder + ["Talk1","Talk2","Talk3"].sample) if @stance == "Idle"
    #skip 4
    tauntpool = ["1","2","3","5","6","7","8","9","10","13"]
    which = "Crow/Crow" + tauntpool.sample
    while which == @last_taunt
      which = "Crow/Crow" + tauntpool.sample
    end
    RPG::SE.new(which,90,98).play
    @last_taunt = which
  end
  
  def forced_start
    return if ["Crush","Carry","Sit","Butt","Pin"].include?(@stance)
    if ["Neckhold","Clamp","Grab","Sit","Trample"].include?(@stance) #Hold Move?
      diapool = [
        "Good boy. Just give in...",
        "That's right. Don't do anything!",
        "Accepting your punishment~?",
        "Heh. Good. Submit!",
        "Too addicted to move, right~?",
        "You belong to me, brat!"
      ]
      $game_message.add("\\cn[Crow]\n" + diapool.sample)
      wait_for_message
    else #Not Hold Move
      diapool = {
        "Full Armour" => [
          "Too slow!",
          "Fool!",
          "Pathetic.",
          "What's wrong?",
          "Focus!",
          "Giving up~?"
        ],
        "Helmet Off" => [
          "Too slow!",
          "Fool!",
          "Pathetic.",
          "What's wrong?",
          "Focus!",
          "Giving up~?"
        ],
        "Platebody Off" => [
          "Too slow!",
          "Something wrong?",
          "Distracted by something~?",
          "What's wrong?",
          "Be punished!",
          "Pay attention~!",
          "Giving up~?"
        ],
        "Leotard Off" => [
          "Too slow!",
          "Something wrong?",
          "Is this your submission~?",
          "What's wrong?",
          "Pathetic brat~",
          "Pay attention~!",
          "Giving up~?"
        ],
      }
      $game_message.add("\\cn[Crow]\n" + diapool[@battle_mode].sample)
      wait_for_message
    end
  end
  
  def battle_music #Koda
    call_event(197, 5, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  
  def forced_start? #Koda
    $game_switches[130] == true
  end
  
  def can_surrender? #Koda
    deflvl <= 3 || seen?("Crow After Swan")
  end
  
  def surrendered?
    return @surrendered
  end
  
  def interrupt
    #Koda
    return if @battle_mode.include?("First Encounter")
    smell_interrupt if (@armpit_arousal > 0 && @battle_mode != "Platebody Off")
    
    case @battle_mode
      when "Helmet Off" then helmet_off_interrupt
      when "Platebody Off" then platebody_off_interrupt
      when "Leotard Off" then ass_punish_interrupt
    end
  end
  
  def post_interrupt
    case @battle_mode
      when "Full Armour" then full_armour_post_interrupt
    end
  end
  
  def turn_end
    case @battle_mode
      when "Full Armour" then full_armour_turn_end
      when "Helmet Off" then helmet_off_turn_end
      when "Platebody Off" then platebody_off_turn_end
      when "Leotard Off" then ass_punish_turn_end
      end
  end
  
  def win_battle
    won_ex if pseudo_ex? || true_ex?
    domify(4) #Koda
    case @battle_mode
      when "First Encounter(Part 1)", "First Encounter(Part 2)" then call_event(89, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Full Armour" then call_event(89, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Helmet Off" then call_event(102, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Platebody Off" then call_event(103, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Leotard Off" then call_event(104, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
  end
    
  def lose_battle
    subify(2) #Koda
    case @battle_mode
      when "First Encounter(Part 1)", "Generic Lose" then call_event(90, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "First Encounter(Part 2)" then call_event(187, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      #---
      when "Full Armour" then full_armour_crow_wins
      when "Helmet Off" then helmet_off_crow_wins
      when "Platebody Off" then platebody_off_crow_wins
      when "Leotard Off" then leotard_off_crow_wins
    end
  end
  
  def struggle
    case @battle_mode
      when "Helmet Off" then helmet_off_struggle
      when "Platebody Off" then platebody_off_struggle
      when "Leotard Off" then ass_punish_struggle
    end
  end
  
  def surrender
    subify(4) #Koda
    stop_battle_anim #Koda
    @surrendered = true
    case @battle_mode
      when "Full Armour" then call_event(236, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Helmet Off" then helmet_off_surrender
      when "Platebody Off" then platebody_off_surrender
      when "Leotard Off" then leotard_off_surrender
    end
  end
  
  def battle_update
    update_battle_anim
    return unless $game_party.in_battle #Koda
    case @battle_mode
      when "Platebody Off" then platebody_off_update
      when "Leotard Off" then ass_punish_update
      when "Helmet Off" then helmet_off_update
   end
  end
  
  def update_on
    $game_switches[85] = true
  end
  
  def update_off
    $game_switches[85] = false
  end
  
  def battle_terminate
    update_off
    forget_moves
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Variables used in battle
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------# 
  def reset_stamina
    @stamina = max_stamina
  end
  
  def max_stamina
    return 5
  end
  
  def has_stamina?
    @stamina > 0
  end
  
  def stamina_down
    @stamina -= 1
  end
  
  def tired_check
    if @stamina <= 0
      if @battle_mode == "Platebody Off" #Koda
        RPG::SE.new("Wind1", 80, 100).play
        if rand(2) == 0
          pic_change "Crow/PlatebodyOff/Drain/Taunt1"
          @stance = "Back"
        else
          pic_change "Crow/PlatebodyOff/Raise1"
          @stance = "Raise"
        end
        return
      end
      if @battle_mode == "Leotard Off" && pseudo_ex?
        RPG::SE.new("Wind1", 80, 100).play
        if rand(2) == 0
          pic_change "Crow/LeotardOff/Counter2"
          @stance = "Butt"
        else
          pic_change "Crow/LeotardOff/Counter1"
          @stance = "Lower"
        end
        return
      end
      call_event(91, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Tired event
      @stance = "Rest"
      @stance = "Fake Fatigue" if (@battle_mode == "Helmet Off" && pseudo_ex? && rand(2) == 0)
    else
      return_idle
    end
  end
  
  def reset_stance
    @stance = "Idle" # Normal, Rest
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Change battler sprite inside battle
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pic_change(args)
    @active_pic = args
    battler_id = 168
    $data_enemies[battler_id].battler_name = args
    return if $game_troop.members[0].nil?
    $game_troop.members[0].transform(battler_id)
    $game_troop.members[0].screen_y = 416
    flash_battler
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Change battler sprite inside battle
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def img_folder
    case @battle_mode
      when "First Encounter(Part 1)", "First Encounter(Part 2)"
        return "Crow/HelmetOn/"
      when "Full Armour"
        return "Crow/HelmetOn/"
      when "Helmet Off"
        return "Crow/HelmetOff/"
      when "Platebody Off"
        return "Crow/PlatebodyOff/"
      when "Leotard Off"
        return "Crow/LeotardOff/"
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Return to idle pose
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def return_idle
    pic_change(img_folder + "Idle1")
    @stance = "Idle"
    flash_armour_hud
    case @battle_mode
      when "Generic Lose", "First Encounter(Part 1)", "First Encounter(Part 2)"
        audio_id = "Sword1"
      else
        audio_id = "Wind1"
    end
    RPG::SE.new(audio_id, 80, 100).play
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Armour Related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  HUD_BASE_PIC_ID = 40
  HUD_PIC_ID = [41, 42, 43] # 0: Helmet, 1: Platebody, 2: Leotard
  ARMOUR_MAX_HEALTH = [6, 6, 6] # 0: Helmet, 1: Platebody, 2: Leotard
  attr_accessor :armour_health
  
  def reset_armour
    #Deprecated - Koda
    @armour_health = [
      ARMOUR_MAX_HEALTH[0],
      ARMOUR_MAX_HEALTH[1],
      ARMOUR_MAX_HEALTH[2]
    ]
    #initialize_armour_status
  end
  
  def initialize_armour_status
    case @battle_mode
      when "Generic Lose" then @armour_health[0] = 0
      when "Armpit Punish"
        @armour_health[0] = @armour_health[1] = 0
      when "Ass Punish"
        @armour_health[0] = @armour_health[2] = 0
      #---
    end
  end
  
  def draw_armour_hud
    #return unless @battle_mode == "Full Armour"
    return if @battle_mode.include?("First Encounter")
    path = "Crow/Hud/"
    screen.pictures[HUD_BASE_PIC_ID].show(path+"Base", 1, 520, 240, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    screen.pictures[HUD_PIC_ID[0]].show(path+"Helmet", 1, 520, 226, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    screen.pictures[HUD_PIC_ID[1]].show(path+"Platebody", 1, 520, 244, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    screen.pictures[HUD_PIC_ID[2]].show(path+"Leotard", 1, 520, 253, 100, 100, 255, 0)
  end
  
  def update_armours_hud
    HUD_PIC_ID.each_with_index do |pic_index, index|
      color = armour_toner(index) #Koda
      #red = 255.0 - (( @armour_health[index].to_f / ARMOUR_MAX_HEALTH[index].to_f ) * 255.0)
      #color = Tone.new(red, 0, 0, red)
      screen.pictures[pic_index].start_tone_change(color, 20)
    end
  end
  
  def update_armour_hud(armour_type)
    type_id = armour_type_id(armour_type)
    color = armour_toner(type_id) #Koda
    #red = 255.0 - (( @armour_health[type_id].to_f / ARMOUR_MAX_HEALTH[type_id].to_f ) * 255.0 )
    #color = Tone.new(red, 0, 0, red)
    screen.pictures[HUD_PIC_ID[type_id]].start_tone_change(color, 20)
    anim_pic(HUD_PIC_ID[type_id], 114)
  end
  
  def armour_toner(index) #Koda
    #if @armour_health[index] > 3
    #  red = 255.0 - (( @armour_health[index].to_f / 6.0 ) * 255.0)
    #else
    #  red = 255.0 - (( @armour_health[index].to_f / 3.0 ) * 255.0)
    #end
    #return Tone.new(red, 0, 0, red)
    
    if @armour_health[index] <= 3
      red = 255.0 - ((@armour_health[index].to_f / 3.0) * 255.0)
      return Tone.new(red, 0, 0, red)
    else
      blue = 120.0 * ((@armour_health[index].to_f - 3.0 ) / 3.0)
      return Tone.new(0, 0, blue, blue)
    end
  end
  
  def erase_armour_hud
    erase_pic(HUD_BASE_PIC_ID)
    HUD_PIC_ID.each {|i| erase_pic(i)}
  end
  
  def flash_armour_hud
    HUD_PIC_ID.each {|i| anim_pic(i, 114)}
  end
  
  def damage_armour(armour_type)
    type_id = armour_type_id(armour_type)
    @armour_health[type_id] = [@armour_health[type_id] - 1, 0].max
    
    RPG::SE.new("Sword2", 80, 100).play
    crow_align_armor #Koda
    update_armour_hud(armour_type)
  end
  
  def armour_type_id(armour_type)
    case armour_type
      when String
        case armour_type
          when "Helmet" then return 0
          when "Platebody" then return 1
          when "Leotard" then return 2
        end
      when Numeric
        case armour_type
          when 0 then return "Helmet"
          when 1 then return "Platebody"
          when 2 then return "Leotard"
        end
    end
  end
  
  def check_armour_break
    @armour_health.each_with_index{|i, index| return armour_type_id(index) if i <= 0}
    return false
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Custom Skills
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :active_skill_id
  SKILLSLOT_ID = [348, 349, 350]
  
  def name_skill(skill_id ,skill_name, skill_icon_index)
    $data_skills[SKILLSLOT_ID[skill_id - 1]].name = skill_name
    $data_skills[SKILLSLOT_ID[skill_id - 1]].icon_index = skill_icon_index
  end
   
  def custom_skill
    case @battle_mode
      when "Generic Lose" then generic_lose_skill
      when "Helmet Off" then helmet_off_skill
      when "Leotard Off" then ass_punish_skill
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # In battle animation
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :battle_anim_frame, :battle_anim_skip_frame, :battle_anim_id, :last_battle_anim_id
  BATTLE_ANIM_PIC_INDEX = 20
  
  def initialize_battle_anim
    reset_battle_anim
    @battle_anim_id = @last_battle_anim_id = ""
  end
  
  def reset_battle_anim
    @battle_anim_frame = @battle_anim_skip_frame = 0
  end
  
  def battle_anim_list
    return non_combat_anim unless $game_party.in_battle #Koda
    case @battle_mode
      when "Full Armour" then return full_armour_anim
      when "Helmet Off" then return helmet_off_anim
      when "Platebody Off" then return platebody_off_anim
      when "Leotard Off" then return ass_punish_anim
    end
  end
  
  #Koda
  def non_combat_anim
    list = {
      "HelmetOff/Trample/" => [["01", "02", "01", "02"], 24, "Restrain_Lock"],
      "HelmetOff/Trample/Wank/" => [["01","02"], 30, "Stroke"],
      "HelmetOff/Kneel/Trample/" => [["01","02"], 60, "Sand"],
      "HelmetOff/Pee/Laugh/" => [["01","02"], 4, nil],
      "HelmetOn/Pee/" => [["01","02","03","04","05"], 8, nil],
    }
  end
  
  def update_battle_anim
    return if @battle_anim_id.empty? || !battle_anim_list[@battle_anim_id]
    pic_folder = "Crow/" + @battle_anim_id.to_s
    pic_index = battle_anim_list[@battle_anim_id][0][@battle_anim_frame]
    pic_id = pic_folder + pic_index
    index = BATTLE_ANIM_PIC_INDEX
    screen.pictures[index].show(pic_id, 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    interval = battle_anim_list[@battle_anim_id][1]
    #play_battle_anim_se if Graphics.frame_count % (interval*6) == 0
    battle_anim_next_frame
  end 
  
  def battle_anim_next_frame
    interval = battle_anim_list[@battle_anim_id][1]
    #p "interval: " + interval.to_s
    if @battle_anim_skip_frame < interval
      @battle_anim_skip_frame += 1
    else
      @battle_anim_skip_frame = 0
      play_battle_anim_se if @battle_anim_frame == 0 #Koda
      @battle_anim_frame += 1
      @battle_anim_frame = 0 if battle_anim_last_frame
    end
  end
    
  def battle_anim_last_frame
    @battle_anim_frame > battle_anim_list[@battle_anim_id][0].count - 1
  end
  
  #def battle_anim_first_frame
  #  @battle_anim_frame == 0 && @battle_anim_skip_frame == 0
  #end
  
  def start_battle_anim(anim_id)
    hide_battler
    return unless battle_anim_list[anim_id]
    @battle_anim_id = anim_id
    @battle_anim_frame = 0
  end
  
  #Koda
  def start_nonbattle_anim(anim_id)
    $game_variables[1] = 12 # Make enemy ID Crow
    @battle_anim_id = anim_id
    @battle_anim_frame = 0
    @battle_anim_skip_frame = 0
  end
  
  def resume_battle_anim
    hide_battler
    return unless battle_anim_list[anim_id] || !@last_battle_anim_id.nil?
    @battle_anim_id = @last_battle_anim_id
    @battle_anim_frame = 0
  end
  
  def stop_battle_anim
    @last_battle_anim_id = @battle_anim_id
    @battle_anim_id.clear
    index = BATTLE_ANIM_PIC_INDEX
    screen.pictures[index].erase
  end
  
  def play_battle_anim_se
    return unless battle_anim_list[@battle_anim_id][2]
    se_id = battle_anim_list[@battle_anim_id][2]
    RPG::SE.new(se_id, 80, 100).play
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
end
============= SCRIPT 285: >> First Encounter =============
class Crow < Game_Swan
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # First Encounter with Crow
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  CROW_FIRST_ENCOUNTER_TURN_LENGTH = 4
  
  def first_encounter_battle_times_up
    (turn_no > CROW_FIRST_ENCOUNTER_TURN_LENGTH) || ($game_troop.members[0].hp <= 1)
  end
  
  def first_encounter_battle_part_1
    if first_encounter_battle_times_up
      call_event(190, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Times up event
    elsif @stance == "Rest"
      reset_stamina
      return_idle # Skip one turn
    else
      call_event(88, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Slash
    end
    turn_passed
  end
  
  def first_encounter_battle_part_2
    if @stance == "Rest"
      reset_stamina
      return_idle # Skip one turn
    else
      call_event(188, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Slash
    end
    turn_passed
  end
end
============= SCRIPT 286: >> Full Armour =============
class Crow < Game_Swan
  
  def full_armour_battle
    case @stance
      when "Rest"
        reset_stamina
        return_idle # Skip one turn
      when "Idle"
        call_event(88, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Slash
      when "Strong Blow"
        call_event(199, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Stun Blow"
        call_event(200, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
    turn_passed
  end
  
  def full_armour_interrupt
  end
  
  def full_armour_post_interrupt
    if is_ethan_attacking
      #if identity_revealed?
        case @stance
          when "Idle" then damage_armour("Platebody") 
          when "Strong Blow" then damage_armour("Leotard") 
          when "Stun Blow" then damage_armour("Helmet")
          when "Rest" then damage_armour("Helmet") 
        end
      #else 
        #damage_armour("Helmet") 
      #end
      return if $game_troop.members[0].hp <= 0
      case check_armour_break 
        when "Helmet" then call_event(202, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Helmet Break event
        when "Platebody" then call_event(221, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Plateboy Break event
        when "Leotard" then call_event(233, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Leotard Break event
      end
    end
  end
  
  def full_armour_turn_end
    call_event(198, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Stance Change
  end
  
  def full_armour_crow_wins
    call_event(201, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
    
  def full_armour_you_win
  end

  def full_armour_initiate
    p "attempted full armor init, sum ting wong"
    return
    # DEPRECATED
    # SEE GENERAL BATTLE INIT
    
    #--- Hide the platebody and leotard hp, leave the base visible.
    #unless identity_revealed?
    #  screen.pictures[HUD_PIC_ID[1]].show("Crow/Hud/"+"Platebody", 1, 520, 244, 100, 100, 0, 0)
    #  screen.pictures[HUD_PIC_ID[2]].show("Crow/Hud/"+"Leotard", 1, 520, 253, 100, 100, 0, 0)
    #end
    #--- Set the health of armours
    #@armour_health[0] = @armour_health[1] = @armour_health[2] = 3
    #@armour_health[2] = 0 #koda
    
    #Koda
    #crow_armor_durability
    #call_event(197, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Greet Full Armor
    #call_event(197, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Greet No Helm
    #call_event(197, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Greet No Platebody
    #call_event(197, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Greet No Leotard
  end
  
  #Koda
  def crow_armor_durability
    #Override if True EX
    return @armour_health = [3,3,3] if true_ex?
    
    @armour_health[0] = [$game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][0],1].max
    @armour_health[1] = [$game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][1],1].max
    @armour_health[2] = [$game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][2],1].max
    
    #Clamp if over max
    @armour_health = [
      [@armour_health[0],ARMOUR_MAX_HEALTH[0]].min,
      [@armour_health[1],ARMOUR_MAX_HEALTH[1]].min,
      [@armour_health[2],ARMOUR_MAX_HEALTH[2]].min
    ]
  end

  #Koda
  def crow_align_armor
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][0] = @armour_health[0]
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][1] = @armour_health[1]
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["CrowDura"][2] = @armour_health[2]
  end
  
  def helmet_broken
    #--- Broke the helmet
    $game_troop.members[0].remove_state(82)
    @battle_mode = "Helmet Off"
    #$game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Identity Revealed"] = false Koda
    return_idle
  end
  
  def identity_revealed?
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Identity Revealed"]
  end
  
  
  def identity_revealed
    $game_variables[VARIABLE_ID]["Identity Revealed"] = true
  end
    
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # In battle animation
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def full_armour_anim
    list = {
      "HelmetOn/Pee/" => [["01","02","03","04","05"], 8, nil],
      "HelmetOn/Pee/Laugh/" => [["01","02"], 2, nil],
    }
  end
end
============= SCRIPT 287: >> Helmet Off =============
class Crow < Game_Swan
  
  attr_accessor :punish_step
  
  def helmet_off_battle
    case @stance
      when "Rest"
        reset_stamina
        return_idle # Skip one turn
      when "Idle"
        call_event(88, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Slash
      when "Fake Fatigue"
        if has_stamina? && (!mc_guarding? || !mc_grabblock?)
          call_event(205, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Grab Move
        else
          reset_stamina
          return_idle # Skip one turn
        end
      when "Charge"
        call_event(207, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Sit Move
      when "Grab"
        call_event(216, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Sit"
        call_event(217, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Trample"
        call_event(211, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
    turn_passed
  end
  
  def helmet_off_interrupt
    if is_ethan_attacking
      if @stance == "Fake Fatigue"
        call_event(205, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Grab Move
      end
    end
  end
  
  def helmet_off_post_interrupt
  end
  
  def helmet_off_turn_end
    call_event(204, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Stance Change
    if @stance == "Trample"
      @punish_step += 1
      #--- If fail to break after 3 turns, you give up
      if @punish_step > 4
        call_event(213, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      end
    end
  end
  
  def helmet_off_struggle
    case @stance
      when "Grab" then call_event(206, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Sit" then call_event(209, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Trample" then call_event(212, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
  end
  
  def helmet_off_surrender
    call_event(220, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Stance Change
  end
  
  def helmet_off_crow_wins
    call_event(215, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
    
  def helmet_off_you_win
  end

  def helmet_off_initiate
    @punish_step = 1
    initialize_restrain_point
    initialize_wank
    #---
    call_event(203, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Greet
    initiate_stink unless @armpit_arousal > 0 #Koda
  end
  
  def helmet_broken
    #--- Broke the helmet
    @battle_mode = "Helmet Off"
    helmet_off_initiate
    return_idle
  end
  
  def helmet_off_update
    wank_update
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Animation
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  IN_BATTLE_ANIM_PIC_INDEX = 20
  
  def lock_anim(pic_id, msg)
    index = IN_BATTLE_ANIM_PIC_INDEX
    img_folder = @punish_step <= 3 ? pic_id : pic_id + "Feet"
    hide_battler
    RPG::SE.new("Restrain_Lock", 80, 100).play
    screen.pictures[index].show(pic_id + "01", 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    12.times do
      screen.pictures[index].resprite(pic_id + "01")
      wait(2)
      screen.pictures[index].resprite(pic_id + "02")
      wait(2)
    end
    screen.pictures[index].erase
    if pic_id == "Crow/HelmetOff/ArmLock/"
      formula = (@restrain_point/10 + 2).to_s + " * a.atk - b.def * 3"
    else
      formula = "a.atk * 4 - b.def * 2"
    end
    message = msg
    image = pic_id + "01"
    use_skill(image, "damage", 114, -1, formula, message)
  end
  
  def arm_lock
    pic_id = "Crow/HelmetOff/ArmLock/"
    msg = " exerts vicious pressure on your arms!"
    lock_anim(pic_id, msg)
  end
  
  def leg_lock
    pic_id = "Crow/HelmetOff/LegLock/"
    msg = " exerts vicious pressure on your legs!"
    lock_anim(pic_id, msg)
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Restrain Bar Related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :restrain_point
  RESTRAIN_BAR_PIC_INDEX = [30, 31, 32]
  MAXIMUM_RESTRAIN_POINT = 100
  
  def initialize_restrain_point
    @restrain_point = 0.0
  end
  
  def gain_restrain_point(value)
    @restrain_point = [@restrain_point + value, MAXIMUM_RESTRAIN_POINT].min
    update_restrain_bar
  end
  
  def lose_restrain_point(value)
    @restrain_point = [@restrain_point - value, 0].max
    update_restrain_bar
  end
  
  def draw_restrain_bar
    index = RESTRAIN_BAR_PIC_INDEX
    img_folder = "Crow/HelmetOff/Hud/"
    screen.pictures[index[0]].show(img_folder+"Base", 1, 250, 286, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    scale_x = (@restrain_point.to_f / MAXIMUM_RESTRAIN_POINT.to_f) * 100.0
    screen.pictures[index[1]].show(img_folder+"Bar", 0, 132, 282, scale_x, 100, 255, 0)
    screen.pictures[index[2]].show(img_folder+"Icon", 1, 375, 286, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    RPG::SE.new("Skill1", 70, 110).play
  end
  
  def update_restrain_bar
    index = RESTRAIN_BAR_PIC_INDEX[1]
    scale_x = (@restrain_point.to_f / MAXIMUM_RESTRAIN_POINT.to_f) * 100.0
    RPG::SE.new("Up1", 70, 75).play
    screen.pictures[index].move(0, 132, 282, scale_x, 100, 255, 0, 30)
    wait(30)
  end
  
  def erase_restrain_bar
    RESTRAIN_BAR_PIC_INDEX.each {|index|screen.pictures[index].erase}
    RPG::SE.new("Skill1", 70, 75).play
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Crawl QTE
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def crawl_qte
    call_event(126, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    return $game_switches[3]
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Wank
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :wanking
  
  def initialize_wank
    @wanking = false
  end
  
  def start_wank
    @wanking = true
  end
  
  def stop_wank
    @wanking = false
  end
  
  def wank_update
    return unless @wanking
    wank_input_check
  end
  
  def wank_input_check
    if Input.trigger?(:C)
      index = 20
      interval = 12
      2.times do
        RPG::SE.new("Stroke", 80, 100).play
        pic_id = "Crow/HelmetOff/Trample/Wank/01"
        screen.pictures[index].resprite(pic_id)
        wait(interval)
        pic_id = "Crow/HelmetOff/Trample/Wank/02"
        screen.pictures[index].resprite(pic_id)
        wait(interval)
      end
      $wank_count += 1
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # In battle animation
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def helmet_off_anim
    list = {
      "HelmetOff/Trample/" => [["01", "02", "01", "02"], 24, "Restrain_Lock"] ,
      "HelmetOff/Pee/" => [["01","02"], 12, nil],
      "HelmetOff/Pee/Laugh/" => [["01","02"], 4, nil],
    }
  end
end
============= SCRIPT 288: >> Platebody Off =============
class Crow < Game_Swan
  attr_accessor :armpit_arousal, :aim_introduced
  ARMPIT_AROUSAL_MAX = 20.0
  MAX_REACTION_TIME = 60.0
  
  def platebody_off_battle
    case @stance
      when "Rest", "Back"
        reset_stamina
        return_idle # Skip one turn
      when "Raise"
        if has_stamina? && (!mc_guarding? || !mc_grabblock?)
          call_event(226, 2, MAP_ID[0])
        else
          reset_stamina
          return_idle # Skip one turn
        end
      when "Idle"
        call_event(227, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Slash
      when "Charge"
        call_event(222, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Neckhold
      when "Neckhold"
        call_event(224, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Clamp"
        call_event(231, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
    turn_passed
  end
  
  def platebody_off_initiate
    @punish_step = 1
    #---
    @armpit_arousal = 0 unless @armpit_arousal > 0
    @aim_introduced = false
    armpit_target_initialize
    initiate_stink unless @armpit_arousal > 0 #Koda
  end
  
  def platebody_off_post_interrupt
  end
  
  def platebody_off_turn_end
    call_event(219, 1, MAP_ID[0]) # Stance Change
  end
  
  def platebody_off_struggle
    case @stance
      when "Neckhold" then call_event(223, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Clamp" then call_event(230, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
  end
  
  def platebody_off_surrender
    call_event(228, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  
  def platebody_off_crow_wins
    call_event(218, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
    
  def platebody_off_you_win
    
  end
  
  def platebody_broken
    $game_troop.members[0].remove_state(82)
    @battle_mode = "Platebody Off"
    platebody_off_initiate
    return_idle
    initiate_stink unless @armpit_arousal > 0 #Koda
  end
    
  #Koda
  def smell_interrupt
    return unless is_ethan_attacking
    return if ["Fake Fatigue"].include?(@stance)
    if @armpit_arousal > 0
      if !@aim_introduced
        #--- First Aim Mechanic introduced scene
        call_event(225, 1, MAP_ID[0])
        @aim_introduced = true
      end
      platebody_off_aim
    else
      return
    end
  end

  def platebody_off_interrupt
    return unless is_ethan_attacking
    case @stance
      when "Raise"
        call_event(226, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Back"
        call_event(229, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      else
        #---
        if !@aim_introduced
          if @armpit_arousal > 0
            #--- First Aim Mechanic introduced scene
            call_event(225, 1, MAP_ID[0])
            @aim_introduced = true
            #---
            platebody_off_aim
          else
            return
          end
        else
        platebody_off_aim
      end
    end
  end
  
  def platebody_off_aim
    platebody_off_aim_check
    if @armpit_target_result == "Fail"
      call_event(232, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
  end
  
  def platebody_off_update
  end
  
  def platebody_off_aim_check
    reaction_time = MAX_REACTION_TIME * (1 - (0.7 *(@armpit_arousal.to_f/ARMPIT_AROUSAL_MAX.to_f)))
    start_armpit_target(reaction_time)
    loop do
      armpit_target_update
      wait(1)
      break if @armpit_target_status == "End"
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Arousal control
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def armpit_arousal_up(value = 1)
    call_event(106, 1, MAP_ID[0]) #Koda
    value = 1
    value = 2 if sweaty?
    value = 3 if steamy?
    value = 4 if stinky?
    @armpit_arousal = [@armpit_arousal + value, ARMPIT_AROUSAL_MAX].min
    #@armpit_arousal = [@armpit_arousal + value, ARMPIT_AROUSAL_MAX].min
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Target Game
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :armpit_target_time, :armpit_target_time_limit,
  :armpit_target_ring, :armpit_target_target, 
  :armpit_target_status, :armpit_target_result,
  :armpit_target_end_anim_duration,
  :armpit_target_afterimage
  
  def start_armpit_target(time)
    armpit_target_initialize
    @armpit_target_time = @armpit_target_time_limit = time
    @armpit_target_ring.visible = @armpit_target_target.visible = true
    @armpit_target_status = "Start"
  end
  
  def stop_armpit_target
    erase_armpit_target
  end
  
  def armpit_target_update
    return if @armpit_target_status.empty?
    update_armpit_target_hud
    armpit_target_check_input
    armpit_target_update_end_anim
    armpit_target_check_timeout
  end
  
  def armpit_target_initialize
    @armpit_target_ring = Sprite.new
    @armpit_target_target = Sprite.new
    @armpit_target_ring.x = @armpit_target_target.x = 272
    @armpit_target_ring.y = @armpit_target_target.y = 208
    @armpit_target_ring.z = @armpit_target_target.z = 99
    @armpit_target_ring.bitmap = Cache.picture("Crow/PlatebodyOff/Hud/Ring")
    @armpit_target_target.bitmap = Cache.picture("Crow/PlatebodyOff/Hud/Target")
    @armpit_target_ring.ox = @armpit_target_ring.bitmap.width / 2
    @armpit_target_ring.oy = @armpit_target_ring.bitmap.height / 2
    @armpit_target_target.ox = @armpit_target_target.bitmap.width / 2
    @armpit_target_target.oy = @armpit_target_target.bitmap.height / 2
    @armpit_target_status = ""
    @armpit_target_result = ""
    @armpit_target_end_anim_duration = 0
    armpit_target_afterimage_initialize
    @armpit_target_ring.visible = @armpit_target_target.visible = @armpit_target_afterimage.visible = false
  end
  
  def erase_armpit_target
    @armpit_target_ring.visible = @armpit_target_target.visible = @armpit_target_afterimage.visible = false
  end
  
  def update_armpit_target_hud
    return unless @armpit_target_status == "Start"
    time_factor = @armpit_target_time.to_f/@armpit_target_time_limit.to_f
    @armpit_target_ring.zoom_x = @armpit_target_ring.zoom_y = time_factor
    shrinking_armpit_target_ring
  end

  def shrinking_armpit_target_ring
    return if armpit_target_time <= 0
    @armpit_target_time = [@armpit_target_time - 1, 0].max
  end
  
  def armpit_target_check_input
    return unless @armpit_target_status == "Start"
    if Input.trigger?(:C)
      if armpit_target_succeed?
        RPG::SE.new("Item3", 80, 100).play
        @armpit_target_result = "Succeed"
        @armpit_target_afterimage.visible = true
      else
        RPG::SE.new("Buzzer1", 80, 100).play
        @armpit_target_result = "Fail"
      end
      @armpit_target_status = "Anim"
      @armpit_target_end_anim_duration = 30
    end
  end
  
  def armpit_target_check_timeout
    return unless @armpit_target_status == "Start"
    if @armpit_target_time <= 0
      RPG::SE.new("Buzzer2", 80, 100).play
      @armpit_target_result = "Fail"
      @armpit_target_status = "Anim"
      @armpit_target_end_anim_duration = 30
    end
  end
  
  def armpit_target_succeed?
    time_factor = @armpit_target_time.to_f/@armpit_target_time_limit.to_f
    scale = 100 * time_factor
    scale < 18
  end
  
  def armpit_target_clean_variables
    @armpit_target_time = @armpit_target_time_limit = @armpit_target_ring = @armpit_target_target = nil
  end
  
  def armpit_target_update_end_anim
    return unless @armpit_target_status == "Anim"
    if @armpit_target_result == "Fail"
      if Graphics.frame_count % 2 == 0
        @armpit_target_target.x = Graphics.frame_count % 4 == 0 ? 273 : 270
      end
    else
      scale = 3.0 * (1.0 - (@armpit_target_end_anim_duration.to_f/ 30.0))
      opacity = 200.0 * @armpit_target_end_anim_duration.to_f/ 30.0
      @armpit_target_afterimage.zoom_x = @armpit_target_afterimage.zoom_y = scale
      @armpit_target_afterimage.opacity = opacity
    end
    @armpit_target_end_anim_duration -= 1
    armpit_target_check_anim_end
  end
  
  def armpit_target_afterimage_initialize
    @armpit_target_afterimage = Sprite.new
    @armpit_target_afterimage.x = 272
    @armpit_target_afterimage.y = 208
    @armpit_target_afterimage.z = 99
    @armpit_target_afterimage.bitmap = Cache.picture("Crow/PlatebodyOff/Hud/Target")
    @armpit_target_afterimage.ox = @armpit_target_afterimage.bitmap.width / 2
    @armpit_target_afterimage.oy = @armpit_target_afterimage.bitmap.height / 2
    @armpit_target_afterimage.opacity = 200
  end
  
  def armpit_target_check_anim_end
    if @armpit_target_end_anim_duration <= 0
      @armpit_target_status = "End"
      armpit_target_result
      stop_armpit_target
      shake
    end
  end
  
  def armpit_target_result
    $game_switches[6] = @armpit_target_result == "Fail"
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # In battle animation
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def platebody_off_anim
    list = {
      "PlatebodyOff/Bump/Jerk/" => [["01", "02"], 16, "Stroke"],
      "PlatebodyOff/Drain/" => [armpit_punish_shake_sequence, 4, nil],
      "PlatebodyOff/LockA/" => [armpit_punish_shake_sequence, 4, nil],
      "PlatebodyOff/Drain/Laugh/" => [armpit_punish_laugh_sequence, 4, nil],
      "PlatebodyOff/Serve/Laugh/" => [armpit_punish_laugh_sequence, 4, nil],
      "PlatebodyOff/Win/" => [armpit_punish_laugh_sequence, 4, nil],
    }
  end
  
  def armpit_punish_shake_sequence
    sequence = ["01", "02"] * 4
    10.times{ sequence << "01" }
    return sequence
  end
  
  def armpit_punish_laugh_sequence
    sequence = ["01", "02"] * 5
    10.times{ sequence << "01" }
    return sequence
  end
end
============= SCRIPT 289: >> Leotard Off =============
#=======================================================================#
# This script contains functions used in the Scripted battle(Ass Punish)
#=======================================================================#
class Crow < Game_Swan
  def ass_punish_initialize
    ass_punish_initialize_breathe
    update_armours_hud
    ass_punish_reset_hold_turn
    @ass_punish_grab_freeze = 0
    call_event(154, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    initiate_stink unless @armpit_arousal > 0 #Koda
  end
  
  def ass_punish_update
    ass_punish_turn_meter
  end
  
  def ass_punish_clean
    call_event(162, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  
  def ass_punish_death_blow
    call_event(163, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  
  def leotard_broken
    $game_troop.members[0].remove_state(82)
    @battle_mode = "Leotard Off"
    ass_punish_initialize
    return_idle
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # The Crow's Turn
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :ass_punish_grab_freeze
  
  def ass_punish_battle
    ass_punish_attack if forced_start?
    case @stance # Hold attacks under [Struggle]
      when "Crush"
        #ass_punish_crush
      when "Carry"
        #call_event(169, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Sit"
        #--- Sit
        #call_event(166, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Butt"
        #--- Butt
        reset_stamina
        return_idle #Not finish
      when "Pin"
        #--- Pin Attack
        #call_event(160, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Rest" 
        #--- Rest
        reset_stamina
        return_idle
      when "Lower"
        #--- Pin Start
        reset_stamina if pseudo_ex?
        call_event(159, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Idle"
        if ass_punish_out_of_breathe?
          #--- Crush
          ass_punish_crush
        else
          #--- Slash
          call_event(157, 1, MAP_ID[0])
        end
    end
    #--- Stance change
    call_event(158, 1, MAP_ID[0]) if @ass_punish_grab_freeze == 0
    turn_passed
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Flow control
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def ass_punish_interrupt
    return if !is_ethan_attacking
    case @stance
      #--- Sit
      when "Lower" then call_event(165, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Butt" then call_event(168, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
  end
  
  def ass_punish_post_interrupt
  end 
  
  def ass_punish_turn_end
    @ass_punish_grab_freeze = [(@ass_punish_grab_freeze - 1), 0].max
    if ass_punish_out_of_breathe?
      ass_punish_breathe(4)
    else
      ass_punish_breathe_per_turn 
    end
  end
  
  attr_accessor :ass_punish_hold_turn
  def ass_punish_reset_hold_turn
    @ass_punish_hold_turn = 0
  end
  
  def ass_punish_hold_turn_up
    @ass_punish_hold_turn += 1
  end
  
  def ass_punish_struggle
    call_event(164, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    #Punishment
    ass_punish_attack
  end
  
  def ass_punish_attack #Koda
    case @stance
      when "Crush"
        #--- Crush / Pee moves
        ass_punish_crush
      when "Carry"
        #--- Carry Attack
        call_event(169, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Sit"
        #--- Sit Attack
        call_event(166, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Pin"
        #--- Pin Attack
        call_event(160, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      else
        return
    end
    ass_punish_breathe_out(1)
  end
  
  def ass_punish_escape?
    rand(100) < (@ass_punish_hold_turn * (15 + deflvl))
  end
  
  def ass_punish_turn_passed
    turn_passed
  end
  
  def ass_punish_crush
    #koda
    p @ass_punish_hold_turn
    case @ass_punish_hold_turn
      when 0 then call_event(172, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when 1 then call_event(172, 2, MAP_ID[0])
      when 2 then call_event(172, 3, MAP_ID[0])
      else 
        call_event(172, 4, MAP_ID[0])
    end
  end
  
  # Koda Deprecated... why was it called this??
  def armpit_punish_lose
    leotard_off_crow_wins
    #call_event(174, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  
  def leotard_off_crow_wins
    p "calling event"
    call_event(174, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  
  def leotard_off_surrender
    call_event(175, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Breathe mechanic
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  ASS_PUNISH_METER_INDEX = 43
  ASS_PUNISH_PIN_INDEX = 44
  ASS_PUNISH_PIN_TURN_DURATION = 20
  
  attr_accessor :ass_punish_air_flow, :ass_punish_meter_degree, 
  :ass_punish_meter_duration
  
  #Koda reworked
  def ass_punish_breathe(value = 4)
    $game_troop.members[0].animation_id = 207
    wait(30)
    ass_punish_breathe_in(value)
    if ["Pin","Sit","Carry","Crush"].include?(@stance) #Pins
      if @stance == "Crush" && @ass_punish_hold_turn == 2
        call_event(156, 3, MAP_ID[0]) # Swallow Pee
      else
        call_event(156, 2, MAP_ID[0])
      end
    elsif @stance == "Butt"
      call_event(171, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
  end
  
  #Koda
  def ass_punish_breathe_cum
    case @stance
      when "Pin" then call_event(161, 1, MAP_ID[0]) 
      when "Sit" then call_event(167, 1, MAP_ID[0]) 
      when "Carry" then call_event(170, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      when "Crush" then call_event(173, 1, MAP_ID[0])
    end
  end
  
  def ass_punish_initialize_breathe
    #---
    @ass_punish_air_flow = 3
    @ass_punish_meter_degree = 0.0
    @ass_punish_meter_duration = 0
    @ass_punish_breathed = false
    #--- Learn "Breathe"
    name_skill(1, "Breathe", 112)
    $game_actors[1].learn_skill(348)
    #---
  end
  
  def ass_punish_breathe_in(value = 1)
    @ass_punish_air_flow = [@ass_punish_air_flow + value, 6].min
    ass_punish_reset_meter_duration
  end
  
  def ass_punish_breathe_out(value = 1)
    @ass_punish_air_flow = [@ass_punish_air_flow - value, 0].max
    ass_punish_reset_meter_duration
    if ass_punish_breathe_check
      #--- Out of breathe fx
      call_event(235, 1, MAP_ID[0])
      $game_actors[1].add_state(83)
      ass_punish_red_flash_meter
    end
  end
  
  def ass_punish_breathe_check
    @ass_punish_air_flow <= 0 && !ass_punish_out_of_breathe?
  end
  
  def ass_punish_breathe_per_turn
    ass_punish_breathe_out(1) unless ass_punish_out_of_breathe?
  end
  
  def ass_punish_out_of_breathe?
    $game_actors[1].state?(83)
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Breathe meter
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def ass_punish_update_meter
    ass_punish_turn_meter
  end
  
  def ass_punish_draw_meter
    #---
    index = ASS_PUNISH_METER_INDEX
    pic = "Crow/LeotardOff/Hud/Meter"
    screen.pictures[index].show(pic, 1, 63, 244, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    #---
    index = ASS_PUNISH_PIN_INDEX
    pic = "Crow/LeotardOff/Hud/Pin"
    screen.pictures[index].show(pic, 1, 64, 260, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    #---
  end
  
  def ass_punish_clean_meter
    #---
    screen.pictures[ASS_PUNISH_METER_INDEX].erase
    #---
    screen.pictures[ASS_PUNISH_PIN_INDEX].erase
    #---
  end
  
  def ass_punish_replace_meter(meter_id)
    #---
    index = ASS_PUNISH_METER_INDEX
    pic = "Crow/LeotardOff/Hud/Meter_" + meter_id
    screen.pictures[index].show(pic, 1, 63, 244, 100, 100, 255, 0)
  end
  
  def ass_punish_flash_meter
    RPG::SE.new("Recovery", 80, 100).play
    anim_pic(ASS_PUNISH_METER_INDEX, 114)
    anim_pic(ASS_PUNISH_PIN_INDEX, 114)
  end
  
  def ass_punish_red_flash_meter
    RPG::SE.new("Down3", 100, 100).play
    anim_pic(ASS_PUNISH_METER_INDEX, 212)
    anim_pic(ASS_PUNISH_PIN_INDEX, 212)
  end
  
  def ass_punish_reset_meter_duration
    @ass_punish_meter_duration = ASS_PUNISH_PIN_TURN_DURATION
    RPG::SE.new("Wind10", 80, 100).play
    anim_pic(ASS_PUNISH_METER_INDEX, 114)
  end
  
  def ass_punish_turn_meter
    degree = (180.0 * ( @ass_punish_air_flow.to_f / 6.0 )).floor
    #---
    if @ass_punish_meter_duration == 0 || degree == @ass_punish_meter_degree
      @ass_punish_meter_duration = 0
      return
    end
    #---
    duration = @ass_punish_meter_duration.to_f
    @ass_punish_meter_degree = ((@ass_punish_meter_degree.to_f * (duration - 1.0) + degree.to_f) / duration).floor
    #---
    index = ASS_PUNISH_PIN_INDEX
    screen.pictures[index].turn(@ass_punish_meter_degree, 1)
    @ass_punish_meter_duration -= 1
  end
  
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Fart Animation
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def fart_anim(pic = "LockB")
    index = IN_BATTLE_ANIM_PIC_INDEX
    heartbeat
    #RPG::SE.new("fart_05", 80, 100).play
    pic_id = "Crow/LeotardOff/" + pic + "/01"
    anim_pic(index, 119)
    screen.pictures[index].show(pic_id, 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0)
    12.times do
      pic_id = "Crow/LeotardOff/" + pic + "/Fart1" 
      screen.pictures[index].resprite(pic_id)
      wait(2)
      pic_id = "Crow/LeotardOff/" + pic + "/01" 
      screen.pictures[index].resprite(pic_id)
      wait(2)
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Custom skills
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def ass_punish_skill
    return if @active_skill_id.nil?
    case $data_skills[@active_skill_id].name
      when "Breathe"
        event_id = 156
    end
    call_event(event_id, 1, MAP_ID[0])
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # In battle animation
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
    def ass_punish_anim
    list = {
      "LeotardOff/LockA/" => [["01", "02", "01", "02"], 16, "Equip3"],
      "LeotardOff/LockB/" => [["01", "02", "01", "02"], 16, "Equip3"],
      "LeotardOff/LockD/" => [["01", "02", "01", "02"], 16, "Equip3"],
      "LeotardOff/LockD/Pee/" => [["01", "02", "01", "02"], 8, nil],
      "LeotardOff/Win/" => [armpit_punish_laugh_sequence, 4, nil],
    }
  end
end

# This script contains all the functions used in Floor 7 (Kaori)

class Game_Kaori < Game_Interpreter
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#

  def prebuff_seal_knowledge
    _prebuff = 0
    _prebuff += (Kaori.loops*5)
    _prebuff += 5 if Kaori.endings.include?(:ass_slave) #Ass End
    _prebuff += 5 if Kaori.endings.include?(:sock_slave) #Sock End
    _prebuff += 5 if Kaori.endings.include?(:loser_slave) #Dojo End
    _prebuff += 5 if Kaori.endings.include?(:stroke_slave) #Intrude End
    _prebuff += 5 if Kaori.endings.include?(:scold_slave) #Peep End
    _prebuff += 5 if Kaori.endings.include?(:bath_slave) #Panty End
    _prebuff += 5 if Kaori.endings.include?(:mind_melt) #Confess End
      # Trial Combat Endings
    _prebuff += 5 if Kaori.endings.include?(:clueless)
    _prebuff += 5 if Kaori.endings.include?(:sensei_slave)
    _prebuff += 5 if Kaori.endings.include?(:ninja_puppy)
    _prebuff += 5 if Kaori.endings.include?(:true_ninja_puppy)
    _prebuff += 10 if Kaori.free?
      # Cap at 100
    _prebuff = [_prebuff,100].min
      # Apply to variable
    $game_switches[80][:seal_knowledge] += _prebuff
  end
  
  def improve_seal_knowledge(amount=5)
    $game_switches[80][:seal_knowledge] += amount
    _magnitude = if amount < 5
      " slightly "
    elsif amount < 10
      " "
    else
      " greatly "
    end
  
    show_dynamic_msg("\\i[700]Your seal knowledge#{_magnitude}improves!")
  end

	def status_update
		case $game_switches[80][:vigor]
			when 0..max_vigor/5 then self.status = "Fatigue"
			when (max_vigor/5)+1..max_vigor/2 then self.status = "Tired"
			else;self.status = "Normal"
		end
	end
  alias vigor_status_update status_update

  def milestone
		return 4 if seen?(:first_lock_2)
		return 3 if combat_skill >= Kaori::SETTINGS[:milestone][1] && seen?(:milestone2)
		return 2 if combat_skill >= Kaori::SETTINGS[:milestone][0] && seen?(:milestone1)
		return 1
	end

  def pendant_name(args)
    case args
      when "teal" then return 0
      when "green" then return 1
      when "yellow" then return 2
    end
  end
  
  def pendant_found
    found = 0
    $game_switches[80][:pendant_get].each do |i|
      found += 1 if i
    end
    return found
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Pictures Related
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
	def draw_pic(*args) #0:index 1:img_id 2:opacity 3:pos_x 4:pos_y 5:anchor
		screen.pictures[args[0]].show(args[1], args[5], args[3], args[4], 100, 100, args[2], 0)
	end
  
  def quick_draw_pic(args, index = 3)
    screen.pictures[index].show(args, 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0)
  end
  
  def quick_fade_out_pic(index = 3)
		fade_pic(index, 0, 20, false)
	end
	
  attr_accessor :fade_frame
	def fade_in_pic(args) #img_id
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # Exception for thrust animation used in intruder line
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    thrust_off if @loop_mode == :thrust 
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # Fade in
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
		draw_pic(3, args, 0, 272, 208, 1)
    @fade_frame = Graphics.frame_count
		@loop_mode = :breathe
		pic_loop_on
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # For fading between frame by frame anim <-> still animation
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    @anim_name = args
	end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # If you want to fade in a pic that starts with jelly loop mode
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def fade_in_jelly(args)
    fade_in_pic(args)
    @loop_mode = :jelly
  end
	
	def fade_out_pic
		pic_loop_off
		fade_pic(3,0,20,false)
	end
	
	def cross_fade_pic(args)
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # From thrust loop mode
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    if @loop_mode == :thrust
      thrust_off
      @loop_mode = :jelly
    end
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # From frame by frame animation to breathe or squeeze animation
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    unless @anim.nil?
      @loop_mode = ANIM_LIST[@anim_name][4]
      pic_anim_dispose 
      fade_pic(5, 0, 20, false)
      fade_pic(6, 0, 20, false)
      @anim = nil
    end
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # For fading between frame by frame anim <-> still animation
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    @anim_name = args
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # Cross fade starts
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    return fade_in_pic(args)
    #Koda
    
    pic_sprite(4, args)
    
		#fade_pic(3,0,20,false)
		#screen.pictures[4].show(args, 1, 272, pic_pos_y, 100, pic_scale_y, 0, 0)
		#fade_pic(4,255,20,false);wait(20)
		#screen.pictures[3].show(args, 1, 272, pic_pos_y, 100, pic_scale_y, 255, 0)
		#erase_pic(4)
	end
	
	def pic_loop_on;$game_switches[81] = true;wait(10);end
	def pic_loop_off;$game_switches[81] = false;wait(10);end
  def pic_loop_on?; $game_switches[81] == true; end #Koda
	
	def pic_pos_y;@breathe_frame.nil? ? 208 : 206.0 + 3* Math.sin(@breathe_frame).abs;end
	def pic_scale_y;@breathe_frame.nil? ? 100 : 103.0 - 2* Math.sin(@breathe_frame).abs;end
	
  def pic_opacity
    @fade_frame = Graphic.frame_count if @fade_frame.nil?
    [(Graphics.frame_count - @fade_frame) * 12, 255].min
  end
  
	attr_accessor :breathe_frame, :loop_mode
	
	def pic_loop
		@loop_mode = :breathe if @loop_mode.nil?
    @fade_frame = Graphics.frame_count if @fade_frame.nil?
		case @loop_mode
			when :breathe; pic_breathe
			when :jelly; pic_jelly
			when :squeeze; pic_squeeze
      when :anim; pic_anim
      when :thrust; pic_thrust
		end
	end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Handles the opacity of the sprite 
  # Like fading in fading out 
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def opacity_handle
  end
  
	def pic_breathe
    @breathe_frame = 0.0 if @breathe_frame.nil?
		screen.pictures[3].move(1, 272, pic_pos_y, 100, pic_scale_y, pic_opacity, 0, 1)
		@breathe_frame += Math::PI/100
		
		if @breathe_frame >= Math::PI
			@breathe_frame = 0
			20.times do |i|
        screen.pictures[3].move(1, 272, pic_pos_y, 100, pic_scale_y, pic_opacity, 0, 1)
        wait(1)
      end
		end
		wait(1)
	end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Pic effect : Jelly
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :jelly_frame, :jelly_sound
  def pic_jelly(id=3) #Koda added id
    @jelly_frame = 0 if @jelly_frame.nil?
    scale_x = [100.0, 100.6, 101.1, 101.7, 102.3, 102.9, 103.4, 104.0, 103.0, 102.0, 101.0, 100.0, 100.7, 101.3, 102.0, 101.3, 100.7, 100.0, 100.5, 101.0, 100.0, 100.0]
    scale_y = [100.0, 100.0, 100.0, 100.0, 100.0, 100.0, 100.0, 100.0, 101.5, 103.0, 104.5, 106.0, 104.0, 102.0, 100.0, 100.7, 101.3, 102.0, 101.0, 100.0, 101.0, 100.0]
    screen.pictures[id].show(@anim_name, 1, 272, 208, scale_x[@jelly_frame], scale_y[@jelly_frame], 255, 0)
    @jelly_frame += 1
    if @jelly_frame == scale_x.count
      pulse_pic(id)
      @jelly_frame = 0
      audio_name = @jelly_sound.nil? ? "Stroke" : @jelly_sound
      if audio_name == "Stroke"
        RPG::SE.new("Stroke", 80, [100,90,80,70].sample).play
      else
        RPG::SE.new(audio_name,80,100).play
      end
      screen.start_flash(Color.new(255,0,255,30), 30)
      wait(10)
    end
    wait(1)
  end
  
  def reset_jelly_sound
    @jelly_sound = nil
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Pic effect : Squeeze
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  attr_accessor :squeeze_frame
  def pic_squeeze
    @squeeze_frame ||= 0
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # Pos x of the picture on each frame
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    pos_x = [
            272.0, 271.3, 270.7, 270.0, 270.7, 271.3, 
            272.0, 271.3, 270.7, 270.0, 270.7, 271.3,
            272.0, 271.3, 270.7, 270.0, 270.7, 271.3,
            272.0, 271.3, 270.7, 
            270.0, 271.0, 272.0, 271.0,
            270.0, 271.0, 272.0, 271.0,
            270.0, 271.0, 272.0, 271.0,
            270.0, 271.0, 272.0, 271.0,
            270.0, 271.0, 272.0, 271.0,
            270.0, 271.0, 272.0, 271.0,
            270.0, 271.0, 272.0, 271.0,
            270.0, 271.0, 272.0, 271.0,
            270.0, 271.0, 272.0, 271.0,
            270.0, 271.0, 272.0, 271.0,
            272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 
            272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0,
            272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0,
            272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0,
            272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0,
            272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0,
            272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0,
            272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0, 272.0,
            ]
    screen.pictures[3].move(1, pos_x[@squeeze_frame], 208, 100, 100, pic_opacity, 0, 1)
    if @squeeze_frame >= (pos_x.count - 1)
      RPG::SE.new("Restrain_Lock", 80, 100).play
      @squeeze_frame = 0
    else
      @squeeze_frame += 1
    end
    wait(1)
	end
	
	def pic_sniff;anim_pic(Kaori::INDEX,Anims::SMELLG);end
	def pic_cum;anim_pic(3,156);end
    
  def pic_shake
		pic_loop_off
		screen.pictures[3].move(1, 272, 208, 104, 100, 255, 0, 7);wait(7)
		screen.pictures[3].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 106, 255, 0, 4);wait(4)
		screen.pictures[3].move(1, 272, 208, 102, 100, 255, 0, 3);wait(3)
		screen.pictures[3].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 102, 255, 0, 3);wait(3)
		screen.pictures[3].move(1, 272, 208, 101, 100, 255, 0, 2);wait(2)
		screen.pictures[3].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 101, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)	
		screen.pictures[3].move(1, 272, 208, 101, 100, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)	
		screen.pictures[3].move(1, 272, 208, 100, 100, 255, 0, 1);wait(1)
		pic_loop_on
		wait(10)
	end
		
	def tilt_pic(args)
		draw_pic(4, args, 0, 272, 416, 1)
		screen.pictures[4].move(1, 272, 0, 100, 100, 255, 0, 200)
		wait(200)
		fade_pic(4,0,20,false)
	end
  
  def pic_sprite(*args)
    if args[0].is_a? Integer
      game_screen.pictures[args[0]].resprite(args[1])
    else
      game_screen.pictures[3].resprite(args[0])
    end
	end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Fade in the animation
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
	def fade_in_anim(args) 
		@loop_mode = :anim
		anim_set(args)
    pic_anim_reset
    pic_loop_on
	end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Cross Fade the animation
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
	def cross_fade_anim(args)
    fade_out_pic
    #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # Fading from other loop mode (still image animation)
    #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
    if @loop_mode != :anim
      @loop_mode = :anim
      pic_anim_reset
      anim_set(args)
      fade_pic(3,0,20,false)
      fade_pic(4,0,20,false)
      #wait(30)
    #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # Fading from frame by frame animation
    #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
    else
      #fade_pic(3,0,20,false)
      #fade_pic(4,0,20,false)
      pic_anim_replace
      anim_set(args)
      pic_anim_reset
    end
    pic_loop_on
	end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Fade out the animation
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
	def fade_out_anim
    pic_loop_off
    fade_pic(5, 0, 20, false)
    fade_pic(6, 0, 20, false)
    pic_anim_dispose
	end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # The animation list
  # :anim_name is the current animation that's playing
  # :anim_opacity is the current opacity of the image
  # :anim_index is the current frame in the animation
  # ANIM_LIST[:name][1] : the file path of the animation
  # ANIM_LIST[:name][2] : the play order of the pic
  # ANIM_LIST[:name][3] : the file path of the animation
  # ANIM_LIST[:name][4] : audio played for each loop (nil = no sound)
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  SQUEEZE_SEQUENCE = ["00", "01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "08", "09", "08", "09", "08", "09", "08", "09", "08", "09", "08", "09", "08", "09", "08", "09", "08", "09", "08", "07", "06", "05","04", "03", "02", "01"]
  
  attr_accessor :anim, :anim_name, :anim_opacity, :anim_index, 
  :old_anim, :old_anim_opacity, :old_anim_index

  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Override the set method for @anim_name
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def anim_set(args)
    @anim_name = args
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # Putting the animation setting into variable "@anim"
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    ANIM_LIST.each do |key, value|
      if key == @anim_name
        @anim = value
      end
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Playing parallel animat ion during scenes
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pic_anim
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # initialize opacity and picture index
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    @anim_opacity = 0 if @anim_opacity.nil?
    @anim_index = 0 if @anim_index.nil?
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # Prevent crash if I enter a wrong name 
    # which doesn't exist in the list
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    return if @anim.nil? 
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # Play the sound
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    #Koda - added pitch variation for stroke and other fx
    if @anim_index == 0 && !@anim[3].nil?
      if ["Stroke","Sand","Equip2","Equip3","Restrain_Lock"].include?(@anim[3])
        RPG::SE.new(@anim[3], 80, [100,90,80,70].sample).play
      else
        RPG::SE.new(@anim[3], 80, 100).play 
      end
    end
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # Play the animation
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    screen.pictures[5].show(@anim[0] + @anim[1][@anim_index], 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, @anim_opacity, 0)
    pic_anim_next_index
    pic_anim_add_opacity
    
    unless @old_anim.nil?
      screen.pictures[6].show(@old_anim[0] + @old_anim[1][@old_anim_index], 1, 272, 208, 100, 100, @old_anim_opacity, 0)
      pic_anim_dispose_check
      pic_anim_old_next_frame
    end
    
    wait(@anim[2])
  end
  
  def pulse_anim #Koda
    pulse_pic(5,90,10,200)
    return
    if @old_anim.nil?
      p "nil"
      pulse_pic(5)
    else
      p "not nil"
      pulse_pic(6)
    end
  end
  
  def anim_anim(animdata) #Koda
    if @old_anim.nil?
      anim_pic(5,animdata)
    else
      anim_pic(6,animdata)
    end
  end
  
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Decide the next index of the animation
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pic_anim_next_index
    @anim_index += 1 
    if @anim_index == @anim[1].count
      @anim_index = 0
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Decide the opacity of next frame (add)
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pic_anim_add_opacity
    if @anim_opacity < 255
      @anim_opacity = [255, @anim_opacity + 40].min
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Decide the opacity of next frame (sub)
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pic_anim_sub_opacity
    if @anim_opacity > 0
      @anim_opacity = [0, @anim_opacity - 40].max
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Reset animation status
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pic_anim_reset
    @anim_opacity = 0
    @anim_index = 0
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Clean
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pic_anim_dispose
    @anim = nil
    @anim_name = nil
    @anim_opacity = nil
    @anim_index = nil
    @old_anim = nil
    @old_anim_opacity = nil
    @old_anim_index = nil
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Animation replace
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pic_anim_replace
    @old_anim = @anim
    @old_anim_opacity = @anim_opacity 
    @old_anim_index = @anim_index 
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Old anim dispose check
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  def pic_anim_dispose_check
    if @old_anim_opacity <= 0
      @old_anim = nil
    end
  end
  
  def pic_anim_old_next_frame
    return if @old_anim.nil?
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # index handle
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    @old_anim_index += 1 
    if @old_anim_index == @old_anim[1].count
      @old_anim_index = 0
    end
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    # opacity handle
    #-------------------------------------------------------------------#
    if @old_anim_opacity > 0
      @old_anim_opacity = [0, @old_anim_opacity - 40].max
    end
  end
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
  # Standard
  # This section contain functions which are used across the floor.
  #---------------------------------------------------------------------#
	def reset_variables
		self.vigor = self.max_vigor
		self.lust = 0
		self.day = 1
	end
		
	def trial_start
		self.in_trial= true
		#self.seal_on
		reset_variables
	end
	
	def placing_event(event_id, pos_x, pos_y)
		if ($game_map.events[event_id].x != pos_x || $game_map.events[event_id].y != pos_y)
			$game_map.events[event_id].moveto(pos_x, pos_y)
		end
	end
			
	def reset_autorun(map_id)
		$game_self_switches[[map_id, 1, 'A']] = false
	end
	
	def variables_initialized?
		$game_self_switches[[21, 34, 'A']]
	end		
	
	#def draw_film_border
	#	make_pic(10, "Kaori/Hud/Film_Border", 255, 272, 208, 1)
	#end
  
  def draw_film_border
		#screen.pictures[0].show("Kaori/Hud/FilmBorder", 1, 272, 208, 100,100, 255, 0)
    show_pic("Kaori/Hud/FilmBorder",0,30)
    #was 10
	end
		
	def erase_film_border
		#erase_pic(0) #was 10
    fade_pic(0,0,30)
    $scheduler.after(30,->{erase_pic(0)})
	end
  
  def reset_all_autorun
    #kaorimaps = [21,22,151,152,23,155,156,160,26,28,29,30,158,159,32,157]
    Kaori::MAP_IDS.each {|i| reset_autorun(i)}
  end
  
  alias :kaori_heartbeat :heartbeat
  def heartbeat(who=:kaori,wait=60)
      kaori_heartbeat(who,wait)
  end
